name: Automated Message (important) - via VPP
subject: Sotomayor’s BLISTERING Dissent >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Did you miss this?
| **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE:**

We’re reaching out to Democrats who have **not added their signature** to our time-sensitive letter to Supreme Court Justice Sotomayor, _following her BLISTERING dissent against the MAGA-majority court._

**Justice Sonia Sotomayor is leading the charge against Trump’s authoritarian administration. We need to make sure Democrats in your state are standing _firmly behind her_ in this fight!**

We’re sending our letter tomorrow at 9AM, and reaching out **ONE FINAL TIME** and [**asking you to add your signature to our letter to stand with Justice Sotomayor as she takes on Trump and his far-right administration! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94458?t=6&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94458?t=7&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG)
---
Thank you for taking action,
— The Voter Protection Project

**\- - - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - - -**
From: Time Sensitive Letter (via VPP)
To: Top Democrats
Subject: Justice Sotomayor’s STARK Warning >>
_Justice Sotomayor just put the MAGA SCOTUS majority & Donald Trump to SHAME:_
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94458?t=8&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG)
**If a member of the Supreme Court — _who is supposed to be impartial_ — is sounding the alarm, _we should ALL be listening._**

Team, we’re so grateful for Sotomayor’s BRAVE leadership — but Republicans are FURIOUS with Sotomayor, and they’re _plotting revenge._

We need to show Supreme Court Justice Sotomayor that Democrats (especially Democrats in your state) have her back!

[**As one of the FEW protectors of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. WE HAVE ONLY 18 SPOTS LEFT:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94458?t=9&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG)
[**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94458?t=10&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda and blatant disregard of the Constitution.**

Your bravery continues to blow us away, time after time.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94458?t=11&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94458?t=12&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94458?t=13&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21385%2E878179%2EpPaDOG)

# It's David Shuster's Week-End Video Round Up!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/779d68bc-679f-411e-bd81-0c9c4252ad29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This week's update spotlighted the troubling spectacle of Donald Trump addressing hundreds of U.S. generals and admirals with incoherent remarks that reinforced growing concerns about his cognitive decline.
[Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth added to the embarrassment](https://substack.com/redirect/e7d6649a-783d-4753-a6cf-2b45208480db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by taunting America's enemies with a juvenile "FAFO," diminishing the seriousness of U.S. leadership on the global stage.
Subscribe now!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.aa4RZWof2jT2C5Do_f52bTXmhUanTgG_5dxPg4yG4HM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175229302)
Trump's decline was on further display when he failed to recall Hakeem Jeffries' name in a meeting with Democratic leaders, later resorting to sharing a racist, AI-generated image [rather than engaging substantively](https://substack.com/redirect/908738b0-4775-4144-b026-8d0670f4749b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Elsewhere, Senator Elizabeth Warren forcefully dismantled a CBS anchor who echoed GOP talking points on healthcare, while Bernie Sanders and AOC underscored the devastating consequences of Republican healthcare policies--projected to cost 50,000 lives annually.
Even Pope Leo condemned GOP hypocrisy on their claim that they're "pro-life."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/779d68bc-679f-411e-bd81-0c9c4252ad29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

Dear Friend, With America 250 and Election Day just weeks away...| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116543192/573774314/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDYyMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzRjMDBkNjAtYmFhMC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kvvyJmkQL9rDwONtQGdBvqsRes2ziHdM8Ji21OqxMRo=&emci=388696f6-b8a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=34c00d60-baa0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=10957263)
---
| | **_Join us on October 6th at the Union League of Philadelphia_**
---
| |
---
| | Peter, With**America 250** and Election Day just weeks away, I hope you'll consider joining me for two phenomenal events that bring together leaders and friends committed to strengthening our democracy. **First** , join _Founding Forward_ and the _Union League_ for a special dinner on **Monday, October 6, 2025, at 6:00 PM** at _The Union League of Philadelphia_. The evening will highlight the important work of the **National Civics Bee** , a program that reflects the very values we champion at Founding Forward - civic engagement, leadership, and preparing the next generation to serve. These events are not just gatherings, they are opportunities to come together in a pivotal moment for our country, celebrate our shared values, and recommit ourselves to the work ahead.I would be honored to see you there. With gratitude,Patrick J. Murphy 32nd Undersecretary of the Army Former Congressman

name: Michigan COV
subject: They are terrified...
body:
this is critical for 2026

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e0fb49f4e234/breaking-news-citizens-only-voting-amendment-submitted-to-board-of-canvassers-8371106?e=ecf60db114)
---
[|
---](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=125bce7cf4&e=ecf60db114)
| | | | | [DONATE TODAY](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=026ce700e5&e=ecf60db114)
---
|
---
| | Friend,
You’ve probably seen the Left’s latest panic over our push to ensure that **only American citizens can vote in our elections.** Their outrage is loud, desperate, and telling.
Let’s be clear: if Democrats had confidence in their ideas, they wouldn’t be afraid of this commonsense safeguard. So why does the prospect of citizen-only voting scare them so much?
The truth is simple: **the Left thrives on weakening the integrity of our elections.** They are terrified of reforms that make our elections stronger, safer, and more accountable to the American people. Instead of welcoming transparency, they smear and attack anyone who demands it.
But we know the stakes. Our elections must be protected. Our voices must be protected. And the sacred right to vote must be reserved for **citizens of the United States — and no one else.**
This fight is bigger than one amendment or one ballot campaign. It’s about defending our democracy, our values, and our future as a free nation.
That’s why we need YOU. We need every patriot willing to stand up, speak out, and get involved. Whether it’s collecting signatures, volunteering, or spreading the word — now is the time to act.
[👉 Sign up to join the fight to protect citizen-only voting. Together, we will keep our elections free, fair, and secure.](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=9617d2372f&e=ecf60db114)
[👉 Donate to support the cause and help us spread the message.](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=e09959f975&e=ecf60db114)
This isn’t about left vs. right. It’s about right vs. wrong. And protecting the vote for American citizens only is the right thing to do.
Onward,
Americans for Citizen Only Voting
---
|
---
| | We are going to need our entire grassroots nation to get out and support this effort. Go to our website to sign up for updates, like and follow us on social media and help us spread the word. This issue will be critical to 2026 and we need you!

clean_body: this is critical for 2026 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend, You’ve probably seen the Left’s latest panic over our push to ensure that only American citizens can vote in our elections. Their outrage is loud, desperate, and telling. Let’s be clear: if Democrats had confidence in their ideas, they wouldn’t be afraid of this commonsense safeguard. So why does the prospect of citizen-only voting scare them so much? The truth is simple: the Left thrives on weakening the integrity of our elections. They are terrified of reforms that make our elections stronger, safer, and more accountable to the American people. Instead of welcoming transparency, they smear and attack anyone who demands it. But we know the stakes. Our elections must be protected. Our voices must be protected. And the sacred right to vote must be reserved for citizens of the United States — and no one else. This fight is bigger than one amendment or one ballot campaign. It’s about defending our democracy, our values, and our future as a free nation. That’s why we need YOU. We need every patriot willing to stand up, speak out, and get involved. Whether it’s collecting signatures, volunteering, or spreading the word — now is the time to act. This isn’t about left vs. right. It’s about right vs. wrong. And protecting the vote for American citizens only is the right thing to do. Onward, Americans for Citizen Only Voting | | | We are going to need our entire grassroots nation to get out and support this effort. Go to our website to sign up for updates, like and follow us on social media and help us spread the word. This issue will be critical to 2026 and we need you! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Americans for Citizen Voting Michigan. All rights reserved.

clean_body: Peter - I sent this message earlier. I don't know if you saw it, but I NEED you to read this as soon as you can!! -Winsome Read Winsome's message below ⬇️This was a hard message to send, Peter. But I'm going to be frank with you: we missed our FINAL End of Quarter Deadline Goal before Election Day. This is a BRUTAL blow since we were already so far behind in fundraising with my radical opponent. Now that you know where we stand, I'm presenting you with two options: You can sit on the sidelines and let my Democrat opponent and her liberal megadonors buy this election. If conservatives give up, Spanberger will run our our Commonwealth into the ground! counting on you right now, Peter. I need you to understand that we're not going to get another chance at this - if we fail to reach this Goal today, then we're flat out missed the mark. Please don't sit out this fight. I need every strong American conservative on my team right now. That includes you, especially! Thank you for your help, prayers, and support. -Winsome | . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Join Us at The Union League of Philadelphia
body:
Dear Friend, With America 250 and Election Day just weeks away...| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116543564/573786731/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDYyMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBlZGMzYmUtYmRhMC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JYFkQ3EGgz-LuANWPRdRnK0XPDgkvWvJ9D5_LN2NXW0=&emci=ab8dee69-bca0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=20edc3be-bda0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=10957263)
---
| | **_Join us on October 6th at the Union League of Philadelphia_**
---
| |
---
| | Peter, With**America 250** and Election Day just weeks away, I hope you'll consider joining me for two phenomenal events that bring together leaders and friends committed to strengthening our democracy. **First** , join _Founding Forward_ and the _Union League_ for a special dinner on **Monday, October 6, 2025, at 6:00 PM** at _The Union League of Philadelphia_. The evening will highlight the important work of the **National Civics Bee** , a program that reflects the very values we champion at Founding Forward - civic engagement, leadership, and preparing the next generation to serve. These events are not just gatherings, they are opportunities to come together in a pivotal moment for our country, celebrate our shared values, and recommit ourselves to the work ahead.I would be honored to see you there. With gratitude,Patrick J. Murphy 32nd Undersecretary of the Army Former Congressman
---
| |
---

name: Deb Haaland HQ
subject: three reasons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Let us explain.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4837%2E400544%2EUciZ_U)
It's crunch time:
Our final fundraising deadline of 2025 is coming up in just three days, and **_this one really matters:_**
1️⃣ **Donald Trump only lost New Mexico by 6 points in 2024.** That was after Republican dark money groups spent millions trying to flip our state. They got dangerously close.
2️⃣ **Those same bad groups are watching our campaign right now.** They’re already recruiting a millionaire who can self-fund his own campaign. _They’re watching our fundraising for any sign of weakness. We cannot let them think we are vulnerable._
3️⃣ **We set a goal to raise $250,000 before October 6 at midnight.** If we hit that target, we’ll send a powerful message that this grassroots team is energized, organized, and ready to win.
**[So, what do you say? Can we count on you to pitch in $5 to help us from falling short and ensure we have the resources to build the campaign we need to win? It’s our LAST public fundraising deadline of 2025 — so please don’t wait.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251003_3_three?amount=5&refcode=em20251003-4837&refcode2=4837_400544_UciZ_U&akid=4837%2E400544%2EUciZ_U)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251003_3_three?amount=5&refcode=em20251003-4837&refcode2=4837_400544_UciZ_U&akid=4837%2E400544%2EUciZ_U)**
We can't thank you enough for your support.
— Deb Haaland HQ
P.S. We know the Republican shutdown is impacting tens of thousands of New Mexicans and folks across the country. If you’re not able to donate today, we completely understand. We appreciate your support!
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251003-3&t=2&refcode2=4837_400544_UciZ_U&akid=4837%2E400544%2EUciZ_U)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=4837%2E400544%2EUciZ_U)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=4837%2E400544%2EUciZ_U)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: re: Troops in Portland
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Donald Trump just took another page out of his authoritarian handbook...

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116543797/573796373/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWFlMjhhMi1kMGEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mMGNGsImD501OWKErl2GvyFpiQ4W1J8rOhwCkEoi5g=) I had to reach out. Earlier this week, Donald Trump and Republicans SHUTDOWN the government — after failing to agree on a funding bill that would put Americans first, and not their tax dollars. Now, as Americans are weathering Republicans’ shutdown, **Donald Trump took a page out of his authoritarian handbook and sent troops to the streets of Portland. ** _**Oregonians did not ask for this. **_ It’s an abuse of power. It's un-American. And I won’t stand for it. **[So tonight, I’m calling on supporters NATIONWIDE – _from Salem, to Newberg, to Washington D.C._ – to step up and prove that we’re UNITED against Trump and have the momentum to fight back against his MAGA Majority. Trump and Republicans think they can get away with attacking our cities, and undermining our democracy. We will not let that happen. Sign onto my petition calling on the federal government to relinquish control of the Oregon National Guard NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116543798/573796374/1951919174?refcode=email_100325_troops&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWFlMjhhMi1kMGEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mMGNGsImD501OWKErl2GvyFpiQ4W1J8rOhwCkEoi5g=&emci=5f2b75b6-77a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=deae28a2-d0a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5643047)** | | **[SIGN ON →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116543799/573796375/1951919174?refcode=email_100325_troops&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWFlMjhhMi1kMGEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mMGNGsImD501OWKErl2GvyFpiQ4W1J8rOhwCkEoi5g=&emci=5f2b75b6-77a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=deae28a2-d0a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5643047)**
---
Let’s be clear about what’s going on:
Donald Trump and his MAGA Majority cut _**BILLIONS**_ of dollars from health care.
Then, Republicans pushed the federal government into a **FULL** shutdown — which could leave thousands of Americans without healthcare or jobs.
As we speak, folks in Oregon and across the country are already feeling the devastating impacts of the massive spending cuts in the Republican budget.
But instead of sending resources to help improve the lives of Americans, Donald Trump insists on abusing his power and sending troops into Portland.
We will not let them get away with any of this.
**I’m doing everything in my power to oppose Trump’s massive federal overreach and defend Oregon families from these attacks — _and I need you on board._**
**[I’m asking you to join me in this fight, and show Trump and the Republican party that we’re UNITED to fight back against their attacks on our democracy. Will you show your support by signing onto our petition right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116543800/573796376/1951919174?refcode=email_100325_troops&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWFlMjhhMi1kMGEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mMGNGsImD501OWKErl2GvyFpiQ4W1J8rOhwCkEoi5g=&emci=5f2b75b6-77a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=deae28a2-d0a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5643047)**
| **[SIGN ON →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116543801/573796377/1951919174?refcode=email_100325_troops&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWFlMjhhMi1kMGEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mMGNGsImD501OWKErl2GvyFpiQ4W1J8rOhwCkEoi5g=&emci=5f2b75b6-77a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=deae28a2-d0a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5643047)**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Be a part of history
body:
You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3fahspedjiptnbefndrd7vr6hvl0sip0916tjfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4o32cth2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq57rqdch8lc7ebccubb32k803n818ptmq6qg9s0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4o32cth2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8dalsh6lmti1obrajqai7qkubhftjo7997jk200_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4o32cth2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhamtkjvf6705bqckt168aoc83vquse374ehbc3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4o32cth2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2mgqopmtcjmdqun0co6c5in4nm73ith2engit7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4o32cth2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znpq8sptt4gh8q0bm3mkcmvg7orttafks6q2rs4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4o32cth2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcm5ee8po6289o2271bj30u41cn9a6gheecekhbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4o32cth2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztm9tkf8kn8pgohu3ipt5qqqdcu5dfpeorio1puo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4o32cth2bs)

The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg6bkp7i8jkubmm9kab4g9pa5c4sd9v75nttnapo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4o32cth2bs) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Be a part of history
body:
You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zicurakf2p7gtf3af1ar8tdb9blbhb9inrk3ajh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4p72clh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjg9lult1fqjemll818tbh6il2kdj3eqhu6q6d3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4p72clh2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zn7gqkia5ddfftrrnck0p6bff1kshnspqc8gmeqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4p72clh2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2gio8ohbdg01bpva7vdmient1786q38303e07h0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4p72clh2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zldacaugj3ht7qqol32n4kiv971nmhes08flssg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4p72clh2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zma1krql61e7ed8j0t4tbsv623q3ff4i02la7n00_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4p72clh2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlttkqe0miun1trm685kmu6op2a29kn8hdgvjo78_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4p72clh2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zodb00odk9hjlhp5stk1o9np5ld5taplbg1ua42o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4p72clh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkcg8cgj8fkhm43s7c61c2eafo8tgmssoae7qtco_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4p72clh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbtu762gekfesbc7eaj5cc3i1nbt5qpqudnrkung_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sljm4p72clh2bs) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

[Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-yd/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot,The 2026 election is heating up in Wisconsin as we prepare to elect a new Governor and State Supreme Court Justice. Together, we will bring victories to Republicans up and down the ballot!Just last week, we launched a microsite exposing Chris Taylor's radical policies. Make sure to check out [ChrisTaylorforWI.com](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-y/) and join us in sharing Taylor's progressive views!-Team WisGOP **Wisconsin's Republican Legislators Continue to Deliver Wins For Our State** Republican Legislators were able to deliver in a number of key areas for the State's 2025-2027 Budget. Thanks to their efforts, we have been able to rein in spending while defending Wisconsin values. The budget amendments pushed by Republicans reflect their commitment to fiscal responsibility and finding common sense solutions to ensure that government is able to work effectively for Wisconsinites. **Reining in Spending **
* Blocked $3.7 billion in proposed tax hikes, instead providing $1.5 billion in tax cuts for Wisconsinites over the next two years
* Eliminated 300 vacant government jobs, resulting in 1,200 fewer jobs than Gov. Evers had proposed
* Continued the hiring freeze at UW while creating requirements ensuring that faculty spend more time teaching in the classroom

**Defending Wisconsin Values**
* Prevented welfare expansion and kept drug-testing and work requirements for public assistance
* Blocked attacks on our Second Amendment rights
* Protected school choice and increased funds for districts providing education to students under Open Enrollment

In addition to these wins in the State Budget, Republicans in the State Legislature continue to work for Wisconsinites with proposed bills aimed at improving housing affordability and protecting free speech on college campuses. **Housing Affordability** Republicans in the State Assembly have recently introduced [Assembly Bill 454](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-j/) to create a Workforce Home Loan Program within the Wisconsin Housing and Economic Development Authority (WHEDA). This program would help first-time homebuyers to access up to $60,000 for a home loan at 0% interest, decreasing barriers to home ownership. The program would be funded by a section of the 2023 state budget that had appropriated funds for affordable housing. Rep. Jessie Rodriguez (R-Oak Creek) says that the bill will "help hardworking Wisconsinites who are striving to put down roots, raise families, and contribute to our local communities." **Free Speech Protections on College Campuses** Wisconsin Republicans have reintroduced a bill aimed at protecting free speech across our state's college campuses. The bill would go beyond current protections and allow students to sue UW System schools if their freedom of speech is violated. Rep. Amanda Nedweski (R-Pleasant Prairie) pointed out that, "With the recent assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk, we're hearing a lot more, particularly from college-age students, about the lack of viewpoint diversity on campuses." A [UW System survey](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-t/) in 2023 showed that more than two-thirds of Republican students have avoided expressing their views in the classroom. Most of those students did so either because they feared an instructor would lower their grade or dismiss their views as offensive. **Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). [BECOME A LTE SIGNER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-i/) **Become a Poll Worker!**
Every two years, the Republican Party of Wisconsin submits poll workers to municipalities across the state. These 2 year appointments will be critical to keeping the 2026 elections safe and secure. Learn more about being a poll worker by signing up for a training below! [BECOME A POLL WORKER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-d/)
# **In Case You Missed It**
[**ICYMI: Bice: Liberal Supreme Court Candidate Chris Taylor Ditches Her Own Recusal Plan**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-h/) In case you missed it, the [_Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-k/) exposed far-left Chris Taylor in a blatant display of political opportunism. Once an advocate for judicial integrity, Taylor has now abandoned her own principles, flip-flopping on a recusal policy she championed as a state legislator.**[Wisconsin GOP Launches ChrisTaylorForWI.com to Expose Radical Progressive Chris Taylor's Extreme Agenda](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-u/) **Today, the Republican Party of Wisconsin launched [ChrisTaylorForWI.com](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-o/) to highlight Chris Taylor's radical policies and inconsistent record. The site highlights her far-left record as one of the most liberal state legislators, her backtracking on policies, and her unfitness for the Wisconsin Supreme Court.[**DEMOCRATS ' SHUTDOWN HOUSE OF HORRORS: A NIGHTMARE UNLEASHED ON WISCONSIN VETERANS, FAMILIES, AND SMALL BUSINESSES**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-b/)
As October creeps in, Wisconsin Republicans are sounding the alarm on the Democrats' reckless government shutdown - a true House of Horrors that's haunting hardworking Americans and Wisconsinites alike. This partisan nightmare, orchestrated by extreme Democrats in Washington, is jeopardizing vital lifelines for our heroes, families, and communities, turning the American Dream into a ghostly apparition.
# **Worth the Read**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-n/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-a/)
# **Top Shareable Content**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-f/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-z/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-v/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-e/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-g/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-w/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-yh/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-qhlhkkd-didthutlhu-yk/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-qhlhkkd-l-yu)

# Map Rigging: A Racist Power Grab
---
---
Did you know that **roughly 61% of Black Hoosiers and over 41% of Hispanic Hoosiers reside in either Marion or Lake counties?**

These voices will be the most diluted under any map that further gerrymanders our congressional districts--that is unacceptable.

We won't stand by while decades of voting rights advocacy are under attack from a racist power grab.

**Keep calling. Keep emailing. Keep showing up. We 're in this together. **
* * *
---
## Government Shutdown: What It Means for Indiana
As of this past Wednesday, the federal government has officially shut down. While some services will continue uninterrupted, here's a quick guide to what Hoosiers can expect in the short term:
### ✅ Services That Will Continue
* Social Security payments
* Military operations
* Mail delivery
* Air travel and air traffic control
* Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE)

### ⚠️ What Might Be Affected
* Federal offices may experience delays -- in-person services like passport processing or getting help by phone may be slower or limited.
* National parks may be open, but gift shops, visitor centers and staffed operations could be closed.
* Document processing times (passports, visas, permits) may increase due to limited staffing.
* Federal civilian employees in Indiana (more than 24,000 people) may face delayed paychecks.
* Food aid programs like SNAP and WIC are funded for now, but long-term operations could be disrupted if the shutdown continues.
* Food banks supported by federal programs like The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP) may face uncertainty if USDA operations are paused.

### ⏳ Longer Shutdown = Greater Impact
Essential agencies may see staffing shortages and program slowdowns over time. This update is provided as a public service to help Hoosiers stay informed. We'll continue monitoring the situation and provide updates as needed.
* * *
---
# **Updates From Interim Committees**
---
|
---

**Fall means Interim Study Committees. **

I have the privilege of representing District 46 on 14 different committees, boards and commissions.

As we approach our next legislative session, these groups have been meeting more frequently as legislators from both chambers work alongside area experts to inform potential future legislation.

Two of these that have met recently are the **[Interim Study Committee on Pension Management Oversight](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=f6a3941cc80857127f4ee2589f542a961b63ad99189aed83cd7b0463aba162deba822d0c8d5c48ea7d88e451ca4a8cf56ee19a18a22120d9 "Interim Study Committee on Pension Management Oversight") **and the **[Interim Study Committee on Energy, Utilities and Telecommunications](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=f6a3941cc808571238b1c2ec04e5ccc38cfdfec248d83113abc8b1c198bc3d76becf0771e8f64d5603daf05634535df251df516757b2336f "Interim Study Committee on Energy, Utilities and Telecommunications")**.

During the **[Interim Study Committee on Pension Management Oversight](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=f6a3941cc80857127f4ee2589f542a961b63ad99189aed83cd7b0463aba162deba822d0c8d5c48ea7d88e451ca4a8cf56ee19a18a22120d9 "Interim Study Committee on Pension Management Oversight")** meeting, we received important updates on our state's pension plans.

Our first responders, teachers and state employees rely on our pension programs, and I am committed to ensuring there is proper oversight so that our public servants are taken care of.

In the **[Interim Study Committee on Energy, Utilities and Telecommunications](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=f6a3941cc808571238b1c2ec04e5ccc38cfdfec248d83113abc8b1c198bc3d76becf0771e8f64d5603daf05634535df251df516757b2336f "Interim Study Committee on Energy, Utilities and Telecommunications"), **we heard from the Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission (IURC), the State Utility Forecasting Group (SUFG), the Office of Utility Consumer Counselor (OUCC), and the Office of Community and Rural Affairs (OCRA).

Two topics that especially stood out in this meeting were updates from our broadband equity program and long-term forecasting of the health of our state's grid.

When fully implemented, the $868 million Indiana received from the [Broadband Equity, Access, and Deployment (BEAD) Program](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=f6a3941cc808571210dae245b2bca869c0b297ab6adca0ac36c9c50343db818b0e0eacd4f4fb56919af66c4fc630a17d4bacec0396ff50fe) will ensure that every Hoosier has access to reliable internet.

When it comes to the health of our state's grid, it is critical to prioritize long-term stability and ratepayer protection.

When it comes to large-scale projects like small modular reactors or data centers, we cannot settle for anything less than transparency, accountability, and major companies committing to be good stewards and good neighbors.

Most importantly, our residential ratepayers cannot bear the financial burden of developing new technologies or subsidizing community-altering projects.
---
### **Full List of Interim Committee Assignments**
---
|
---
* * *
---
|
---
### Did you know October is Country Music Month?
This is a unique opportunity to recognize this truly American genre of music that has deep roots in our country's artistic landscape.

One of the things that makes country music so special, and so American, is its truly diverse origin. It is a genre that itself is a melting pot, forged by people from different backgrounds, but shared experiences and a common goal.

From DeFord Bailey to Beyonce, Black Americans have long contributed to this special genre as a way to tell our story and celebrate our identity.

And, it has been special to see Black and Brown people's role in this genre celebrated over the past few years in a way that it hasn't before.

Music connects us in times when it is easy to feel disconnected-- this genre reminds us of the stories, challenges and perseverance of people from every background in pursuit of the promise of the American dream.
---
#
* * *
# Celebrating 25 Years of Latino Ministry at Christ Church Cathedral
---
|
---
**Throughout all of 2025, Christ Church Cathedral (CCC) has been celebrating 25 years of its Latino Ministry. **

The inception of this ministry came from members of the parish coming back from mission trips to South America and recognizing an opportunity right here in Indianapolis.

I am proud of CCC for its continued contributions to our community, and I was glad for the opportunity to celebrate this exciting milestone for our parish.
* * *
---
* * *
# **Washington, D.C. Leadership Exchange**
---
---
I am so thankful for the opportunity to join fellow legislators in Washington, D.C., to share updates on what Indiana is doing in the realm of healthcare as a legislature.

I was excited to talk about policies I have advocated for in our state, policies I would like to see in the future and hear from other states about how they are navigating the moment.

We know we are in a health care crisis. Whether it is the health of our moms and babies, affordability, access, or managing medical debt, we are at a critical point in our state.

I will always advocate for policies that empower Hoosier families to receive the care they need when they need it.
* * *

---
|
---
## October 11 is Period Action Day

Did you know that in the United States, one in four students struggles to afford period products?

This advocacy day is centered around ending period poverty and stigma.

**Visit** **[periodactionday.com](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=f6a3941cc808571200b0804bdd5ad67da42b580b61bc74cb2aaa1ffa6a13c8fe0978f43271c98db84d505635140646d193024750abc3847f "periodactionday.com") to learn more.**
---

During the "Interim Study Committee on Pension Management Oversight" meeting, we received important updates on our state's pension plans. Our first responders, teachers and state employees rely on our pension programs, and I am committed to ensuring there is proper oversight so that our public servants are taken care of. In the "Interim Study Committee on Energy, Utilities and Telecommunications", we heard from the Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission (IURC), the State Utility Forecasting Group (SUFG), the Office of Utility Consumer Counselor (OUCC), and the Office of Community and Rural Affairs (OCRA). Two topics that especially stood out in this meeting were updates from our broadband equity program and long-term forecasting of the health of our state's grid. When fully implemented, the $868 million Indiana received from the will ensure that every Hoosier has access to reliable internet. When it comes to the health of our state's grid, it is critical to prioritize long-term stability and ratepayer protection. When it comes to large-scale projects like small modular reactors or data centers, we cannot settle for anything less than transparency, accountability, and major companies committing to be good stewards and good neighbors. Most importantly, our residential ratepayers cannot bear the financial burden of developing new technologies or subsidizing community-altering projects. Full List of Interim Committee Assignments | | Did you know October is Country Music Month? This is a unique opportunity to recognize this truly American genre of music that has deep roots in our country's artistic landscape. One of the things that makes country music so special, and so American, is its truly diverse origin. It is a genre that itself is a melting pot, forged by people from different backgrounds, but shared experiences and a common goal. From DeFord Bailey to Beyonce, Black Americans have long contributed to this special genre as a way to tell our story and celebrate our identity. And, it has been special to see Black and Brown people's role in this genre celebrated over the past few years in a way that it hasn't before. Music connects us in times when it is easy to feel disconnected-- this genre reminds us of the stories, challenges and perseverance of people from every background in pursuit of the promise of the American dream. Celebrating 25 Years of Latino Ministry at Christ Church Cathedral | Throughout all of 2025, Christ Church Cathedral (CCC) has been celebrating 25 years of its Latino Ministry. The inception of this ministry came from members of the parish coming back from mission trips to South America and recognizing an opportunity right here in Indianapolis. I am proud of CCC for its continued contributions to our community, and I was glad for the opportunity to celebrate this exciting milestone for our parish. Washington, D.C. Leadership Exchange I am so thankful for the opportunity to join fellow legislators in Washington, D.C., to share updates on what Indiana is doing in the realm of healthcare as a legislature. I was excited to talk about policies I have advocated for in our state, policies I would like to see in the future and hear from other states about how they are navigating the moment. We know we are in a health care crisis. Whether it is the health of our moms and babies, affordability, access, or managing medical debt, we are at a critical point in our state. I will always advocate for policies that empower Hoosier families to receive the care they need when they need it. | October 11 is Period Action Day Did you know that in the United States, one in four students struggles to afford period products? This advocacy day is centered around ending period poverty and stigma. Visit "periodactionday.com" to learn more. | | | News Around Our State | | | "$" "" "$" "$" "$" COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my community resources guide, "click here. " | | | | | | | | | Created and distributed by the Indiana Senate Democratic Communications office mailto:Nancy.Singh@iga.in.gov mailto:Chester.Bryant@iga.in.gov mailto:Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov ---|---|--- | This email was sent by: Indiana General Assembly** 200 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN, 46204, US

name: The Turning Point Action Family
subject: All of us will miss Charlie None of us will ever forget him
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life...

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z65ipeb1s4hdm4odi1gtde18vf6pagv8i7dgdqu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slge0p36chh2bs)
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk didn't just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end -- _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Friend, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind -- _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything ... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjmpr4iphukgv6dco3k1dpl3um8hpbjcp1ve7bdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slge0p36chh2bs)

# Saturday, October 4, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1927, [sculpting began on Mount Rushmore](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9u6yAUgPGnwVss_tmEgeHeRm6XRN0yWgc4DrTYWIYk8ttX6St0-Nbf8F3P4xliisvtAjOaOuVxwWdJWCtuY4AZSsilwg09QnKwRWsRlpFT3h0YPVA5eohpH2XjzYTIUTRomOp0pzjXsgkG3CSU7o5agWNH0fdOKK2tpIgU5ESbaF4ao1S-6kQrteyZY8pzyfRRIJEUfax5a79yXGrAKe35gVvr8twkE2pdCxH_CB8IH_Z8r_fWIuHD28f5dFq_Gf-fiRhKJOL0fnVitZ-FPZVNAS_NZvz6jCnF0isi6W2GmH7d-qcZD8N_AgAA___dE3Bs) in South Dakota's Black Hills National Forest, taking 14 years to complete the granite images of four of America's most revered presidents--George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, Abraham Lincoln, and Theodore Roosevelt.****

If you grew up watching TV, you'd think the world was riddled with quicksand. In the real world, that turns out not to be true--except perhaps in Maine, where a duck hunter stepped into mud and just kept sinking, right up to his waist. [Read our _Et Cetera_ item](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O5CAUhE-DMyx4xj8EBCutnPUmq9WG1jM820xj0wO4W337kecKE1RQKqlU9f2_TTf0wR_rH9zJlCVOB71yoFIoTRvumLeYC67kCIPF5OeZ8JhAQMul4EJNDn14T6pyZiECaioysm912wNoVW3GatBa9rIjNVMncVga0ASzlD32A4rKm6tNCqEutU2ttOqklb0DJfXQEFOCnC8x1R_RH2WjJbzjk1Jt414Fs5XyyKz5xWBkMOJsrwf1Gq-YwfjvL4NxR38Q386jUOKJsj3JcVwul8tp7_zz9Pae8XB8Px1_oc-FwZhLTG_WjN6x5reETnZaD0OVjHu8fAg-dz1TYt3Rh-8x5UcEnwa-AgAA__-fmIOU) below about the ensuing police rescue.

If you've ever wished you could invest early in the next big energy breakthrough, today's sponsor [EnergyX's](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdCD_Ai5cRLra7qZNac3FszCRbZBtdrNvH7GJ8gIppjnn08zo-_HpP4Ei5fU7JHTtvvuMzxqxNSx-gwR122uDFQNCXKDQ1xdC9pJL0wvec-0DUHx53QV3R5SoOnRiMtZMUlrdbc5agFFNBo0IYVF80eMMyoQRLZdmgo7ctU1wrq8xatBWj2IRU5Ba2Fkh0xwDtb0MP3fKbcN7fO0PLMOypy66rbWjMvWNyRuTN8oPrG3AjGV9_bqQK1e3syVf97MsyNQHJqDI5HiFCQOdiamPAyj0B5SWsdSNjr_9AukAWvOb-FeKmffKKP_HwZmpgVdqVGIS2pq5Ky4cT4qR6jgxzdfr4Pvf9l-SH07-DgAA__-uHo9r) billion-dollar lithium tech unicorn is opening the door for everyday investors like you.

## Hamas Ready to Free All Hostages
Hamas signaled its readiness to [release all Israeli hostages](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFutDAQhJ8GOiPbGAyFi7-hu79NiRZ2AUcLRrZz6PL0Eae8QYppZqTRfPPxGB_g2R_rf9jJ5SWMB12JKWeK4wY7pC2kDCshAc8Q_TQRHKOWuhFKCmlGBM-v0ZToFiJNdUlO2aZvrNa9KTc3dYSgsLMKGrB2NogWbCsX1TcLYVd6d7cpKc2tpq5Mb1o1K4vaqL6rqTCS0OcQq8_gj7zRwq_wpFjNYS_ZbTmfqaj_FXoo9HBdV3VM801x57cTImOhh90jMgmClAs9vNlEglcSsEaiJCIxQSLhUwRiL37BkzghZpHj134mscI3iJNgJnEyHCLOB-jatLUuo8Pz8sw-tbYwct3B83ti_tOvT6d_AgAA__-agY5y), alive or dead, and said it would be willing to negotiate through mediators on the rest of President Trump's peace plan for the Middle East. In response, Trump told Israel [to stop bombing Gaza](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSoCAQRU-DGRY0KBoQbEI2m25otdIqWygWMGO5p99yrjBBZ6_6__f_fEwfGGI4t994kK1rmk66S6RaKU87Hlj2VCpu5AnjgjnMM-E5gYCOS8GFnjyG-Ey68XYlAlINWWm6sTMAo252q0cQpIQe1n7VvZa9NDCDJBJqnAdjmmDfb1II_V6nWj3qXi7SeNByHBQxLciHmnL7N4Wz7rTGJ31Rbpd0NNHutV6FqV8MHAN333f7WbAmj88LMHClpvwwcK_ZS6QcPQP3pjJwUjBwQjFwoWSkyL-t-Yb_kN97qMT39FmIX4QL8SviycANvVZKjkYIw8A12frrDjGG0humxXZgiN_t6o8m_bLwPwAA__84X4Xg) while negotiations are underway. The terrorist group's response came hours after Trump threatened to hunt down and kill Hamas members and set a deadline of Sunday, Oct. 5, to agree to his proposal.

It's not clear yet what role Hamas has agreed to [play in the governance of Gaza.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGurCAYhJ8GOwz8wqoFxW3s9ra3NL_wq9ygEOCs2fP0J-4rnGKSSSaZyTf_nvMTffDn9hcPMnWN80lXCVQr5XnHA8seS8WNHGGwmP2yEJ4zCNBcCi7U7NCH96waZ1YioK4hI3s96h5gVM1uhJC9XUkIKwWR1tBpUsMgcRjHXuPSeHO3SSHULd21alQPaWXvQMlx6IgpQc7XmNv_0Z91pzW844tya-PRBLPXmgrr_jCYGEzXdbV2KTfFnTOYbstg-sBw3DKR4zXyhLkWHle-4TfyRGiJpxxTLBh4zV9H4r5kpMBgarJx6fIh-PLomRLbgT585uuvPnsZ-AkAAP__RDGAlQ) Trump's 20-point peace plans called for the group to hand over administration of the territory to an independent Palestinian body.
## Chevron Refinery Erupts in Huge Blast
A massive fire [erupted at a Chevron oil refinery](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGS2yAURb8Gdc8DT2AvBUUauk2bUoPFw3oJBg1gb_T3GeUXtrjVnTlz7_n1uXwGzlweP8OT3Eh1KfTVM41BbdnCM_St9hEeFCnkNTS-3ymUBSUaUBKkXmLgfCx6ii4RIc0TOXUz1twQrZ42Z2aJlmy8K2t0MDp9zOqqtDTWGn1d1cTupCkp9RkzX7TVV7WqW0St7MdMQkuKPGq7_K5cxkYpH_VN7bLW55TdNsbexfxDoBfoy7HXPs5KoD_BAr2SAr2cBfpXh_OfQL-GzKm2wgHWjd6tFqicoVHiQu2AxI3g3ij86VBfA7gAZej0eJVYIQdo1DlSGR0SUQb6u-fauRaBfmou7l-cM_frTWj5eAbO_9eObyl-O_wXAAD___6Ljvw) in El Segundo, outside Los Angeles, forcing residents to shelter in place following multiple reports of an explosion. _“I thought we got nuked or something,”_ Mark Rogers told the _Los Angeles Times_ , saying his adult soccer league match in Redondo Beach was canceled because of the heavy smoke coming from the blaze roughly 6 miles away. The refinery supplies an [estimated one-fifth of the motor fuel ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAQRL8GMlHSSFgQKLjEmS-9kBqjEcxZIEpSmfXfb7G_sEFnXd313r_H9ECOvC9_cSNXQ5p2OkukWilPK25Y1lQqLuQJ44yZn0_CfQIJvVBSSDN55PiZTOtdIALSLTll-7G3AKNpV2c0GR0MzHokNepgLdGgdABt1BOUb9lda0pKc6XXnRnNTc3KejBqHDQ1RpLnmnL3P_FeVwrxk96UuzltbXRrrUdp9J8G7g3cz_PsLoST6HUVGrjPGDmkvDOKBYs4Ms9URDn4RYK-jpgKp10EziSUHKC3MLTZ-ePkGLncbGPksiHHn7_6K0lvB98BAAD__8FDepI)used by Southern Californians, and energy experts say gas prices could now rise from 35 to 90 cents per gallon. California already has the highest gas prices in the nation, averaging $4.64 a gallon. LA County Supervisor Holly Mitchell said crews [contained the fire to one area of the refinery](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZEZ2Y2AIHFxCNpdeiBq7DT4Ze2R7BvH3K1b7Bxt08rpUqqp_z-WJPvi4_cWDdHVpiXSWQLVSXnY8sOypVNzIEgaD2a8rYVxAQM-l4EItFn24FtVY7YiAuoa0HPupHwEm1ewazLo6ZWnEfhACjephfFjZDZ0B52BqvL7dpBDqvr5r1aQGaeRoQcnp0RFTgqyvKbf_k491Jxeu9KHcmnQ0Qe-1vgrr_jCYGcznebZmLXeL-89gDqlg3ChQYTDf_GaYN-LOZ-KU369aOFYeUuE_Sm7SO9aLZ3I-Ur4YzE3W9nX6EHwZRqbEdqAP3xHqr3b7aPgKAAD__wuugtI), and no injuries were reported. She advised residents to stay inside and visitors to stay away from El Segundo for the time being.
## _Free Press's_ Bari Weiss to Oversee CBS News
Paramount Skydance is expected to name media entrepreneur Bari Weiss, founder of center-right news site The Free Press, as [the editor-in-chief at CBS News](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uxCAQhJ8Gd5zMgs92QZHG3aVNaS2wnDfCPwJyp8vTR04eIcUWOyN9mpmP23xDTrzd33ElW-M-b_QsiWqlPC-4Yln2UvFOgTB5zOwc4TZDC51UrWzNHJDTazZNsJEISDdkVd-NXQ8wmmaxMKjgRjB-iDF0ZtTa69H1g4sYvXamYXvSVNua8zp9MaO5Kq_6AEaNgyZhWgpc93z53HmrC8X02h-UL35fm2SXWo8i9JuAScD0wMxUX6cnYDrJAibH3wKms9n5YGb5JC5Felfkqco_vuRN-oUpygMzrvvXVmXMRPLIVIpUoK-d7vtOCZiabMPx5JS4XHth2vuKnH4T1X_N-LDwEwAA__9UeYUE) as part of a $150 million acquisition of her media site. The move represents a major shift in CBS News’ decades-old management structure. Weiss would report directly to Paramount Skydance chief executive David Ellison as [she helps set the editorial direction ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAURL8Gd6zgAs_rgiIN3aZNaV3D9ZoEgwXsrvz3kZNPeMVUI50ZnV-P-YExxfz8iTvZvpY506cl6p3qvOGObSut45MCYfJY47IQ5hkEGC4FF3oOGNM56yHYlQhIDWTlaCYzAkx62KzGScrVoDJaeT1pcw9GAYAnvZDScoj2okkh9BWjbnrSX9LLMYCW010R04JC7KXefpeY-0ZrOsub6s2XfUh26_1oTP1g4Bi4fB6l9ati4C4wAycFAyeAgdspRGTgDqy4l1fuvP05A2ZPvBeecSe-YI38Q7E1_n-Vx8z9FmnlZeV-afwyxFt5VU-NgRuqDccnphTb18i0eO4Y079v_VtC3xb-BgAA__9byYg4)at the TV network’s third-place news division.

Since the Skydance purchase of CBS owner Paramount, Ellison has articulated a plan that calls for CBS News to work harder to reach center-left and center-right viewers.

Weiss resigned from the New York Times in 2020 after three years as an opinion writer, [citing a bullying culture and lack of ideological diversity](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uxCAUBODT4I4VPONlXVCkcbdpU1pgnu2X8LMCtJZvHzlXSDHVJ41G8_Wcn5YCpe3TRjRtzXPCowZsDcu822jrnmuzG3q0YbGFnEObZhAwcCm4ULO3FM5Zdd6siIB9h0bqYRw0wKi63SygVi90b9cRde-1c4OWTmr30IPyWnRkrjYphLoy9Dc1qrtcpPag5PjokSmBnlout-9Mqe24hjO_sdyWHLtg9tZelfUfDCYGUzpfubaLGEwgQDCYhGYwScVgcrYQP5Bq5QUrbanyteTIEx78zOWHN4pY-UKN0sYpBHJYbOCY3lRyipgag6krxr-OS-tdMyW2aCn8rWn_uvBt4DcAAP__IzOEoQ) at the paper. News of her anticipated move to CBS sparked widespread criticism from liberal opinion writers.

Democrats' 5-2 majority on the state supreme court is responsible for preventing the GOP's darkest ambitions from ever becoming real: extreme abortion bans, rolling back voting rights, and allowing Trump to steal the presidential election in 2020.

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Blocked Tax Hikes, Blue Origin Astronauts, and Dire Wolves' Birthday
body:
Attorney General Ken Paxton has demanded that four Texas cities—Odessa, La Marque, Tom Bean, and Whitesboro—stop their [planned tax hikes](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GOyaAoFJQbGP3b7ulAbkqGQQX7szo22-cV9jmNCfn5Mv352f6sSGGtP62Oxg8lzwl-NQIiFAmF_P8BI_23MITqosvyCWsIU2CCUU5o0xO3oZ4TbLxxjGveQOG90qrXnXD0GxmcNrDzIWUzCm9gOqWTrbWd3cyp5tg7jPOmOSccSEfixs6NXsNii-D6FoiGfiAuTxwA4TT1iVe-Q3lMee9iWZDPCppfxExEjFaN_P2bogYj1yRiPG7oRYxlwQXXSFBsZE-IdHDnpgT9bDb5CutmA8aLd1t-fuCSo-SDyh4UbQnvR0QMfJeC63kQMTYFOOPT4gx1K4nkq27DfFLhf_n8m3EvwAAAP__J-KJsg) and has launched an investigation into whether the increases break new state laws.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGurCAURb8GOwwgqBQUr7Gb197SIBz0ZBiZADOOf38z_sJtd1b2StbPbb5ZjLiv_-0DTP2ENO9wlAi1Qp6XmNwdfLWfDe9QlviClHHFfRZMKMoZZXL2FuM5y8abhXnNGzB8UFoNqh_HZjOd6CBooZegOxV6psOoley9BDe6wekGzfeMMyY5Z1zINixjr5zXoHgYRd8RycBjTbmtG1T42BLimd6QW5ceTTRbrc9Cun9ETERMx3G0EVbrzhQu-EsRMT1z8i9XiZiulaad1g0L9fakBVzaPf1aMO1NNv55YIxY-oFItj4sxstV_1bobcRvAAAA__9j4nyR) | |
# Saturday, October 4, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1898, doctors in Laredo diagnosed the first case of smallpox in what would become a [local epidemic](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0EFygyAUgOHT4E4HCBizYNGNu3TbpfOEp77JEzJAo7l9p71CL_D_M9_XfboDMcX1E3Z09VzSFPEojLVinmZO_oGhwrnRA8vM35gyrRQnLbVtlWylmQIQvyfTBDfLcFMNOnW1N3u1_TA0m9M9KOn1EtD0F-P9YK0BiaC0BzRmbsj9xpSURimptOmWeeitDze0ahl0fxFGYqCaclc3rHhCWfidXpg7n_aG3Vbrs4jLh9Cj0ONxHF0tG6TIFLFLeRV63CCGOaWH0CPGmgmL0CNDxpDasgPzM51tplSb7MLzIGYq_VUYue5A_Pep_9N5Of0TAAD__6sce0k) of more than 100 cases. In the following months, state officials and the Texas Rangers quarantined and forcibly vaccinated residents, leading to a deadly riot that was quelled by federal troops. We mistakenly reported the wrong date for when University of North Texas classes will be canceled in the lead-up to the home game against the University of South Florida. Classes will be canceled _next_ Friday, Oct. 10. We apologize for the error! If you’re proud to call Texas home, imagine flipping open a book each day to discover the legendary moments that shaped the Lone Star State—now you can with today's sponsor, the [Texas State Historical Association and their book _Texas on This Day: Second Edition_.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGurCAURb8GOwwgqBQUr7Gb197SIBz0ZBiZADOOf38z_sJtd1b2StbPbb5ZjLiv_-0DTP2ENO9wlAi1Qp6XmNwdfLWfDe9QlviClHHFfRZMKMoZZXL2FuM5y8abhXnNGzB8UFoNqh_HZjOd6CBooZegOxV6psOoley9BDe6wekGzfeMMyY5Z1zINixjr5zXoHgYRd8RycBjTbmtG1T42BLimd6QW5ceTTRbrc9Cun9ETERMx3G0EVbrzhQu-EsRMT1z8i9XiZiulaad1g0L9fakBVzaPf1aMO1NNv55YIxY-oFItj4sxstV_1bobcRvAAAA__9j4nyR)

## Paxton Orders Halt to Tax Hikes in 4 Cities
Attorney General Ken Paxton has demanded that four Texas cities—Odessa, La Marque, Tom Bean, and Whitesboro—stop their [planned tax hikes](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GOyaAoFJQbGP3b7ulAbkqGQQX7szo22-cV9jmNCfn5Mv352f6sSGGtP62Oxg8lzwl-NQIiFAmF_P8BI_23MITqosvyCWsIU2CCUU5o0xO3oZ4TbLxxjGveQOG90qrXnXD0GxmcNrDzIWUzCm9gOqWTrbWd3cyp5tg7jPOmOSccSEfixs6NXsNii-D6FoiGfiAuTxwA4TT1iVe-Q3lMee9iWZDPCppfxExEjFaN_P2bogYj1yRiPG7oRYxlwQXXSFBsZE-IdHDnpgT9bDb5CutmA8aLd1t-fuCSo-SDyh4UbQnvR0QMfJeC63kQMTYFOOPT4gx1K4nkq27DfFLhf_n8m3EvwAAAP__J-KJsg) and has launched an investigation into whether the increases break new state laws. In a statement, Paxton alleged that the cities are not in compliance with [auditing requirements](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L_upCAUxfGnwY4JIPinoNjG7rftlgbkqjcyMIE7o_P2G_cVtj7JNyefPz_zj8OIafvtnmDpWvOc4KwRiKDMPublgEDu2vGA6uMbcsEN06yEMlwKLvQcHMbvrJtgvQijbMDK3oymN90wNLsdVi26tR37pffd6o0JAXwr2sVBpwFEg_aOSSG0lEIq_Vj90JkljGDkOqiuZVpAQMrlQTsQXK6u8Zs_UB5LfjbR7kSvytpfTE1MTed5Po4L8R6Zmu42U5MUTE1CMTU5olwSfPkGCYqL_IDEX-6inHh077TsUDmmD1TCzRHmxDFR5ueOBNXnkjm5i98gTE1NseF1YoxYu55psT0dxn-_6P80P1b9DQAA__9WmIsc), which are a prerequisite to raising property taxes, according to Senate Bill 1851, signed into law this summer. Paxton’s office sent letters to the four cities, ordering a pause on tax increases until investigations can take place, claiming audit reports either were submitted late or not at all. La Marque officials released a statement Thursday saying they are “fully cooperating” with the attorney general’s office. The city says it is in a [dire financial situation](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAURL8Gd0RwDdgUFNu4e9tuaV3DJUYhJovJs_P3K-8vvGqKkUZzzp-v-QtTTtv9Nz7JtTOWeaNjz9Qa1XnJxT8oNDzX9KB9yW8qNd3TNoMAzaXgQs0BU_7MqgtuEcHKjpwctNWDNuPYrQ58CEGIxYMwJGxUA0Qd1Ri9BK2X0CV3jUkhlJRCgrrFZTTaB0taxhFMz5SgkFqpt7ZSoxP3mD_lm-rNl2eX3draa2f9LwYTg-k4jttjLe-rZDBhbclnYjBdXAymXDzmK5E_sf59E2948rT5SrgTf-HZysb3ho14xoPBBKPmYENvkXre4zhypczAl15YLgYtDSrT98Z21YXXkXJOuxmYEvcnpvz_Y_uZ2W8H_wIAAP__NMiKow), with enough cash to cover only about two weeks of operations.
## Robert Morris Pleads Guilty to Child Abuse
Gateway Church founder Robert Morris [pleaded guilty](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAUhJ8GMyxgwJ-AYBOz2XRDC-EgpwZlCphR337L-wo366Cru77v33N-Goy4r3_NBrqePs07HCVCrZDnJSb7AlfNGfAFZYkfSBlX3GfBhKKcUSZnZzBes2ycXpgbeQOa92pUveqGoQlaiEGqsZMGGDOuHzrPuLLKLvAA5nzfoL7HOGOSc8aFbP0ydMq6ERT3g-geRDJwWFNua4AKpyk-XukLubVpa6IOtb4LefwhYiJiOo6j9emUN8ZdIGK6IxHTaioc5qI2fLINNKcFcqVbyhkLfUcwrtD1g7Fe1OLuLmojbFgCZmiydu8DY8TS9USydTMYf-7r76R9tfgfAAD__xRLhAg) on Thursday to sexually abusing a child. He received a 10-year sentence with six months in jail and probation for the remainder of the sentence. Cindy Clemishire publicly accused Morris of abuse in 2024, leading to his resignation from the megachurch after admitting to a “moral failure” with a “young lady.” The abuse took place over four years in the 1980s when Morris, as a [traveling evangelist](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSoyAUhZ9GOxxARFNQbGOXbbd0UK5yN1fIAEbz9v8kr_DXZ86Z833_7tPdImHY_todTLnWOAU4M0EpkKaZ4vIAV-zl8QF5pgNiwg3DJLnsmOCMq8lZpPekamdm7m6iBiP67tb1nR6G2ptFAwzQSuEWBSBAaWiHlq993-mZc1mj-YwJzpUQXEjVrPOgu8XdoBPrIHVbKQ4OS0xN8VDgsnmld3xBapa412R8Kc9ctX8qOVZyPM-zWeP1ofjklRyPXMnx22M7bHbxR1o8W-MRHCSWnxAc02yPofjM_lskluE6LNGb2fnIGDa2YaI6Gfc8kQiz7ivFt90ifS-U34l7GfkTAAD__x-JhTU), would stay at the Clemishire home in Oklahoma. The Oklahoma Attorney General’s Office opened an investigation into Morris after the public accusation last year.
## Two Texas Suburbs Among Most Desirable in U.S.
Boerne and Wylie are among the top 10 [most desirable suburbs](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOwyAURVeDOywg4E9BMY27TDsl4vOwUXCI4DlOdj_KbGHqe3WOdH6u5mpTTvf12-6g8RWLucPZMiBCNS4Xf4OA9rWlGzSXDyg1reluBBOKckaZNMGm_DayC9qxMPMONB_VrEY1TFO36WH2oxwVSMkjBG_nKMHzIczeXuQkXJf0B8YZk5wzLmQf3TQoH2ZQPE5iuBDJICQstccNEF62xfwuT6i9L3uX9Yb4aOTyRcRCxHKeZ7-XJ7gjhM1-LkQsLpeViAXLg342ioW2wx3VNeredAeshYilqzo8zpRzasNIJFt3m_KfBP-X5qnFbwAAAP__DcJ5jQ) in the country, according to a new study from moveBuddha. Based on move-inbound-to-outbound ratio data, Boerne, outside San Antonio, was the most desirable suburb in Texas and No. 4 overall, with a 2.55 ratio. Dallas suburb Wylie nabbed the No. 7 spot nationally, with a 2.38 ratio. The list highlights the desirability of suburbs orbiting mid-sized metro areas, which accounted for six of the top 10 spots. You can see the [full list here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOwyAURVeDOywg4E9BMY27TDsl4vOwUXCI4DlOdj_KbGHqe3WOdH6u5mpTTvf12-6g8RWLucPZMiBCNS4Xf4OA9rWlGzSXDyg1reluBBOKckaZNMGm_DayC9qxMPMONB_VrEY1TFO36WH2oxwVSMkjBG_nKMHzIczeXuQkXJf0B8YZk5wzLmQf3TQoH2ZQPE5iuBDJICQstccNEF62xfwuT6i9L3uX9Yb4aOTyRcRCxHKeZ7-XJ7gjhM1-LkQsLpeViAXLg342ioW2wx3VNeredAeshYilqzo8zpRzasNIJFt3m_KfBP-X5qnFbwAAAP__DcJ5jQ).

clean_body: Attorney General Ken Paxton has demanded that four Texas cities—Odessa, La Marque, Tom Bean, and Whitesboro—stop their and has launched an investigation into whether the increases break new state laws. | | | | | | Saturday, October 4, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1898, doctors in Laredo diagnosed the first case of smallpox in what would become a of more than 100 cases. In the following months, state officials and the Texas Rangers quarantined and forcibly vaccinated residents, leading to a deadly riot that was quelled by federal troops. We mistakenly reported the wrong date for when University of North Texas classes will be canceled in the lead-up to the home game against the University of South Florida. Classes will be canceled next Friday, Oct. 10. We apologize for the error! If you’re proud to call Texas home, imagine flipping open a book each day to discover the legendary moments that shaped the Lone Star State—now you can with today's sponsor, the Abilene 🌥️ 86/68° | Amarillo ☀️ 84/63° | Austin ☁️ 90/70° | Brownsville ☁️ 87/72° | Corpus Christi ☁️ 86/74° | DFW 🌤️ 90/71° | El Paso 🌧️ 90/63° | Houston ☀️ 88/68° | Laredo 🌥️ 90/72° | Lubbock 🌥️ 84/60° | Midland ☀️ 86/63° | San Antonio ☁️ 90/71° | Tyler ☀️ 87/62° | Waco ☀️ 89/67° Take The Flyoverwith you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Paxton Orders Halt to Tax Hikes in 4 Cities Attorney General Ken Paxton has demanded that four Texas cities—Odessa, La Marque, Tom Bean, and Whitesboro—stop their and has launched an investigation into whether the increases break new state laws. In a statement, Paxton alleged that the cities are not in compliance with , which are a prerequisite to raising property taxes, according to Senate Bill 1851, signed into law this summer. Paxton’s office sent letters to the four cities, ordering a pause on tax increases until investigations can take place, claiming audit reports either were submitted late or not at all. La Marque officials released a statement Thursday saying they are “fully cooperating” with the attorney general’s office. The city says it is in a , with enough cash to cover only about two weeks of operations. Robert Morris Pleads Guilty to Child Abuse Gateway Church founder Robert Morris on Thursday to sexually abusing a child. He received a 10-year sentence with six months in jail and probation for the remainder of the sentence. Cindy Clemishire publicly accused Morris of abuse in 2024, leading to his resignation from the megachurch after admitting to a “moral failure” with a “young lady.” The abuse took place over four years in the 1980s when Morris, as a , would stay at the Clemishire home in Oklahoma. The Oklahoma Attorney General’s Office opened an investigation into Morris after the public accusation last year. Two Texas Suburbs Among Most Desirable in U.S. Boerne and Wylie are among the top 10 in the country, according to a new study from moveBuddha. Based on move-inbound-to-outbound ratio data, Boerne, outside San Antonio, was the most desirable suburb in Texas and No. 4 overall, with a 2.55 ratio. Dallas suburb Wylie nabbed the No. 7 spot nationally, with a 2.38 ratio. The list highlights the desirability of suburbs orbiting mid-sized metro areas, which accounted for six of the top 10 spots. You can see the . | Flying together with our sponsor Ever wonder what happened in Texas history on your birthday? Or your anniversary? What about today? brings 365 days of Lone Star history right to your fingertips. From the Alamo's fall to oil strikes that changed everything, from cattle drives to space missions, this book captures the moments that made Texas, well... Texas. Perfect for the breakfast table, the coffee shop, or anywhere you want a daily dose of Texas pride. Each entry is bite-sized but packed with the kind of stories that make you say, "I didn't know that!" Whether you're a native Texan or adopted this great state as your own, you'll find something new every single day. It's history without the textbook feel—just pure Texas storytelling, one day at a time. Makes a perfect gift for any Texan who loves their state (so basically, every Texan). () ➤ Johnson County: Sheriff Adam King, who was arrested by his own deputies in August, saw a third charge added Thursday for allegedly lying before a grand jury. King pleaded not guilty to all charges. () ➤ Texas City: A planned "Major League of Leisure" sports-themed resort, with investment from Sports Illustrated , will no longer be developed, according to a report confirming the project was abandoned in late 2024. ()** ➤ Statewide: The Texas Department of Insurance has drafted new rules to allow independent, third-party appraisals when carriers and policyholders disagree on the cost of insured goods. () ➤ Grand Prairie: Elizabeth Wolf pleaded guilty to attempting to drown a three-year-old Palestinian-American girl in May 2024 in a Euless apartment complex pool, receiving a five-year sentence for the attack. These military records detail my early life, and go so far as to include my Social Security number and insurance records. There are supposed to be several layers of checks set up to prevent something like this. This isn’t just about me. Any member of the United States military that the Trump administration sees as an enemy can have their personal data exposed. And it’s incredibly dangerous. [Peter, Donald Trump and MAGA extremists have shown that they will stop at nothing to defeat me. So I’m asking: please rush a split donation to my campaign and Blue Amp Action and help me fight back against the attempts to smear my name.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b1e8999-a1e9-4edb-9885-67cc351f6e15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
