name: JB Pritzker
subject: re: Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
Jon Ossoff is the GOP’s #1 target and he needs our help:
#

[
---
Peter, it’s JB Pritzker. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to [**join me in supporting Jon Ossoff by chipping in to his reelection campaign.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251004-1-subs&t=2&akid=869%2E5691347%2E0h6XcQ) But first, I hope you’ll let me explain why Georgia’s Senate race will be one of the most important elections on the map in 2026: _We aren’t even a year into Trump’s second term, and he’s already forcing his unpopular and harmful agenda on the American people._ He’s stripping folks of their health care, cutting veterans’ services, and threatening to revoke citizenship from American citizens — all while he makes unprecedented grabs for power and attempts to establish himself as an authoritarian strongman. Look, it’s clear that as Trump’s madman tendencies grip the nation and harm working families, we need leaders everywhere to step up and fight back to protect our democracy. **Jon Ossoff has proven himself to be one of those leaders, Peter.** Before being elected by the people of Georgia, Jon led a team of investigative journalists that uncovered human rights abuses and unjust practices by corrupt governments. He’s brought that knowledge to the Senate where he’s acted as a watchdog for the Trump administration’s unconstitutional overreach on our government. We cannot lose Jon Ossoff’s leadership in the Senate. But Republicans have made him their top target in 2026, meaning this will likely be the most competitive and expensive election in the country. Jon can defend his seat and continue his important work in Washington — but he needs folks to step up and help him win this race. [**Peter, will you join me in supporting Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign by pitching in any amount today? Whether it’s $5, $10, or whatever you’re able to give, it’ll go a long way in a race this important.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251004-1-subs&t=3&akid=869%2E5691347%2E0h6XcQ) **[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251004-1-subs&t=4&akid=869%2E5691347%2E0h6XcQ)** Thank you in advance for standing with Jon. \- JB Pritzker
Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=5&akid=869%2E5691347%2E0h6XcQ) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=869%2E5691347%2E0h6XcQ) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I won’t sugarcoat this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
It’s bleak
This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dd95213b3bd741e5b0053ad978979ae5&_e=ogHmokCfUMdsWM85XkEmOQtkgT8rjVshPULoGLqpsq74rDWJEUYSdWspq0YowoTmemST31B8wfKSLN2v1PHynpU7j6Xw0thHgOvR3VzQ6_qfAeS3wyfU2aGMRUmx00Gl3oRqHsLbSgsFnFuC70gGYqaiQbV3ov7CtgYh0HIzLdziAZIjDWLtHXfi0J5zuxadIrKZEXUaD6EKlhbV5gaud0pKbeWmZO8tTREFpgSD4be4_hRIxTTC6lEs712A5-VlAOz_QnF1-3XC7CdoWZC31KX-FhDDnpqLpPL4TKg-XKK-WpfhyplMH0PeET0hgy_VPUB5A4W14AChAKJs9WF4VUJLhj4MhC0vUPvm7y9XiftNuMeiTXw6h01LGEhlpS-TEvzR6FrwJXSTs3ACir1FHuGVimqC26t3mFfQ3X4s_8_KgN6nEB87eMv7pTSOiXmUaUFPUbCiYM5b639IX_--MX_ukYSHNMWFLk7DoTspbsTApZn6JEdtByyZyRhd05g5t0YC-iBjiFW6yaClbpWssfB810mT83K8KN_ex7qtHcCG6HITYp0yxTmE0nMmbR6HBN7_bW8EihoYD7H1pFUGgdx6-Q4rXX2A2GCyHL9-Pvduq0g4ScDA4IC3uAc1Q_ci)
---
Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
[ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dd95213b3bd741e5b0053ad978979ae5&_e=ogHmokCfUMdsWM85XkEmOQtkgT8rjVshPULoGLqpsq74rDWJEUYSdWspq0YowoTmemST31B8wfKSLN2v1PHynpU7j6Xw0thHgOvR3VzQ6_qfAeS3wyfU2aGMRUmx00Gl3oRqHsLbSgsFnFuC70gGYqaiQbV3ov7CtgYh0HIzLdziAZIjDWLtHXfi0J5zuxadIrKZEXUaD6EKlhbV5gaudxhvDaxq9KVwHK_8w0Dujt3vcMgEOnszOhyqytMe6e7NsRxTnUFe0nl-vznMnIxtO4KczyqhXy0AnZeugL46_GJJ4QxMX0tn4-WvPAAMLxBY43H4vLvgkxB_7nJDYpdNmyhAf12rFlxuAnL1pC5sZcB73NbB0uLip9vOaYu32DOicVQxN2HxrUPH_okaldpRgOX3KEt3ibjRLJipGkvLqvdNrBueUbRSYlrcalTjq-SSUYCLHmcnCYqzTMEnpBv43Aiq3wr1PQDQBxQsrqs-kzpytxmpKPEj7Wvao_x-9-q9Os_CRmiIBYxnYPQPw3VyGrYEcDHUL6VgaOs5EcQJlnU4Dhu8bjEMUUsYK_4ZM42Zr-Fw1EcRpEFk2M8F2ZMMh2BnoOADxPFX69c-09IbUX0Gu4RoiLBweHJbu1f_qicP)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.

clean_body: It’s bleak This is the situation I’m caught in: | Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: NEGOP
subject: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY](https://feyrpzhbb
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
A reawakening--perhaps even a revival--has begun since the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk. Young people are hurting, searching for meaning. Take a moment to talk with those under thirty in your family. Ask how they're feeling, what's on their minds, and who they're listening to. Invite them to join you at church.
Our youth have grown up in turbulent times, bombarded by information. Many see through the algorithms, CGI, and curated content trying to shape their views. They're rebelling, seeking their own truth, drawn to voices like Charlie Kirk's.
This week, both Governor Pillen in a Pachyderm speech and then Colonel Robert Maness (ret.) at the Douglas County Republican Party Fundraiser emphasized engaging younger generations and the urgency of doing so. I share that desire to connect but, after weeks of reflection, I'm still searching for concrete ways to bridge the gap.
Have you felt this same pull? What are your thoughts or ideas for reaching out to our youth?
Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
---
| |
---
| What's Happening:
Communications Update
All across the country, Republicans are focused on a simple message: America is at its best when we protect freedoms, secure our borders, and put families first. That message is connecting with voters, and Nebraska is right in the middle of that momentum.
Here at the NEGOP, we've been building up the tools and resources our party needs to succeed - from rolling out weekly talking points, to strengthening our digital outreach, to preparing for candidate recruitment and grassroots trainings this fall.
The goal is simple: give Republicans across the state the confidence and clarity to share our message with their neighbors. And it's working - we're seeing more energy, more engagement, and more excitement from Nebraskans who are ready for real leadership.
As we head toward 2026, communication will continue to be key. That means telling our story, drawing a clear contrast with Democrats, and making sure Nebraskans know what Republicans stand for. But it's not just about what comes out of Lincoln or Washington - it's about you. When you speak up in your community, post on social media, or simply have a conversation with a friend, you're helping carry the Republican message forward.
Together, we can keep building momentum, keep growing our movement, and keep Nebraska red and America strong.
Haile McAnally Communications Director, Nebraska Republican Party

---

clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair A reawakening--perhaps even a revival--has begun since the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk. Young people are hurting, searching for meaning. Take a moment to talk with those under thirty in your family. Ask how they're feeling, what's on their minds, and who they're listening to. Invite them to join you at church. Our youth have grown up in turbulent times, bombarded by information. Many see through the algorithms, CGI, and curated content trying to shape their views. They're rebelling, seeking their own truth, drawn to voices like Charlie Kirk's. This week, both Governor Pillen in a Pachyderm speech and then Colonel Robert Maness (ret.) at the Douglas County Republican Party Fundraiser emphasized engaging younger generations and the urgency of doing so. I share that desire to connect but, after weeks of reflection, I'm still searching for concrete ways to bridge the gap. Have you felt this same pull? What are your thoughts or ideas for reaching out to our youth? Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party | | | What's Happening: Communications Update All across the country, Republicans are focused on a simple message: America is at its best when we protect freedoms, secure our borders, and put families first. That message is connecting with voters, and Nebraska is right in the middle of that momentum. Here at the NEGOP, we've been building up the tools and resources our party needs to succeed - from rolling out weekly talking points, to strengthening our digital outreach, to preparing for candidate recruitment and grassroots trainings this fall. The goal is simple: give Republicans across the state the confidence and clarity to share our message with their neighbors. And it's working - we're seeing more energy, more engagement, and more excitement from Nebraskans who are ready for real leadership. As we head toward 2026, communication will continue to be key. That means telling our story, drawing a clear contrast with Democrats, and making sure Nebraskans know what Republicans stand for. But it's not just about what comes out of Lincoln or Washington - it's about you. When you speak up in your community, post on social media, or simply have a conversation with a friend, you're helping carry the Republican message forward. Together, we can keep building momentum, keep growing our movement, and keep Nebraska red and America strong. Haile McAnally Communications Director, Nebraska Republican Party | | | | == | == | | == | | | UPCOMING NEGOP EVENTS | | == | | | Help Republicans win in 2026 and beyond. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Exciting Progress on School Choice in Mississippi – Thanks to You!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/schoolchoicems?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**As a leading voice for School Choice in Mississippi, MCPP is thrilled to update you on the progress our state is making.**

**School Choice is our top focus.** While we champion other critical causes like reducing red tape, as well as running a Leadership Academy and our famous Speaker Series, School Choice remains our north star. I’m delighted to report we’re seeing real momentum.
---
|
---
_Erika Donalds gives evidence to Mississippi House Committee_
| **The House Education Freedom Committee recently heard compelling testimony from experts Erika Donalds of Moms for Liberty and Dr. Patrick Wolf, a key architect of Arkansas’s School Choice program.**

So how might School Choice work in practice? **Every child in our state already has a personalized education budget of about $7,000 a year under the new school funding formula.** With School Choice, families could direct these state funds to a school - public, private, or charter - that best meets their child’s needs. It would be the state funds, not local or federal that families could direct.

**What about overcrowding?** Might some schools be inundated with students from outside? **Under our proposal, schools would get to set capacity limits and decline additional students if full.** Schools could also reject students with significant disciplinary issues, maintaining safe and focused learning environments.

The evidence is clear: School Choice works. A global meta-analysis shows improved reading and math performance for students in these programs. **Even better, competition from School Choice lifts achievement in traditional public schools, as confirmed by 90 studies showing positive effects on student outcomes.**

Mississippi is now surrounded by states - Alabama, Arkansas, Louisiana, and Tennessee - where families control their child’s education budget. States like Arizona, Florida, and others have embraced this model, too. **Without action, Mississippi students risk falling behind.**

Opponents claim School Choice will “defund” public schools, but that’s misleading. Great public schools could attract _more_ funding as families choose them. **Your tax dollars exist to educate students, not prop up systems. If a family isn’t satisfied with their school options, they deserve the freedom to choose a better fit.**

Critics of School Choice often mask their desire to protect bloated budgets and high bureaucrat salaries - some exceeding the Governor’s pay. Their arguments crumble when you see the success of programs in Alabama and Arkansas.

With your continued support, we’re closer than ever to making School Choice a reality in Mississippi. Together, we can ensure every child has access to an education that unlocks their potential.

Mississippi is doing well. Our economy is growing. New inward investment is pouring in. **Improving our education system is vital if we are to build on this success.**

Thank you for your support in this fight!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=10730dc91d&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warmest regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| Ps. Lord Daniel Hannan gave a talk this week to a packed lunch at River Hills in Jackson. If you weren’t able to attend, you might like to watch the video online here:
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d8053121b4&e=5703353baa)
---

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Trump is inflicting a painful shutdown on the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We must hold Republicans accountable.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116557795/573808144/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251004Painful_SB_90DO_7_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjI0MTVmYi0xZmExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQCuiTvYIR8ZHUDIY1jg2kuCqi03Mpwflbc37NdcD44=) Peter,

After months of making life more expensive, Trump is now inflicting a painful shutdown on the American people because Republicans want to raise health insurance premiums.

It gets worse: **Trump wants to use the government shutdown as an opportunity to further Project 2025 by firing more federal workers and punishing his “political enemies.”**

**Despite Republicans having a trifecta in Washington, this is the 4th government shutdown under Trump** – with the longest lasting 35 days. As they won’t let us forget, they have full control over our government, yet are trying to put the blame on this shutdown on Democrats who refuse to stand by while healthcare costs skyrocket for our communities.

**This is clear and utter chaos, which has become the norm for Republicans.** Under their so-called leadership, families, workers, and communities across America are paying the price: service members and federal employees are missing paychecks, Social Security and veterans’ services could be delayed, and small business loans are stalled.

**Republicans so desperately don’t want to protect healthcare for the American people that they are letting our government close its doors. Enough is enough: we need a change in Washington, and we need your help.**

[**Peter, help us hold Republicans accountable for this government crisis and fight to address America’s urgent healthcare crisis. Please chip in $5 today so we can take back the House in 2026.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116557796/573808145/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251004Painful_SB_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjI0MTVmYi0xZmExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQCuiTvYIR8ZHUDIY1jg2kuCqi03Mpwflbc37NdcD44=)

Thank you,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: The most important thing you can do this Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team,
Our first major test since Donald Trump took office is here. **Today marks exactly one month until the fall 2025 election.**
I am humbly asking you to make a donation to GIFFORDS PAC today. I’m on the road this week campaigning for gun safety champions across Virginia, and whatever you spare could help us reach final undecided voters.
If that’s all you need to hear, you can click this link to donate:
**[https://go.giffords.org/go/support-giffords](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251004-1-b&t=1&akid=10935%2E3935704%2EQfcrWK)**
Otherwise, let me tell you a bit more why I’m asking for your support.
These fall elections are usually seen as an important bellwether for the 2026 midterm elections. Millions of people will vote in critical races—from governor to local legislative races.
I was in Virginia yesterday campaigning for candidates up and down the ballot, including Abigail Spanberger, the Democratic nominee for governor. The difference in that race is clear.
Abigail is a relentless fighter for gun safety. She knows how to win a tough fight, and has what it takes to break the gun lobby’s grip on the governor’s mansion in Richmond.
On the other hand, her opponent, Winsome Sears has an A rating from the NRA and believes school shootings are happening because “we took prayer out of schools.”
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251004-1-b&t=2&akid=10935%2E3935704%2EQfcrWK)
**But it will come down to turnout—and according to the most recent reports, Republican districts are leading in the early votes cast.**
It’s not too late to make a difference. These elections can come down to just a few votes, so even a few more dollars right now could decide who wins or loses in these competitive races.
[**I am personally asking you to chip in to GIFFORDS PAC today. We have one month to elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot, and your donation will help us reach persuadable voters.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251004-1-b&t=3&akid=10935%2E3935704%2EQfcrWK)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

---

---

Team GIFFORDS

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qhj4sotkp3yv48hokpkh2t084v5zs7w4iw9b0ztkt1r0edutnhuh2ex3j6shvvn41crw1mmcvvph1b4ixiyxba&__stmp=t3lz3z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | | [](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=1wduekwl7wti3szcxkdtmfl8jvv5by06ikw6riy1ehe2if9ryod3g607gu6yqbz7ggd4vlt2yycro45q45noybvtz71bk2qmsv96ktnsy0av2ztsr0nehigr2ahoi5ji364hng8zisng8313&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qhj4sotkp3yv48hokpkh2t084v5zs7w4iw9b0ztkt1r0edutnhuh2ex3j6shvvn41crw1mmcvvph1b4ixiyxba&__stmp=t3lz3z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=rd06mgksptgtezzzj3vk72iohclu9gorjiua4vuzlqwpsko60bcyy4ci9kfhvoe0z845x6d7ujd94qrxnu16mkg7lsedae7bns7sgwpqhzjswcgvlqeegwbbzaifmr1ewk9i3zzamuyt5nr3ol12&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=edb8jn9ebfryg0872u690zhh705ewjyj8jd5bj0ght4mkywe7ph27cavj8gsr4egrftjmn5kgrlj36g3o5sebgckllqm6gvw8c1y02u3g78naipilps8prfvfe36rqe3h7u0v9y5s&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3lz3z&__onlt=h)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Let me lay this out
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Republicans in the House, the Senate, and the White House want health insurance premiums to double, even triple for 24 million Americans.
#

Let me lay this out as simply as I can, Peter.
**Republicans in the House, the Senate, and the White House want health insurance premiums to double, even triple for 24 million Americans.**
Democrats want people to be able to have health insurance they can afford.
It’s not about scoring points, it’s not about getting attention, it’s not because we want non-citizens getting Medicaid (they can’t enroll in it to begin with). By the way, what health care those people do have access to is emergency room service of last resort, because **RONALD REAGAN** signed a law in 1986 to stop people from dying in the street because they didn’t have health care.
Republicans in the Senate tried to steamroll us on this without negotiation. They’re enabling Trump and his goons to line item veto funding that we have mandated, by law — which is unconstitutional, by the way. They even passed recissions on a party line vote, AFTER a budget had already been negotiated and signed in a bipartisan way.
We want the government open. We want to negotiate a budget that doesn’t kick 24 million people off their health care because they can’t afford it. And we want Trump to follow the law.
That’s that, and I’m not budging.
Thanks,
\- Ruben
Now is the time to stay united and support the people in the fight. [**If you can afford it, please make a donation to Ruben Gallego.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct25.OOqsxV&refcode=em251003-1-90&t=1&akid=4012%2E734936%2Ec8P7BI) [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct25.OOqsxV&refcode=em251003-1-90&t=2&akid=4012%2E734936%2Ec8P7BI)
---

clean_body: The New York Sun told you the truth. | | | | | | FROM THE DESK OF THE PUBLISHER | | Dear Reader,How bad is the New York Times? Well, how better to illustrate than to contrast the Times with The New York Sun? The screenshot on the left, from today, shows how the Times covered the story of a shocking terror attack in Israel. The Times makes no mention in the headline of who the perpetrators are. The Sun, as you can see below, wants you to know the truth. Nothing more. Nothing less. | | | | The difference couldn't be starker, but you already knew that. What you didn't know, perhaps, is what you can do about it. The answer is simple: . Like you, we've screamed and shouted about the injustice of the Times claiming to be America's 'Paper of Record.' But now it's time to do something. It's time to join the movement to rebuild a better newspaper. It's time to join The New York Sun. Founded in 1833 - eighteen years before the Times - the Sun has been on the right side of history at every turn. The Sun is truly America's newspaper. It answers only to the American people. We need every patriotic citizen with us. Declare today that the Times is not your paper of record!Don't wait. name: Andrew Sypher, Turning Point USA
subject: A chapter in every school? It’s happening.
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1528912/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZEJnMm5CZlBwOA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEwMDQ/LbmNseDFCdFl2WA/qP2hpZHM9bmMxRG9oYU03RnlaS0Vscw/gaOEfjg/s6t469cd457)
| |
---
Patriot, We knew Charlie’s mission would live on. _But we didn’t expect this..._ In just two weeks, more than 121,000 students have reached out to start or join a Turning Point USA chapter at their college or high school.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Young Americans — from high schools to college campuses — are raising their hands and saying: ** _“I’m ready to lead.”_** And thanks to you — many of them already are. Patriot, your prayers... your generosity... You’ve helped us meet this moment with activism kits, leadership resources, and boldness. Charlie dreamed of a Turning Point USA chapter in every college and high school in America. Now, it’s within reach.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Our movement was already strong, but no one has ever seen anything like this before... And it’s moving faster than anyone expected. From high school students launching Club America chapters to college students organizing with urgency... **The youth movement Charlie built is gaining unstoppable momentum.** **And Patriot, behind every new chapter... is someone like you — making sure students have what they need to lead.** We are _deeply grateful_ for you. And we promise — we’re not slowing down.
---
**For Charlie,** Andrew Sypher
Vice President of Field Operations Turning Point USA
---
---
[**Support Turning Point USA**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **P.S.** If you’ve already helped — by sponsoring an activism kit or becoming a monthly donor — **thank you.** Your generosity is equipping students, launching chapters, and honoring Charlie’s mission in the most tangible way possible. We couldn’t do this without you. But if you haven’t had the chance yet — _and you feel called to act..._ **Here is a powerful way you can help:** **[Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — including leadership tools, Constitutions, flags, and chapter gear — for a new student chapter...](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** **Again, if you’ve already stepped forward to help —**** _thank you._** Your impact is already being felt on campuses and in high schools across America. For Charlie. For the next generation. For America.
---

---

name: Defend Our Courts
subject: This ruling is why PA Dem Justices have targets on their backs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Rulings like this pose an existential threat to their ability to win and it's why MAGA is going all out to remove Pennsylvania’s Democratic justices.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VYpymNkmSDNus9q8lx6YB3kUBhLKBB6g_6jodvtrtKEyshj2TshreQ-4CR1wWmzBz9UwvFze4dL16EuK1VegzARqMyknnIs7Lm-Z-ZkzBLzv6fcXvH5UaDz1IHT0CZKTa0RC7KMYXHjeCQEjGHcOrsy7v_V-nIZAoOPesOO58lO_otJ5ofKGZF9Ug86P3hFPkVLbpWAewC_6KePJ9ev1P4j5WgUouhaBMB7-sygB8SM=&c=GOuJYS28CGAKdzQlER_PyebQufpPsodqxreEVWoIOPZPyH4cgOblEA==&ch=VIJy9QZEQhkaGhKnbL277QBgHiICPTCPwtq3HEG1p4q6lHkj5SZ6iQ==)
---
| Peter,
The typically sleepy Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election has gone nuclear.
In 31 days Pennsylvanians will vote yes or no on whether to keep or remove the three Democratic justices that make up the Pennsylvania's Supreme Court's 3 vote Democratic majority.
If MAGA successfully removes these justices, a fair election will never be held in Pennsylvania again. Democrats simply won't win elections here anymore.
Demonstrating how critical these justices are to fair election is the court's recent ruling on mail-in ballots. It is exactly why MAGA has put a target on the backs of each of these justices:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VYpymNkmSDNus9q8lx6YB3kUBhLKBB6g_6jodvtrtKEyshj2TshreQ-4CR1wWmzBz9UwvFze4dL16EuK1VegzARqMyknnIs7Lm-Z-ZkzBLzv6fcXvH5UaDz1IHT0CZKTa0RC7KMYXHjeCQEjGHcOrsy7v_V-nIZAoOPesOO58lO_otJ5ofKGZF9Ug86P3hFPkVLbpWAewC_6KePJ9ev1P2aP0tPmWPl9eLgSATG2-yU=&c=GOuJYS28CGAKdzQlER_PyebQufpPsodqxreEVWoIOPZPyH4cgOblEA==&ch=VIJy9QZEQhkaGhKnbL277QBgHiICPTCPwtq3HEG1p4q6lHkj5SZ6iQ==)
---
Because of last Friday's ruling, voters must now be notified if election officials are going to reject their mail ballots because of an error like an incorrect date or missing signature.
Because MAGA relies on low voter turnout to win elections they are obsessed with eliminating as many votes as they can to sway elections in key swing states like Pennsylvania. Rulings like this pose an existential threat to their ability to win and it's why they are going all out to remove Pennsylvania's Democratic justices.
Unfortunately, Democrats underestimated MAGA's determination to win this election and we are now being massively outorganized and outspent by them. If the election were held today we would lose.
To ensure that Democrats can continue to win in PA it is imperative that we save this court and with 31 days left until E-Day, time is running out to do it. [Can we count on you to rush $55 (the average cost per vote in this race) or whatever you can spare so we can immediately put it to work on the ground?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VYpymNkmSDNus9q8lx6YB3kUBhLKBB6g_6jodvtrtKEyshj2TshreQ-4CR1wWmzBDAZCd_6gVkI8HIl4kB-f5pbhB0pTWTn9HUmcD_96ySWh3vAinpxmIMQJ9QlJCa01-b0C6wULRcVEkeNEePRFqsMMRXHhakgl7wSTwe9e9RqVAbj_6KFFnE7idI3cgX-Izhn4DFWVYNr8YKvxlTH_MKO4UsxXbgEVmFFqqejB3ShUvPU0LEzmkw==&c=GOuJYS28CGAKdzQlER_PyebQufpPsodqxreEVWoIOPZPyH4cgOblEA==&ch=VIJy9QZEQhkaGhKnbL277QBgHiICPTCPwtq3HEG1p4q6lHkj5SZ6iQ==)
---

clean_body: Rulings like this pose an existential threat to their ability to win and it's why MAGA is going all out to remove Pennsylvania’s Democratic justices. | | | | | == | Peter, The typically sleepy Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election has gone nuclear. In 31 days Pennsylvanians will vote yes or no on whether to keep or remove the three Democratic justices that make up the Pennsylvania's Supreme Court's 3 vote Democratic majority. If MAGA successfully removes these justices, a fair election will never be held in Pennsylvania again. Democrats simply won't win elections here anymore. Demonstrating how critical these justices are to fair election is the court's recent ruling on mail-in ballots. It is exactly why MAGA has put a target on the backs of each of these justices: | | == Because of last Friday's ruling, voters must now be notified if election officials are going to reject their mail ballots because of an error like an incorrect date or missing signature. Because MAGA relies on low voter turnout to win elections they are obsessed with eliminating as many votes as they can to sway elections in key swing states like Pennsylvania. Rulings like this pose an existential threat to their ability to win and it's why they are going all out to remove Pennsylvania's Democratic justices. Unfortunately, Democrats underestimated MAGA's determination to win this election and we are now being massively outorganized and outspent by them. If the election were held today we would lose. To ensure that Democrats can continue to win in PA it is imperative that we save this court and with 31 days left until E-Day, time is running out to do it. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Participating in this election as a volunteer, donor, or even as a person posting about it on Facebook, is the most important action we can take right now to stop Trump and his fascist agenda. Surrounded by men voting on the topic of...| | |
---

Peter –

Aftyn Behn will be the __only__ __woman__ on the ballot out of 16 candidates. The rest are men. She also has the most experience advocating for the women of Tennessee – and winning important fights that have protected thousands of Tennessee women.

** Her primary is _this_ _TUESDAY._ We can help advance the only proven pro-choice champion through the primary in this critical opportunity for Democrats to secure another seat in the U.S. Congress. **

In the official ranking of states based on women in government, Tennessee ranks 46th out of 50 states. Tennessee has nine House seats in Washington – only one is occupied by a woman.

Additionally, in Tennessee, Black women are nearly three times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women — most of them preventable. **TN ranks among the bottom nationally for maternal health outcomes,** and the women in TN are living under a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest.

[**It’s dangerous to be a woman in Tennessee, and Aftyn has been doing everything she possibly can to change that. She needs to raise an additional $10,000 before her primary election on Tuesday to reach as many voters as possible and advance to the General Election later this year. Rush a split $20.25 contribution between Her Bold Move and Aftyn’s campaign immediately.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_251004Primary_DB_90DO_8_G_N_L1&amount=20.25)

Before serving in the TN legislature, Aftyn organized with reproductive justice and healthcare access advocates across Tennessee and the South. She has worked closely with groups on the ground to expand access to healthcare, combat stigma, and defend reproductive freedom in some of the toughest turf in the country. But earlier this week, she told us that **she has been able to accomplish more in her time as an elected lawmaker than she ever could have imagined as a rural organizer.** We NEED her voice and her tireless determination in **_government_** , where it belongs.

This seat is in a red district in Tennessee, but recent polling indicates that of all the Democrats vying for the seat, **Aftyn would be the candidate with the best chances of winning against the Republican** in the General Election. If you were looking for a chance to elect a phenomenal woman _and_ flip a federal seat.... **This is it. Your support could make all the difference.**

[**Join Aftyn’s deeply needed movement in Tennessee by splitting $20.25 or more between Her Bold Move and Aftyn’s campaign RIGHT NOW.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_251004Primary_DB_90DO_8_G_N_L2&amount=20.25)

Together,

Diana Bula
Political Manager, Her Bold Move

subject: This warning just made our stomachs sink…

body:
We can’t let this moment slip away
| | The Governor of California just issued a solemn warning:

**_“God help us if we lose.”_**
---
**IF** we don’t give this fight everything we’ve got – we’ll LOSE California’s special election and LOSE our chance to flip the House.

name: Wes Moore
subject: Shutdown
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=710%2E1086043%2EEutXiJ)
Hi Peter,
As we deal with the impacts of Trump’s government shutdown, this message comes to mind:
**Marylanders leave no one behind.**
That’s why, even in the midst of a crisis, we stand together — protecting our families, supporting our workers, and keeping our communities strong.
But I can’t do this alone. Holding the line against Donald Trump’s chaos will take all of us stepping up.
There is a path forward, and though it won’t be easy, we know what it takes.
When you donate to our campaign, you help us send a clear message: **Maryland will continue to serve as a model of progress & resilience.** We need to show the strength of our grassroots movement right now to counter Trump’s shutdown games.
**[Can you pitch in $5, or whatever you can right now, to help us keep moving forward no matter the obstacles?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251004-1?refcode=em-20251004-1&refcode2=710_1086043_EutXiJ&akid=710%2E1086043%2EEutXiJ)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251004-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20251004-1&refcode2=710_1086043_EutXiJ&akid=710%2E1086043%2EEutXiJ)**
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251004-1?refcode=em-20251004-1&refcode2=710_1086043_EutXiJ&akid=710%2E1086043%2EEutXiJ)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251004-1&t=2&refcode2=710_1086043_EutXiJ&akid=710%2E1086043%2EEutXiJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=710%2E1086043%2EEutXiJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=710%2E1086043%2EEutXiJ)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: absolutely hammered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
As you read this we are getting absolutely pummeled with ads

**One more $3 donation, please.**
That is what Gavin Newsom is asking you to make today. We'll explain why this request is so important in a moment, but if you're already sold on the importance of stopping Trump from rigging the next election and want to help California pass the Election Rigging Response Act, please use this link.
People have already started voted. So this donation couldn't come at a more important time.
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/california-redistricting**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250828-2&refcode2=2638_4767699_op9hV4&akid=2638%2E4767699%2Eop9hV4)
Here's why:
As you read this we are getting absolutely hammered with ads paid for by Trump supporters who want to make sure Democrats have no way to take back the House and put a check on the president's power. They know the stakes and are spending accordingly.
One recent poll showed us at 48 percent and another at 51 percent. So it is increasingly clear we need double-down on our efforts as soon as possible. We cannot let the other side control the advertising battle or we'll lose.
Folks, listen: we are going to face everything in this election. Billionaires donating to beat us, ICE showing up at our events and polling places, court cases, Trump trying to stop mail-in balloting ... and on and on it will go.
But if we have the resources to communicate with the voters we need and turn them out, we'll win. And we'll give Democrats a fairer chance to take back the House.
That's why we ask. So please:
[**If passing the Election Rigging Response Act and giving Democrats a fair chance to take back the House feels worth $3 to you, and you can give it today, please use this link to make a donation.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250828-2&refcode2=2638_4767699_op9hV4&akid=2638%2E4767699%2Eop9hV4)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

body:
ANTIFA WARNING:

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-RnqKb-NoQBw)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, **Antifa is a left-wing terrorist organization. It is a deadly threat to all of us.** And _it is crucial that everyone understand_ , Antifa isn't a random, spontaneous movement, _its activities are fully funded and highly organized_ ... **The most important question is:**_**_Who is paying_**_** __for it_?_****** We need to know**** exactly how much of Antifa is paid for by Qatar, Iran, China, or Left-wing billionaires like George Soros, or far-left NGOs like the Gates Foundation. _We are going to follow the money and begin holding people accountable under law (and public opinion) for funding violence and dysfunction in America!_ We know the Democrats won't do it, because the same people cutting the checks to Antifa are the same people funding the Democrats' campaigns-- the Democrats have essentially become a revolutionary party bent on America's downfall. We also need to continue building conservative political and financial power to fight back against these pernicious and subversive networks that have been attacking our country from every angle for far too long- and I am proud to ask for your help.
---
[ **RUSH A DONATION NOW >>** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-Z2q4Nz8GChmq5KCtixRA)
---
_Thank you for being part of this growing conservative movement, _ Ted Cruz ** **

subject: this race will decide if Ohio workers have a voice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Sherrod never planned to run for office again. But when he saw what was happening in our country – politicians in Washington siding with billionaires and corporate interests, costs rising for working families, health care being ripped away – he knew he couldn’t stay on the sidelines. There’s simply too much at stake for Ohio families. Our battleground race is going to be one of the most competitive in the country, and to win, Sherrod needs supporters like you to step up from the very start. [_**Will you split $10 between Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand now to help us win in Ohio?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116573600/573854393/1310732378?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.04_Sherrod-Brown-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmVkYzY3NS0yYWExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CAYpcDVC91iAz420IgHF4TP0Oe89VpNY_LYEkHywLw8=) | | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116573603/573854395/1310732378?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.04_Sherrod-Brown-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmVkYzY3NS0yYWExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CAYpcDVC91iAz420IgHF4TP0Oe89VpNY_LYEkHywLw8=)

This race isn’t about left or right. It’s about whether Ohio workers have someone in the Senate fighting for them. Right now, no one is.
Workers are more productive than ever, but wages are flat, costs are skyrocketing – and corporate special interests keep rigging the system.
Sherrod couldn’t stand by and watch. Not while regular people were getting hurt. He’s getting back in the ring because he believes in the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do.
[_**But he can’t do it without you: Will you chip in $10 split between Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand to win in Ohio and keep fighting for working families?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116573606/573854398/1310732378?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.04_Sherrod-Brown-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmVkYzY3NS0yYWExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CAYpcDVC91iAz420IgHF4TP0Oe89VpNY_LYEkHywLw8=)

clean_body: Sherrod never planned to run for office again. But when he saw what was happening in our country – politicians in Washington siding with billionaires and corporate interests, costs rising for working families, health care being ripped away – he knew he couldn’t stay on the sidelines. There’s simply too much at stake for Ohio families. Our battleground race is going to be one of the most competitive in the country, and to win, Sherrod needs supporters like you to step up from the very start. = | | = This race isn’t about left or right. It’s about whether Ohio workers have someone in the Senate fighting for them. Right now, no one is. Workers are more productive than ever, but wages are flat, costs are skyrocketing – and corporate special interests keep rigging the system. Sherrod couldn’t stand by and watch. Not while regular people were getting hurt. He’s getting back in the ring because he believes in the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand immediately: | = | = | = | = | = Thank you. – Team Sherrod * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

body:
The work we put in these next few weeks will have ripple effects for years to come.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116574098/573855395/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZWRjNjc1LTJhYTEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V0Y0ad-HBANMTQFdB8y1WtaeJgj7oFBtUXhnQK5raE0=&emci=a9dfd322-99a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=43edc675-2aa1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)

Peter, **We’re officially one month away from the 2025 election — and it’s all hands on deck to preserve democracy.** The NDRC is working in Pennsylvania and Virginia to elect Democracy Defenders who will be a firewall against the extremist power grabs craven politicians are pursuing from Texas to Missouri. We’re leaving nothing to chance, because we can’t afford that risk. We know the work we put in over the next few weeks will have ripple effects for years to come. And we can’t wake up a month from now wishing that we’d done more. [**Help the NDRC leave it all on the field in these final weeks of the 2025 election by making a donation to fund this work. The 2025 election is a critical opportunity for us to ensure Virginia and Pennsylvania elect leaders who will play an important role in halting the trend toward anti-democracy extremism.
Put simply: If we don’t win key state-level races, it could open the door to Trump and his allies pushing them for mid-decade redraws that favor Republicans, following in the footsteps of states like Missouri and Texas.
In Virginia, Democrats have a razor-thin, two-seat majority. We must retain this pro-democracy majority and elect Abigail Spanberger as governor to stop the Republican redistricting scheme in its tracks.
In Pennsylvania, control of the state supreme court is at stake. The court has been a backstop against the Pennsylvania GOP’s previous attempts to gerrymander its congressional map. And with the wave of redistricting happening around the country, we _must_ protect this Democratic majority so Pennsylvanians’ voices can be heard.
[**Please, in the mission-critical final weeks of this election, make a donation so the NDRC can keep up our work through the final votes are cast.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116574106/573855404/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_OneMonth_email_20251004-NDRC-Tier1-OneMonth_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251004-NDRC-Tier1-OneMonth_&utm_campaign=OneMonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZWRjNjc1LTJhYTEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V0Y0ad-HBANMTQFdB8y1WtaeJgj7oFBtUXhnQK5raE0=)

Team NDRC

A new _realtor.com_ analysis confirms what we've all felt in our wallets for years, Peter: **Florida ranks #1 in the country for most expensive homeowners insurance.** Think about that for a second, Peter. That's real money taken out of your pocket for groceries, your kids' education, or saving for the future. That's the difference between financial stability and financial stress. And while other states have leaders who fight for their people, Florida has political leaders, like our current Attorney General, who sit on their hands while insurance companies pick your pocket. Jose Javier Rodriguez won't stand for it. He's spent his career fighting for working people against powerful corporations, and as our next Attorney General, he'll bring that same energy to taking on insurance companies that are crushing Florida families with unfair rates. **[This fight is personal for all of us, and we need your help to win it. The insurance companies have millions to spend protecting their profits, but we have something stronger: people power. clean_body: Florida ranks #1 in the country for most expensive homeowners insurance. | A new realtor.com analysis confirms what we've all felt in our wallets for years, Peter: Florida ranks #1 in the country for most expensive homeowners insurance. Think about that for a second, Peter. That's real money taken out of your pocket for groceries, your kids' education, or saving for the future. That's the difference between financial stability and financial stress. And while other states have leaders who fight for their people, Florida has political leaders, like our current Attorney General, who sit on their hands while insurance companies pick your pocket. Jose Javier Rodriguez won't stand for it. He's spent his career fighting for working people against powerful corporations, and as our next Attorney General, he'll bring that same energy to taking on insurance companies that are crushing Florida families with unfair rates. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks for being part of this fight, Rodriguez HQ | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DBeU2X_hC7i-AB5ypRc2qsAebin0BKp9XC1xXRgaU3Q68Y37T8oYUSavpMhj-6dthUnqPLY6CdIHOgLPPZ9Bmx0M8iQQUQGjAMliWsL992DEJFFNR8m4hWc2kpHzkJ0rshm05-CKrMxm83ANqc-VqB9bbqBeTzEg629zmcAQ6ojp21A9cN4iyBJwyNvrd7cuog1bELlMWUzhapwc8FdB1o--BLAwMab6P1-NljQ9jp8RH2jv47DmLPCWmo6h6_2dRG6p4P0n2x_7r-FcJcRI23F_9MNd0koiH06I8T2gv6Ho3A_ZFXv5SreYrUab1kcbDMUhI_lAvtv1j8ohr2zDGYMad-8vg0M77oygZlrue0Ewcxaq7pA964DxGSDL9KHYd8bBo128jqDKg2ihTocRIcQ/4kg/yuxDco4kR6aE64tAgkFTcw/h0/h001.qudjf1LBnidcCamWV24ByhW3XUXtVKpnQjahLU07ZCo)

This isn't just another partisan shutdown -- upending how Washington works. This is Donald Trump seizing an opportunity to reshape the entire federal government. **According to Axios, Trump is treating the shutdown as a chance to purge institutions he considers "Democrat agencies," cut funding to states that voted blue, and fire federal workers en masse. He's meeting with Russ Vought to decide which agencies to target -- even proposing to eliminate $8 billion from clean-energy projects in blue states.**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DBeU2X_hC7i-AB5ypRc2qsAebin0BKp9XC1xXRgaU3Q5SE5IfZmeaxcywlkXwGLzpkmPT91zAjjMBGPIRCYAWC-S0kcORGAQYGwu-G92UEoia01WfVYZPi9SJ-AxGj1wHfGkfV0YLBwoX6Wfl5tnsq-21LxdQQue2Ne_KmnLjJV94HD0WtJjeMJSfAQtDfy215HKeZ-zMOXA2sCVadanv8-OSHbDxWe1933Aa29jL5o4FKr4PdHp23syzGm46Ct97hCkNnDzyJUvXzQN5u_qwfO5CSp9luQtAwd_3512dOozVXl5gmSnbpImAobcST6LzHsAAk3AAtETaoqykpOUPGbpLV4xfiTBwMgToorEYIdICPJnh033iF0gHfXuBEZ7n/4kg/yuxDco4kR6aE64tAgkFTcw/h1/h001.pq2sZFl8MpzimyXN7v7KQgZk5AqHsob9f2DalRIxHkI)
---
**He 's not hiding it. The administration is now using official government websites to push messaging that blames Democrats -- in clear violation of federal law (like the Hatch Act) -- turning the tools of government into partisan propaganda machines. ** And the threat of mass layoffs isn't theoretical. OMB has already instructed agencies to issue reduction in force (RIF) notices. This is authoritarianism in the making. The threat now is not just a shutdown -- it's turning the federal workforce into political pawns. It's silencing dissent, dismantling oversight, and deepening control at the expense of everything we believed government should protect. _**That 's why No Dem Left Behind is stepping into the fight.**_ **[We're mobilizing in key states to back bold, fearless Democrats who won't stand for this kind of power grab. We're pushing the narrative hard: this isn't acceptable. This is an attack on public servants, on checks and balances, and on the idea that government should serve us, not Trump. Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help us stop this takeover -- before they fire their way into permanent control?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DBeU2X_hC7i-AB5ypRc2qsAebin0BKp9XC1xXRgaU3Q68Y37T8oYUSavpMhj-6dth1wJq01k-q9-PJsnAcApiNCK-54yLHZ-Z_11t2SpQ0mg3hT9XAxJWh2Kpdke0Tc8-oGuAwspCjGvRXbkyHE27b812pabmSrd_xz05T-NK_9FNgl8-ub_AHjGxeyXdlHFeU0cvzA0Jg_HdwnqxihH3w3m2OhlKgsHd7syRldVNLTYtjKAN-6cFwDlgcpB9xKjTQemD8ECw1pJzMEq_e5V5t2VTrcQUTaHQFLc6BYqZoorFYogM6jWmz_a6PirQlWc5x9EpEuJbbHvHBz0DovDtD0yQjJGZHKyDybC2SNBT3JgH0h9Jw5nQ73qnRMXXH6KFKxLmlUDHMFWY9vLys2eZyQ/4kg/yuxDco4kR6aE64tAgkFTcw/h2/h001.MO9UreJx_shd4HyD05u76FtlGXLVNhhWaMgG-9SyxEw)**

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qvhy22qo9czbvq3uzkzqyodc7wiiveuo0w5wo9m631npto5x833x833xo5qxxp2ge5bogm99o&__stmp=t3m2hn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m2hn&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m2hn&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m2hn&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?

name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution Chair
subject: FWD: News on No Kings, Electing Mamdani, Fighting Trump’s Censorship, and MORE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Dear Friend -

As Board Chair of Our Revolution, I wanted to personally reach out to
you in these difficult times and express our solidarity. Thank you
for being with us in this fight against Trump & the Oligarchs. I
hope you’ll take a moment to read how our organizers are working in
their local communities everyday to defend our democracy from
corruption.

— Larry Cohen

NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

HEADLINES: Fighting Authoritarianism | No Kings! | No Troops on Our
Streets | Fire Trump’s Censorship Czar | Protesting Peter Thiel |
Confronting Oligarchs in the Hamptons | Electing Zohran Mamdani | New
Endorsements! | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

FIGHTING BACK

Trump is escalating his authoritarian rhetoric and tactics, and we’re
reaching a turning point.

He’s declared war on the “enemy within,” directing military leaders
to use OUR cities as “training grounds.” He’s cracked down on our
freedom of speech by seizing control of the mainstream media to turn
it into his own propaganda machine. He’s signing memos authorizing
the FBI to come after his political opponents – including us.

The list goes on. And on. And on.

“What we’re seeing is a deliberate merger of authoritarianism and
oligarchy,” said Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese
wrote in an op-ed in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33954?t=1011&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]The Hill.

Big Tech funded Trump’s return to power, and now his administration
is funneling billions of our tax dollars to build a Big Brother
state, put troops in our streets, and fund cruel detention centers
and deportation flights.

As Democrats in Congress use their leverage to shut down Trump’s
corrupt government, Our Revolution is mobilizing our nationwide
movement to Fight Trump & the Oligarchs at every turn.

We are exposing the corruption, unleashing pressure campaigns in the
halls of Congress, and deploying our volunteer-led Citizen Action
Teams in city after city.

Our activists are on the streets every week — showing up on
billionaires' doorsteps in the Hamptons, confronting oligarchs like
Peter Thiel in San Francisco, bird-dogging politicians on Capitol
Hill, and gearing up for the biggest No Kings Day yet.

We don’t have time to waste. That’s why Our Revolution is focused on
building grassroots power to Fight Trump & the Oligarchs with our
targeted 3 Point Strategy:

1. Fight Trump’s Oligarch Agenda - from Capitol Hill to City Halls
2. Elect Anti-Oligarch Champions up and down the ballot
3. Get Oligarch Money out of Politics and uplift the grassroots

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34264?t=1012&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]And we’re just getting started. Chip in a donation of any amount
to help fuel this people-powered resistance.

★ ★ ★

[3]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs

★ ★ ★

NO KINGS, NO OLIGARCHS!

On October 18th, millions of us are rising again to show the world:
America has no kings, and the power belongs to the people.

We turned out in June, showing the world that Americans are standing
up to Trump’s authoritarianism. Now, as Trump doubles down, our
nationwide coalition is mobilizing bigger than ever.

Our Revolution is organizing turnout for No Kings events in cities
coast to coast. Together, we’re taking to the streets to prove that
people power — not oligarchs — will decide the future of our
democracy.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34249?t=1013&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]JOIN OUR REVOLUTION AT A NO KINGS EVENT NEAR YOU!

★ ★ ★

FIRE CARR - TRUMP’S CENSORSHIP CZAR

On Tuesday, Our Revolution activists confronted Trump’s censorship
czar at the FCC’s first open meeting since he pressured ABC
affiliates to pull Jimmy Kimmel Live! off the air.

“This was us using our free speech rights to tell Brendan Carr that
he can’t use threats as FCC chair to impinge those rights,” Our
Revolution deputy director Paco Fabián told [ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34250?t=1014&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]The Hollywood
Reporter.

Carr sat stone-faced while we chanted “Fire Carr, the censorship
czar!” — before Homeland Security officers escorted us out.

Trump and his cronies won’t silence our dissent. Free speech means
the right to call out corruption, oligarchy, and authoritarianism.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34251?t=1015&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]Sign the petition to FIRE CARR

★ ★ ★

EXPOSING PETER THIEL

After Our Revolution organized [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33956?t=1016&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]nationwide protests against
Palantir, we are showing up every week to protest outside Peter
Thiel’s bizarre ‘Antichrist’ book readings in San Francisco.

Peter Thiel, the Big Tech Oligarch behind Palantir, keeps cashing
taxpayer checks to build tools of surveillance and war.

It’s time to shine a light on Palantir’s shadowy operations: aiding
ICE’s real-time immigrant tracking, enabling deadly targeting in
Gaza, and using its tech to spy on us all.

★ ★ ★

From Wall Street to the Hamptons, we’re making it clear: Oligarchs
can't hide.

Our Revolution activists marched down Billionaires Lane — right past
the mansions of Trump and Cuomo’s oligarch donors to send a message:
the people are fighting back.

“The ultra rich should not be able to run away from the people they
are impacting with their political decisions,” Our Revolution
organizer Vincent Vertuccio told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34252?t=1017&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]Newsday. “We are building a
movement of people who say enough is enough, and we're willing to
disrupt business as usual.”

This is people power vs. oligarchy — and we’re not backing down. Our
activists are taking the fight to oligarchs’ doorsteps and our
organizers are knocking doors to get out the vote for candidates who
will challenge their power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34264?t=1018&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]DONATE TO POWER OUR CITIZEN ACTION TEAM

★ ★ ★

[10]Elect Progressives

★ ★ ★

UNITE FOR MAMDANI!

This week, Eric Adams dropped out of the NYC race under pressure from
Trump to consolidate the field against progressive champion Zohran
Mamdani.

Democratic leadership should be standing behind the democratically
elected nominee — not sitting on the fence as our movement hits the
streets and phones to elect Mamdani.

That’s why Our Revolution organizers went straight to Capitol Hill to
deliver 80,000 of your signatures directly to the offices of House
Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries and Senate Minority Leader Chuck
Schumer.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34253?t=1019&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]WATCH THE VIDEO HERE!

Unions and the grassroots are lined up behind Mamdani and now our
voices need to push Schumer and Jeffries over the line to give him
their endorsement, Our Revolution organizer Liz Hohenberger told
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34254?t=1020&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]Washington Examiner.

The pressure is on and we won’t let up until we get Zohran across the
finish line to fight for affordable housing, groceries, and
transportation for New Yorkers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34255?t=1021&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]TELL DEM LEADERS TO BACK MAMDANI

★ ★ ★

HELP ELECT ZOHRAN!

Our Revolution organizers have been pounding the pavement across the
all Five Boroughs: mobilizing votes on the streets, in the subways,
and in key neighborhoods we need to win this race.

But no matter where you are in the country, you can be part of our
voter turnout operation for Zohran Mamdani. Join us to make calls to
NYC voters Tuesdays, Thursdays, and Sundays through Election Day!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33961?t=1022&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]MAKE CALLS FOR MAMDANI

★ ★ ★

GRIJALVA VICTORY

Congratulations to Adelita Grijalva on her victory in Arizona’s 7th
District special election!

Not only does she carry forward the legacy of her late father, Raul
Grijalva, in this seat — but she will be a powerful new member of the
Congressional Progressive Caucus.

So of course MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson & GOP leaders are refusing to
swear her in — all to block Adelita from being the 218th vote forcing
release of the Epstein files.

This isn’t bureaucracy. It’s a COVER-UP. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34256?t=1023&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]Demand Speaker Johnson
swear in Adelita Grijalva NOW!

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is proud to endorse Cori Bush in her campaign to take
back Missouri’s 1st Congressional District.

A nurse, pastor, and activist from Ferguson, Cori has always fought
for working people with bold progressive policies like Medicare for
All, student debt cancellation, and climate justice.

She was targeted and unseated by millions in dark money spending from
corporate and pro-Israel super PACs — but together, we’re mobilizing
the grassroots to reclaim MO-1 and prove once again that when we
organize, we win.

★ ★ ★

NJ SLATE

Time to get out the vote in New Jersey! Our Revolution is backing an
exciting slate in Jersey City to grow our progressive footprint in
the Garden State:

James Solomon is running an exciting campaign for Mayor; joined by
At-Large candidates: Mamta Singh, Michael Griffin, and Roland
Lavarro; and City Council candidates: Denise Ridley in Ward A, Lorena
Loayza in Ward B; Dawn Giabalvo in Ward C; Veronica Akaezuwa in Ward
D; and Eleana Little in Ward E.

★ ★ ★

OHIO SLATE

We’re putting our endorsement behind three great candidates in
Dayton, Ohio, where progressives are building local power:

Shenise Turner-Sloss for Mayor, Darryl Fairchild for re-election as
City Commissioner, and Jacob Davis for City Commissioner.

★ ★ ★

PA SLATE

We have a great line up of candidates in Pennsylvania. Our Revolution
is proud to support Dylan Altemara for PA State House District 39,
Rich Forsman for Camp Hill Borough Council, Kyle McIntyre for Upper
Darby Township Council, and Nicki Williams for Judge of Elections in
District 2-1.

We’re also endorsing four progressives for Conestoga Valley School
District: Suze Louis, Sarah E. Kern, Melissa Clinton, and Tim Shea.

This is what Our Revolution was built for: electing bold progressives
at every level of government who will challenge the status quo and
put people over profit. Let’s show what grassroots power can do.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31227?t=1024&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]Help us ramp up our grassroots GOTV machine to elect progressives
up and down the ballot this November and hit the ground running for
2026 — every dollar helps!

★ ★ ★

[17]Elect Candidates

★ ★ ★

GOVT SHUTDOWN SURVEY RESULTS

We asked thousands of you — our grassroots members — what Democrats
should do during this government shutdown fight, and the results are
clear:

👉 98% say they support Democrats holding strong & refusing to fund
the government

👉 76% say they want Democrats to demand more than healthcare in
negotiations

Top demands:

❌ End the grift — no more contracts enriching Trump’s cronies &
family

❌ Stop authoritarianism — get troops off the streets, protect free
speech

The message is simple: Fight for us, or get out of the way.

★ ★ ★

[18]Action Center

★ ★ ★

10.7 CRYPTO CALL

Trump has turned the presidency into a get-rich-quick scheme for
himself and billionaire crypto donors—putting our democracy up for
sale while working people are left holding the bag.

Join our LIVE virtual rally with Sens. Chris Murphy (D-CT) and Tina
Smith (D-MN) on Tuesday, Oct. 7 in coalition with Indivisible,
Americans for Financial Reform, and People’s Action.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34257?t=1025&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]RSVP now to hear leaders, learn why the crypto agenda threatens
communities and democracy, and plan tactics to fight back against
crypto dark money.

★ ★ ★

LIVE CALL ON PROP 50!

Tune-in October 13th for a Live California Call with U.S. Rep Ro
Khanna and special guests as we organize to pass Prop 50 — the
Election Rigging Response Act.

This is how we fight back against Trump and the GOP’s dirty
redistricting scheme! [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34258?t=1026&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]RSVP HERE.

★ ★ ★

Our Mission: Fight Trump and the Oligarchy. We have built a powerful
network of organizers and activists — 60,000+ connected across the
country — and we’re getting to work!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28759?t=1027&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]Use this sign-up tool to plug in — and pick your top areas of
interest. Whether it’s pressuring lawmakers in their office or
amplifying the message online, there are tons of ways to help!

★ ★ ★

NEW MERCH FOR NO KINGS!

As we gear up for No Kings events nationwide, now is the time to pick
up some Defund Oligarchy Merch ahead of October 18!

Whether it’s a pack of rally signs or some No Kings buttons, every
purchase helps support our organizers as they mobilize turnout for
protests and get voters to the polls for Zohran Mamdani and
progressive candidates across the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?t=1028&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]GRAB YOUR MERCH!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31227?t=1029&akid=9460%2E5885482%2EVv8-v- ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★
