name: S.O.S
subject: Dems outflanked and outmaneuvered in marquee 2025 PA race
body:
Our battleground is the state that has been indispensable to the very Founding of our country and the preservation of American freedom and liberty for over 249 years: Pennsylvania.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S3L7ci0fReqM4A58RToGykdF0xH7jsw4x2bzdKtjLWptwL46KYhnkhjUq0-aj2zZKpArVA16lcQKpoHJmPxGmeL1vkjkd7LdGcQIRvkQYANzTnXrphxODwK3-dAsowmDNhqQFa2a_aNuAc3k-O6QYUMSnc94WB-4Tu_8CBD6shDsqGrAWMrocbGNdmFErftFDyXCbrka9wfJNKdO6vvVcUqJetJaTRetDeIz5VAj8yM=&c=5lKAKtvoJQmLKh_1u5or2pnvATxnbr-HumF6026QYHHc3QV3dNR5eg==&ch=gZ2IeKdU8vn2aCtRuL-R84nVZ4iXrT8wxRocd2HXrUFw31mdduU2aA==)
---
| Friend,
This is an urgent S.O.S. to every Democrat and every single American who knows the threat that Trump's unchecked power poses to our freedoms and democracy:
We are officially one month out from the marquee election of 2025 -- and in this contest it is all of us versus the fascist MAGA movement.
Our battleground is the state that has been indispensable to the very founding of our country and the preservation of American freedom and liberty for over 249 years: Pennsylvania.
Democrats' 5-2 majority on the state supreme court is responsible for preventing the GOP's darkest ambitions from ever becoming real: extreme abortion bans, rolling back voting rights, and allowing Trump to steal the presidential election in 2020.
Without this critical buffer, Pennsylvania would be a right-wing hellscape. That's why MAGA has been at a fever pitch working to turn this obscure 2025 judicial race into the victory that sets the stage for their biggest ambition yet: Trump 2028.
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S3L7ci0fReqM4A58RToGykdF0xH7jsw4x2bzdKtjLWptwL46KYhnkhjUq0-aj2zZKpArVA16lcQKpoHJmPxGmeL1vkjkd7LdGcQIRvkQYANzTnXrphxODwK3-dAsowmDNhqQFa2a_aNuAc3k-O6QYUMSnc94WB-4Tu_8CBD6shDsqGrAWMrocbGNdmFErftFDyXCbrka9wfJNKdO6vvVcVj9Ac1RJACnyqAwWzrz6rs=&c=5lKAKtvoJQmLKh_1u5or2pnvATxnbr-HumF6026QYHHc3QV3dNR5eg==&ch=gZ2IeKdU8vn2aCtRuL-R84nVZ4iXrT8wxRocd2HXrUFw31mdduU2aA==)
---
| MAGA has already attempted to abolish mail-in voting, and if they win on Election Day they will be given the green light to steal PA and cheat their way to a permanent victory.
Because the stakes are abnormally high for a judicial retention race, MAGA billionaires are preparing to launch a series of last-minute 8-figure broadsides with ads that deceive, lie, and mislead voters into kicking out all three Dem judges.
Democrats have been outflanked and outmaneuvered and time is running out to salvage this dire situation. We can't let these attacks go unanswered. This election is a critical check on Trump's authoritarian takeover of our country.
[Can you send in some critical reinforcements to help us reach the voters we need to show up to save PA? If you can, we urgently need donations to immediately counter the lies and disinformation being spread by MAGA billionaires:](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S3L7ci0fReqM4A58RToGykdF0xH7jsw4x2bzdKtjLWptwL46KYhnkhjUq0-aj2zZKpArVA16lcQKpoHJmPxGmeL1vkjkd7LdGcQIRvkQYANzTnXrphxODwK3-dAsowmDNhqQFa2a_aNuAc3k-O6QYUMSnc94WB-4Tu_8CBD6shDsqGrAWMrocbGNdmFErftFDyXCbrka9wfJNKdO6vvVcaETYngbXde37J6Sj7IpvuU=&c=5lKAKtvoJQmLKh_1u5or2pnvATxnbr-HumF6026QYHHc3QV3dNR5eg==&ch=gZ2IeKdU8vn2aCtRuL-R84nVZ4iXrT8wxRocd2HXrUFw31mdduU2aA==)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: re: Negotiating with Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek, this is the third time during my nearly 13 years in the Senate that I have been involved in a shutdown.
And they’re horrible. The consequences on those impacted — whether they’re federal workers or people who rely on government services — are immense, and no one relishes that in this body. Here in Virginia, the effects are felt especially hard with hundreds of thousands of federal employees and federal contractors whose livelihoods are disrupted and whose families face real uncertainty.
I’m completely confident that all 100 senators feel the same way: that this is not a good thing, and there needs to be a path forward.
So why are we in this situation?
The President gave House Republicans explicit instructions in their work to pass a funding bill: ‘Do not deal with Democrats.’
And the House, with the simple Republican majority, followed those instructions and passed a bill that then came to the Senate.
Senate Democrats believed we ought to prepare an alternative that could actually pass in the Senate, where we need 60 votes — not a simple majority. Much of it is the same, but there are two elements that are different:
First, our bill protects people’s health care after Trump’s so-called big, beautiful bill plunged us into a complete healthcare mess. What Democrats are asking for with this option is to fix some of the major problems that the “big, beautiful” bill gave us. And I’m heartened that a number of Republican colleagues have agreed that we sit around the table and figure it out.
Second, our bill protects the simple notion that everybody understands that a deal is a deal.
Throughout this year, we’ve seen congressional deals undone by the President unilaterally. Tens of thousands of people were fired. Economic development projects that had been announced and celebrated were canceled. Funds to public health agencies have been taken back.
Again and again and again, we’ve seen unilateral actions taken by the President that undo what Congress and the White House had agreed.
We should not write a bill, agree to it, celebrate reopening the government, and then have President Trump on Day Two start to fire a lot of people, or claw back more money from our states, or cancel more economic development projects.
I believe we can get this done. We can find a path forward to negotiate health care fixes, even if we don’t agree on all the details right now. We can reach an agreement that a deal is a deal — which is a reasonable request. And I’m going to do everything I can with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to make sure that we do.
Stay tuned for more updates on our work in the Senate to pass a funding bill that helps Americans and reopens the government.
—Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. name: The Democratic Party
subject: One month to go
body:
Here’s what you need to pay attention to:
---
Hi Derek, We just wanted to make sure this major deadline is on your radar. **Election Day is in _one month._** We know elections outside of presidential years might not be top of mind for a lot of folks, but that’s _exactly_ what makes them so important.

**Here’s what’s at stake across the country next month:**
* **In Virginia and New Jersey:** In both states, the governorship and other statewide and municipal offices are up for election. Keeping the governor’s seat in New Jersey blue and flipping the governor’s seat in Virginia will be _imperative_ to ensuring that state leadership can protect Virginians and New Jerseyans against even more harm from the Trump administration.
* **In California:** Proposition 50 — or the Election Rigging Response Act — is on the ballot this November as a defense against Trump’s efforts to rig next year’s midterms. This legislation would counter Republicans’ efforts to redraw the Texas congressional map. Passing this is key to defending our democracy.
* **In Pennsylvania:** On Election Day, voters will decide whether or not to retain their state Supreme Court justices for another 10-year term. These justices will continue to issue consequential rulings on issues that impact Pennsylvanians directly — from abortion funding to gerrymandering — and it is critical that justices Christine Donohue, Kevin Dougherty, and David Wecht all remain on the bench.

**At the DNC, we know there is no such thing as an off year. The outcome of November’s elections will have a meaningful impact on people’s lives.** As the organization best positioned to distribute resources where they’re most needed, we’re heavily investing in all of these states’ Democratic Parties to support on-the-ground organizing, reach voters, and ensure as many people as possible know what’s at stake this fall. [**This kind of work is only possible with the generosity of grassroots supporters just like you. So, Derek, will you pitch in $7 to the DNC today to ensure we can win these races in just a few weeks and even more races in the years to come?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?refcode=em_20251004_4749_fr&amount=7&refcode2=4749_22930333_5cio1m&akid=4749%2E22930333%2E5cio1m) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251004_4749_fr&refcode2=4749_22930333_5cio1m&akid=4749%2E22930333%2E5cio1m)**

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih0k5p516oqjcwv54bblm5574qy4864hh6q77weo4nbg6e0ljbt1e4m38p556tjy1f6d11ritm799lj23r168421nmhltf&__stmp=t3m48t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m48t&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m48t&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m48t&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m48t&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m48t&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m48t&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m48t&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m48t&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m48t&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m48t&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=34017q10ity9ikrr8k0dp4nlplbika5wlrkt8t1uaqkkgb5tm186m2srhaznij8crszupcjwq4dimja71krwwxoata4qpixynfdxyb130kb6xxaklbvw9dstejk7yxryylx798x1cont30xcxa8dju&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m48t&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---

clean_body: Please read the message below from Turning Point USA. Steve Thompson, Editor | | | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

clean_body: Peter, Trump's government shutdown is a MAGA mess. They can try shifting blame all they want, but at the end of the day, THEY blocked funding to keep healthcare affordable for millions of Americans and THEY'RE in control of Congress and the White House! More than 130,000 federal workers in our state [?] — many of whom are Black and Latino — are now facing missed paychecks because of the president's ego. DONATE to TOP PAC to build progressive political infrastructure to take on Trump and MAGA! [] [] Funding the government while putting the basic needs of families first shouldn't be political, but Republicans sure think so. This GOP-led Congress has never been more out of touch. PITCH IN today to help us pool the resources we need to reach more Texas voters for next year's midterms! [] Your contribution helps us get out the vote for REAL leaders who'll prioritize the needs of Texans, NOT a mad authoritarian. – Texas Organizing Project PAC [] Texas Organizing Project PAC 700 S Zarzamora, Suite 212 San Antonio, TX 78207 United States [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe using the link below.

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: MONDAY: Join Our Telephone Town Hall
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501304640%2501100762%2b-%2b10-03-2025%2beNewsletter%250115474.52470876.7505724.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501304640%2501100762%2b-%2b10-03-2025%2beNewsletter%250115474.52470876.7505724.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501)
---|---
| | | **October 4, 2025** |
---|---|---|---
| | |
### MONDAY: Join Our Telephone Town Hall
**Monday, October 6th at 5:00 pm, Senator Angela Alsobrooks and I are hosting a Telephone Town Hall** to answer your questions and provide an update on our efforts to end the Republican shutdown, support federal employees and contractors, stop Trump's illegal withholding of funds, and prevent a huge spike in health care costs. Senator Alsobrooks and I will be joined by special guest Rob Shriver, of Democracy Forward, who is leading the charge in our courts against the lawlessness of this Administration.

[To join our call, you can sign up to be dialed in here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15474.52470876.7505724.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fEForm.aspx%3f__cid%3dSenVanHollen%26__fid%3d100118&redir_log=709136313975569). By signing up, you will receive a phone call to join our Telephone Town Hall at approximately 5:00 pm on Monday evening. **The deadline to sign up to receive this call is** **Monday at noon**. If you'd like to listen in but not join the call via phone--or if you miss the sign-up deadline--you can also join [our livestream of the town hall on my website here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15474.52470876.7505724.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2flive&redir_log=942008812194262).

[For additional resources regarding the federal government shutdown, you can visit my website here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15474.52470876.7505724.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fgovernment-shutdown-resources&redir_log=063053597792448). We hope you can tune in Monday evening as we take your questions and provide answers on how we're fighting back during this unprecedented and challenging time.
Chris Van Hollen
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100064&__crop=15474.52470876.7505724.7517223)

# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=790%2E181023%2E8p9IZH)
The attacks on our elections just won’t stop.
Just take a look:
* John James said he was “screwed” during the 2020 election.
* Trump threatened mail-in voting last month — even though we know vote-by-mail is safe and makes voting more accessible.
* Trump's DOJ sued Jocelyn and the state of Michigan in a weaponization of the Justice Department.

The attacks on voting rights are coming from all sides.
**The best way to stand up for these rights? Electing a true champion of democracy as our next governor — that’s Jocelyn Benson.**
As Secretary of State, Jocelyn oversaw two of the highest turnout and most transparent elections in the state’s history. As governor, we can count on her to protect our voices and our votes.

I know a lot of folks are struggling.

The Trump administration has ripped away health care from millions of Americans to give more tax cuts to billionaires, fired thousands of our federal workers, shot up unemployment, and driven up costs – and Virginia’s families are feeling the pressure.

**That’s exactly why our elections in one month are so important.**

Over the next month, Virginians will head to the polls to elect our next Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General – _and_ to decide if Democrats maintain control of the General Assembly.

And everyone is watching us, Derek. **Americans are looking to Virginia’s election results as a referendum on the Trump administration** because our elections are one of the first major tests of Democratic strength in the Trump era.

We’ve got to turn out in record numbers to elect Democrats at the ballot box and send a message loud and clear:

**Voters are fed up with this Republican Party that has sold its heart and soul to whatever Donald Trump wants.**

And we can’t stop there. Our Commonwealth is at the center of Democrats' path to retaking control of Congress next year – because there’s simply no Senate majority for Democrats if we lose Virginia.

Here’s my point, Derek: the work to keep Virginia blue has already begun – and I need you to join me in this effort.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: A legislator called for Pramila Jayapal to be executed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

An Arizona state legislator just called for Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal
to be executed, Peter.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20251004-pj?refcode=em20251004-37078&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37078_1203867_DKsJzB&akid=37078%2E1203867%2EDKsJzB ]A screenshot of a post on X from The New Republic (@newrepublic): 'GOP
Official Calls for Democratic Congresswoman to Be Executed'. It includes a
link to an article with a picture of Pramila Jayapal speaking into a
microphone.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20251004-pj?refcode=em20251004-37078&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37078_1203867_DKsJzB&akid=37078%2E1203867%2EDKsJzB ]Please rush a split donation between Pramila Jayapal and Justice
Democrats right now to show your support for Pramila in this critical
moment.

This is an outrageous escalation. It’s not some anonymous threat, but an
elected official using violent rhetoric to target Pramila. And let’s be
clear about why they are threatening violence against Pramila.

Pramila is leading an unprecedented grassroots organizing effort to grow
our nonviolence resistance movement. Her Resistance Labs have brought
together thousands and thousands of volunteers from every single state in
the country.

The extreme right wing is terrified of the power of our nonviolent
progressive movement and they want to silence us. That’s why they
threatened Pramila.

But we aren’t scared. We can’t afford to be — not when so much is on the
line.

So when disgusting threats like this are made against leaders like
Pramila, our movement has to show strength. We will stand together and
keep fighting for justice.

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats An Arizona state legislator just called for Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal to be executed, Peter. [ ]A screenshot of a post on X from The New Republic (@newrepublic): 'GOP Official Calls for Democratic Congresswoman to Be Executed'. It includes a link to an article with a picture of Pramila Jayapal speaking into a microphone. [ ]Please rush a split donation between Pramila Jayapal and Justice Democrats right now to show your support for Pramila in this critical moment. This is an outrageous escalation. It’s not some anonymous threat, but an elected official using violent rhetoric to target Pramila. And let’s be clear about why they are threatening violence against Pramila. Pramila is leading an unprecedented grassroots organizing effort to grow our nonviolence resistance movement. Her Resistance Labs have brought together thousands and thousands of volunteers from every single state in the country. The extreme right wing is terrified of the power of our nonviolent progressive movement and they want to silence us. That’s why they threatened Pramila. But we aren’t scared. We can’t afford to be — not when so much is on the line. So when disgusting threats like this are made against leaders like Pramila, our movement has to show strength. We will stand together and keep fighting for justice. [ ]Will you split $5 between Justice Democrats and Pramila’s campaign to help us amplify our message and build a better future for us all? [ ]Contribute $5 In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Politivist Action PAC
subject: Cori is back and running for U.S. Congress AGAIN!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251004_icymiendorsingcori_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251004_icymiendorsingcori_act]
Peter,
She’s BAAAACCCKKKK!!!!!
In case you missed it, our founder Cori Bush has officially launched her return campaign for Missouri’s First Congressional District!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251004_icymiendorsingcori_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251004_icymiendorsingcori_act]
This is more than a campaign. It’s a movement reborn.
Last year, AIPAC megadonors and right-wing extremists spent millions to buy an opponent and unseat Cori. They saw an unbought, unbossed, democratically elected Black woman who stood for freedom and peace for everyone and thought they could silence her. Silence us.
They were wrong. While they may have gotten one round, she will not go quietly into the night.
Cori vowed that her fight wouldn’t end there, and it hasn’t. Since then , she’s founded Politivist Action PAC and launched Movement for Freedom under the committee with us, to uplift and empower grassroots leaders who will never bow to corporate power or extremist agendas. And now she’s back, running for Congress again, fueled by the same movement that shook St. Louis and inspired the nation.
We’re so inspired by her willingness and courage, but we don't want to send her to the lion’s den all alone. We need more than a squad. We want more Politivists to join her. Nominate a Politivist—someone like Cori—who embodies the courage and conviction this movement is all about that we can send to Congress with Cori. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/A0HEnbh1kU6x7g2WdGf4Vw2]
NOMINATE A POLITIVIST TODAY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/A0HEnbh1kU6x7g2WdGf4Vw2]
Together, we’ll show the world that no amount of big money can extinguish the power of the people.
In solidarity,
Politivist Action PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251004_icymiendorsingcori_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251004_icymiendorsingcori_act] Politivist Action PAC proudly supports grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all. Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded under Politivist Action PAC, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve.
Want to learn more? Visit our websites at PolitivistActionPAC.com [https://www.politivistaction.com/] and Movement4Freedom.com [https://www.movement4freedom.com] .
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251004_icymiendorsingcori_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251004_icymiendorsingcori_act&recurring=1]

Washington, DC
20033

name: VoteVets
subject: Insanity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Donald Trump declared war on American cities and the American people on Tuesday, and he told the top leaders of the United States Military that he would fire them if they didn’t go along with his plans.
#
Peter,
The biggest conversation in politics today is the government shutdown. Going extremely underreported is Hegseth and Trump’s speech before the entire corps of our most senior commissioned and non-commissioned officers.
We can’t let that speech be a blip. Because the fallout from it has implications just as serious — potentially even more so — as the shutdown.
Donald Trump declared war on American cities and the American people on Tuesday, and he told the top leaders of the United States Military that he would fire them if they didn’t go along with his plans. To use American cities as training grounds for their Troops. To prepare for war with “the enemy from within.” We know who that enemy is. It is us. Trump’s Deputy Chief of Staff, Stephen Miller, has already labeled the Democratic Party a “domestic extremist organization.”
These are not jokes. They are not kidding. This is their objective.
But one thing during that awful speech gave us hope. In the face of that insanity from their Commander in Chief, those senior leaders gave nothing. Pete Hegseth and Donald Trump were met with silence.
They thought they looked like George Patton up there. They thought these seasoned and professional leaders would break out in standing ovations. Instead, they got nothing.
VoteVets continues to have the utmost respect for our brothers and sisters in uniform. This is not what they signed up for. And as Trump and Hegseth work to destroy this critical pillar of American democracy, we stand ready to defend them.
We will always fight for our Troops, and for our Veterans. And if you are with us in that mission, please:
[**Make a contribution to VoteVets. We will put it directly to work.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct25.PLXLty&refcode=em251004-1-120&t=1&akid=34662%2E3013755%2Ex-2-Nl)

name: Pennsylvania Democratic Party
subject: this final month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
**One month.**

That’s all that stands between that frightened feeling we have under the new Trump regime, and a major victory for Pennsylvania. **It’s time for us to fight like hell.**

On November 4, 3 of our Supreme Court Justices are up for retention. And the richest man in Pennsylvania is spending **MILLIONS** in an attempt to fill our court with MAGA extremists.

**This election could decide the balance of our state Supreme Court for the next decade. Our courts are the last line of defense between Trump’s fascist agenda and Pennsylvanians. This is our chance to safeguard our democracy here in PA.**

**_[If we want to defend Pennsylvania, we need to build up our grassroots program in this final month. name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- Telephone Town Hall
body:
|

---
Dear friends and neighbors, I hope you can join me and Senator Chris Van Hollen for a telephone town hall this Monday, October 6, at 5:00 PM. We are in the midst of difficult times with this Republican government shutdown. Not only does it impact 750,000 furloughed employees and hundreds of thousands more working without pay, but it affects the American people who depend on the services that our patriotic civil servants provide. Senator Van Hollen and I will continue to work tirelessly for you: to end this shutdown and ensure middle and working class families continue to receive health care they can afford. Click [here to RSVP](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15534.12332743.5681267.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fEForm.aspx%3f__cid%3dSenVanHollen%26__fid%3d100118&redir_log=709136313975569) for the telephone town hall.
Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator
[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=15534.12332743.5681267.7190525)

Since launching my campaign for Colorado State Treasurer, I’ve been busy. I’ve been able to meet with people all over the state. I’ve gotten to meet with people all over the state. Take a look at some of my highlights:
* **Fundraiser in Colorado Springs & Durango**: We packed the house at ICONS in Colorado Springs and Union Social House in Durango, bringing together supporters who are excited to build a stronger, fairer economy for Colorado.

* **Fourth Annual Labor Day Labor Champion BBQ Dinner:** I joined our local Teamsters to celebrate some amazing union advocates that have made a real difference in the lives of the American Working Class.

[](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/Mjl-J_TTtVfz5jBz6s7TGx4PQgaUV3K8oNmaBY7EPxUpg_Hx7kVVCtJliTzLuvI-f_I87E65d3oELkefE5NqWNK7revVV7CPL8mMY-1WsS19rQs6L50BdfonvOOoXWrSzIV84vGjqfyoUc9DPycqyqYKL6PV_eE3x6CuLQ0YomCj8x15HOASFgmPmOip9uTVJT7igcZrE_gzY6gEJv906SA03HuleNscr1-6NmcOJRf0wZcN67VhJieKag5HWqr3Pm4BiAqoSQkU6INwP1VWf6htT2-F6UTMVIfkt2vbr4iUeLdmvgvuxJErHkc_YHaLe0oPuFs2Sq4VnIIRCtmNIXDDpJa5I8Ifnio5_u4wtDeYo1waE4oYcpNNq5wL9_OodUaCQn8I5P5bC01HG_Fp5RMl_I_PBIXSFze4FKzSmQ2RkbWwpAQQbfdiuyXLxP5vdSwEbpPCv2Wn906SPUe9_myEpqO153DKTjHyDx2ulxLwcrzJeEBA_c7Cdn7yN3kNqb79crEW1aGQT00DRZV8z4qCoEFCZ-JRPAgHYPsFivOj7b1xtlUeMBCgXCg8wHPl3esiLeYUTz1VXH7pojc6OvWVspn-sQlJHm38kK6wzyUwZIfjlLkNj2GMyE8x6VRUkY1eUyxcZam7FtHAdaJnMFjpvnkpY8hOHFzHl2dhDQtN4qpfr5jVkamE-K8Q8zYHoEjueNhtDMO5KnawMuaJ0LaYD7mMFctAgFDxy8_zvKD67mKZ2MukqnfCuRMEyU0g9NGEe5cehl0QZeIz1OZmXziCk8rcrjyKMw8iFstrORh4N8LqHRTQdADE7uhayhr4ffPbRYONkO6bGc_VYQU26n92khrYqB6cTa2X2SZuN3oxq0TizoLKKyd1pjPSBs1jYHjyCca-e-g3xrPFNhyFE_HCK_kjK-zBmD0dJhJksjGxL5saZRmWG5J0/afj7a1v2_eUqsUmcbejKGzfWirTLmqNK/13)

[](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/9IUQYYNOlHS2hvhq1kp3I0BnId5OuDIUXeTAuMl-7XYA0TWBHhQktaIxSPfNjU5w8qnwqtY_Ex7_g9OvsAFwuipL_ckrjZdEH1LhNJZupahF1m6ancpyLObR0WOw3i_k8MtkSKXuw1Dj6-BFJOu0dbvOU60_c2YiRbkWJ-wSDiXBhfnOIraau8G5Vfr-CMztJjwTiKTbmNBzRxRCyOAhHjG_bTHKrEn31CYHPCurXMVRg_M3GbaFFgzZZINjcYhgQxUxCdiXlV1WopWdRFZoYG1l0u8ybrrG8j8FINHqe1HxqaWHXsJ9T6NunVTCY_TCnvk740KBuS8VYFi1DBwmL19DWzHwFS-o9wX5cwU_IwhOjf1dDUWBSyg9GwR0YKRQfLGc2xL6MlQx38qVdJXDs8Swfw8T2FbjaE9SsmW3y53FiHWHM6Rcv_LaUSAqlIbaiyuINGblb-a7b3L2mKTyjqgoem8--4F07ra4nxRTVzzihCSb3x-wW0Gfp0V56XJ1dcycKsvmTzATzysvboXToWfLxxmHnNfzgCIRCVSJpXlZhPHn6wkIUgPNMeDgPP1WxAQfndj6_Rqnpgv3yAUFEx2NNcex73ZuFkalN_lMcPtM62bQ6L3u7TCynRI-vMVxnrseThdiD4McfX8wN6ygrwwEoxNywcx-ogr0MWIlv7iBWSjyMdPM6VfYKy0JZVh4DFEq16pEFzsUdsf748A1UjvkYYx1W7s-mTEq4o4fAWfZKxtWQ8KSDQr-1NGKLIUH57zX8ljJipIBdqD0fm1Tc6Q_fxS9nJVdeciTif54LD4Fg0bctTTLE_w2ERmc9sujqwKV6BTdaKgXxCEgonEqCE_Pqj4NxaxqBMAr4tBVcd2Ko_aZLABG4qI9U3OvwwBZVLBEOrQMbBSilh65oN0qyebstNFbFW7-lsniANb04kjwQ5SOoKkqrOtA/k39HIWafvAwOSv40QSN8q2IUD7oJcy6l/13)
* **Chroma Wellness Center Ribbon Cutting:** Denver made history with the launch of [Chroma Wellness Center](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/QbjV4gZsHHTgnc8z5JCuXu_V-Kk-XuDoOkAG4a5cB_scfeQHOAkUeahIxmtdh3Ern7Wzu1RYvshGjYuoY_SW_55Ys4GxVHQwC-NVImXlfuvsojh55tAUTyrzSSL-125Ehrq3g2zH_R14qmowEY0pYMHhsuV4yDGID86532dd3VcU04WfFk22wh3_Ij_AQ6XDcslVEtO1sCkhmdPODFuql3jqf-Wmsth_vov7mKWZ4EbWPIQRrCmqtBiXnLx305AOOsUfkBd6Bk-PtQMWrfphFUDkS5O-sXdv7TUyxxSeKn4cTNqKFTC-ZCG70BsFld2HtRm54cYoaY4uWIEuCRsnnTTqEXFq2vsbHrN7w3R3dXrcbv4M_XHxH9p4j1CrDY8gibgsCed4UG5vDPZt9cRY-KE/ktZovBWbQBfG7gnwllqqclVNwt4EVcMt/13) – the city’s first LGBTQIA+ mental health and addiction treatment program. I was proud to celebrate with founder Ryan Sturdevant and the community as we opened a space built by and for those who need it most.

[](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/UPnhhTP0TsqYLCdkf0BI7RNeQGPxbcRACks7rytSm_-1XjuQQzFT3hK90vthhJfC2Or_DMCojTfnQ8x-jQqSF0qgGTQ9LrcUNUofWfclU7rDr1dn1LEkBj9Z28HrxbOJrXieUKyZEaCE2dFfsZWoL_NNfoAtSlag7sEOu3YTadftqeUvrI9PBUtYeT75YZPq6RQgLefqucIe2snqLg4vVLtPRiQ3ngddd55exxOq4PhNLOHbZCIO4J617DnlnmNjWIjhRSFo09soZ3-cbarqgacx87Z5RqA2cc9FtA-l2GJlgOJM4fZKrtxBJDLQsTYL9h1a5hXS-a6EE6oo-qyAsDubPn0-yzlMnSUQGZi12kgdUhLyZpZ04YQXVz2faOiYYg2mbxSmNKKC_lhjPEzog_l-dGTZlZk3P25N3qqHwOVaSgTOt3Qdm0cHxO2OX4T598egipj-vUtLinMFFmhYkj9G2MD5bKKWGDK09THnvQ4mcXX6x7HJyGo4CZgcaUWx0a0t1qcU4D37hn_kEN4xdiccUZJ7N5955pExT7NuyKhxLNoPUHIYKhQIEupIYuR6pKzY9op9gmCPf6RWmWzkOVesGhbtvclX2znnUFoOlMhqvs9rQIgIe-EL7DIlyYnZinMIaD54J_jCB4CCNkzMd-AcbrokYNNuQNus91NUfdsDZr_qA5_B9qpv9TYetfzKj3JWKIsWg80HgGlD12MQvHsWR7Hwdbdm_r-f8LpGZ5Bq5fLWHNs3RrZQn-2gK1Urvw_vnmu-HDEIn2wHNaad5XuhXN4cIRBUm1ONkd2KfTFlpwdH4-cg0Hjn356hSmEB595XnV_ycpzTejlRunJfHjA0HCqtUduVzcS1tiFNudgBPZfGZ7Mvi-n3wKlJBZYG5fPDPS966hLLOHvT1a6cVxvpXLrcoW1X5s1kYy8d-U60NsOKhNHS_BjC/VL2VgghAZct74IS6BtaJvQ2cX3wilK_R/13) _Brianna with Ryan Sturdevant CEO & Founder of Chroma Wellness Center_
* **Volunteer Day at the Foodbank of the Rockies:** While in Grand Junction for a meet & greet at Gemini Brewery, [I took time to volunteer at the Food Bank of the Rockies](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/WYDBB3RJRYmvVQayCLRqHPJkmAUeog9-ipqR7JylS-Qb2PKpp_tDWozzM_N0D5F1OuZuVTVw6BW3OADF7mxZyPTT56Y0XY1W5XLAr9Vb1XkOkFAM6TliGwDFhmrmbMSLeXr-EogZkDYvyunG8IjbxS1myyQ0dWcG53SoZygDXzmi8WRsLmjflmHHRKcCLTFxztlsusFJ05EVrPHUKtfIEFWkl5AGS39kdg1oRmdWnrmBSFkYMV1orl4kYFHwa1AMB7uSieGacGyR0fdC6G9atguioMWDcOpQk3ELLyhV1gbaHqURfIUNg9QnNqrlmpLh2nXF3GANE0CitycL67TgWgE_CHxcHkr9UlzW_qZmOXTs-B7Ni0GdyLlyvLTXAtO2xP7YjLil-0VJKI7j_0iay0Bi6vKUT2lFIxH3hSDCwdfGA4Lux_Jryfa7QsMlyqsZBfyAOsn3a7fJ52MMyeAPLBtKHinvnTw_FSvG-T-YPZ00jwcYgBm1/0SctXSpXYtIMGWlX5wxAlKwx71OmCKLb/13). Giving back is a priority for me, and I make it a point to serve whenever I can.

* **Spoke at Boulder’s Big Bill Fallout Emergency Town Hall:** I will always stand with Coloradans demanding fairness and accountability in our tax system – and pushing back against corporate giveaways and billionaire tax breaks that hurt working families.

clean_body: Since launching my campaign for Colorado State Treasurer, I’ve been busy. I’ve been able to meet with people all over the state. Take a look at some of my many highlights from the past month: | | | Peter – Since launching my campaign for Colorado State Treasurer, I’ve been busy. I’ve gotten to meet with people all over the state. Take a look at some of my highlights: Fundraiser in Colorado Springs & Durango: We packed the house at ICONS in Colorado Springs and Union Social House in Durango, bringing together supporters who are excited to build a stronger, fairer economy for Colorado. Fourth Annual Labor Day Labor Champion BBQ Dinner: I joined our local Teamsters to celebrate some amazing union advocates that have made a real difference in the lives of the American Working Class. Creek Week Cleanup: Service is at the heart of everything I do. During Colorado Springs’ Creek Week, I rolled up my sleeves at Pikeview Reservoir to help protect our waterways and keep Colorado’s natural beauty thriving for generations to come. Chroma Wellness Center Ribbon Cutting: Denver made history with the launch of – the city’s first LGBTQIA+ mental health and addiction treatment program. I was proud to celebrate with founder Ryan Sturdevant and the community as we opened a space built by and for those who need it most. Brianna with Ryan Sturdevant CEO & Founder of Chroma Wellness Center Volunteer Day at the Foodbank of the Rockies: While in Grand Junction for a meet & greet at Gemini Brewery, . Giving back is a priority for me, and I make it a point to serve whenever I can. Spoke at Boulder’s Big Bill Fallout Emergency Town Hall: I will always stand with Coloradans demanding fairness and accountability in our tax system – and pushing back against corporate giveaways and billionaire tax breaks that hurt working families. Brianna at the Big Bill Fallout Emergency Town Hall I also ended the last fundraising quarter in September with high momentum thanks to strong grassroots support from people all across the state. And I’m looking to have a great fundraising quarter again. This campaign thrives on strong grassroots support because that’s how we win elections. – Brianna P.S. We have fundraisers all across the state coming up - Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. **** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: I'm locked in
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207nbitn2sxjkok51tlqm6bq11jgmd2svbxa0r1s2h0wx3tekkp3wypr0ijaql84hhjd5er82ub8fmjsrts&__stmp=t3m5qh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m5qh&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3dq228yrp2k2rqa7wv8wapo2cnd7rbe7ghhh96cz5dneta4zpgfmjqgjg3ksg1qigzslntrv04f8pichf91iw5xmr34wzx5jmtx364rhdbkhdxvjjmhugqwf1l38xr8cswbimzlhjs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m5qh&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m5qh&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m5qh&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m5qh&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3dq228yrp2k2rqa7wv8wapo2cnd7rbe7ghhh96cz5dneta4zpgfmjqgjg3ksg1qigzslntrv04f8pichf91iw5xmr34wzx5jmtx364rhdbkhdxvjjmhugqwf1l38xr8cswbimzlhjs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m5qh&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3m5qh&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| | Hi Peter, it’s Team Davis here. **Today is Lt. Gov. Austin Davis’ birthday!** On his birthday, we want to thank him (and you, his supporters!) for the work he’s done in just under two years as Lieutenant Governor. In this time, he’s put the people of the Commonwealth in the forefront of everything he’s accomplished, from funding after-school programs to working on increasing protections for our coal miners and more! We know that we are living in unprecedented times where every day is a new challenge. Austin is running for re-election to help **further the stability of our state.** We can **_count on him_** to stand up for families, no matter their income, and make sure everyone has a fair shot at a better future.

In this time, he’s put the people of the Commonwealth in the forefront of everything he’s accomplished, from funding after-school programs to working on increasing protections for our coal miners and more! We know that we are living in unprecedented times where every day is a new challenge. Austin is running for re-election to help further the stability of our state. Peter, there is only one month left in our campaign for Governor.
I'm going to lay out where the race stands in a moment, but first, I'm counting on your support to power our voter outreach over these final 31 days. _**[If you're ready to help us _flip_ this seat, win up and down the ballot in Virginia, and set an example for the rest of the country, please make a contribution before midnight →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116583005/573882321/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjI4MmE0MDYtMzdhMS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=z329-sRfotrxhZqrnJLko3t3gAVgOxK8VrCcZilvQ4E=)**_
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116583006/573882322/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjI4MmE0MDYtMzdhMS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=z329-sRfotrxhZqrnJLko3t3gAVgOxK8VrCcZilvQ4E=)
---
For months, we've heard experts describe this election as the biggest flip opportunity of 2025 — and that's true.
**No other Democrat in the country is in a position to flip a Governor's office from red to blue.**
And while the polls show the race tightening, and while we've certainly seen an increase in negative ads and far-right disinformation here in Virginia, what I want you to know is this:
_I will not be distracted._
The people of our Commonwealth deserve a Governor who will forgo the partisan politics that have created chaos in Washington and instead keep her focus on lowering costs, creating jobs you can raise a family on, and making our schools the very best in the nation.
It warms my heart that so many see our campaign as a beacon of hope at a dark moment in our country's history. _Now, it may be my name on the ballot, but this is a team effort._
**_[The only way we win is if we all do our part, so I'm asking again: Will you contribute $25 or even more to my campaign for Governor of Virginia today? clean_body: It may be my name on the ballot, but this is a team effort. = Peter, there is only one month left in our campaign for Governor. I'm going to lay out where the race stands in a moment, but first, I'm counting on your support to power our voter outreach over these final 31 days. = = For months, we've heard experts describe this election as the biggest flip opportunity of 2025 — and that's true. No other Democrat in the country is in a position to flip a Governor's office from red to blue. And while the polls show the race tightening, and while we've certainly seen an increase in negative ads and far-right disinformation here in Virginia, what I want you to know is this: I will not be distracted. The people of our Commonwealth deserve a Governor who will forgo the partisan politics that have created chaos in Washington and instead keep her focus on lowering costs, creating jobs you can raise a family on, and making our schools the very best in the nation. It warms my heart that so many see our campaign as a beacon of hope at a dark moment in our country's history. Now, it may be my name on the ballot, but this is a team effort. = = = = = = = I'm grateful beyond words to have so many supporters like you in my corner. Talk soon, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

name: James Talarico HQ
subject: Radical “lunatic”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter -- The attacks are already starting.
Ken Paxton personally attacked James. He called him a “lunatic” and accused him of “distorting Christianity.”
The NRSC, the campaign arm of Senate Republicans, has tried to smear James. They claim he’s a radical for supporting things like...universal background checks — which the vast majority of Americans support.
These baseless and absurd smears are why so many people are sick of politics.
[**But the political establishment won’t go down without a fight. If you’re ready to flip tables to upend our broken status quo, please consider making a contribution to James’ campaign for the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251004-1-ak&t=1&akid=93%2E1347274%2ECGqAwM)
Maybe this nonsense is the best our opponents have right now.
But these kinds of attacks tell us one thing for certain: they’re scared of the people-powered movement we’re building.
National Republicans are already rushing in to try to keep Texas rigged.
Right-wing super PACs have pledged at least $10 million already to try to buy this seat.
Soon enough, they will resort to spending millions on ads with complete lies about James. Billionaires and corporate mega-donors are going to line up to fill their war chest to stop our momentum and stop our movement.
They will spend whatever it takes. So it’s our job to have James’ back.
[**Please make a $3 donation today to ensure we have the resources to fight back against these attacks. We have to be ready for whatever they throw at us.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251004-1-ak&t=2&akid=93%2E1347274%2ECGqAwM)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: I'm so grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Can you do me a favor?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=941%2E49239%2EbRthp4)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6210?t=2&akid=941%2E49239%2EbRthp4)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6211?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=941%2E49239%2EbRthp4)
Hi null,

Before anything else, I want to say _thank you_. I can’t even begin to express how much it means to me to have you stand beside me as we fight to keep Michigan blue.
Thanks to your support, we’ve had an incredible start: **_Multiple_ polls have shown me leading my MAGA Republican opponent, Mike Rogers.**
That’s HUGE. And even though my lead is within the margin of error, it shows we’ve got real momentum and that working people in Michigan are sick and tired of Trump’s chaos agenda.
But now we need to keep our momentum going. And I want to make sure I’m focused on the issues that matter most to you and your family. null, **[will you take 60 seconds to complete my official Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6211?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=941%2E49239%2EbRthp4)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6211?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=941%2E49239%2EbRthp4)
---
Your feedback will help guide this campaign every step of the way, from the messages we share to the voters we reach out to all across this great state.
**I love Michigan. I grew up here – surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work.** My parents ran a landscaping business, and from a young age, I learned what it meant to put in a full day’s work to build a better future for your family.

I’ve spent my career doing just that. During the Great Recession, I helped lead President Obama’s Auto Rescue, helping save over 200,000 Michigan jobs. Then in 2018, I flipped a Republican-held House seat blue – and helped Democrats take back the House majority.
Now, I’m raising my hand again, this time to fight for Michiganders in the U.S. Senate.

null, I can’t do it alone. This campaign is built by and for grassroots supporters like you. Haley Stevens

name: Aria, United We Dream
subject: Read More: Immigrant kidnappings have reached an unprecedented level.
body:
Recent data confirms that our communities are facing unprecedented challenges steeped in abuse and neglect. | | | Peter, **** TIME reports that our neighbors and loved ones are being kidnapped and disappeared at a higher rate than ever before.1 The data confirms what we already know: our communities are facing unprecedented challenges steeped in abuse and neglect. **Here are the key takeaways:** → Immigrant families everywhere are being torn apart on a near-daily basis, as families with children are now being detained. → When our families, friends, and neighbors — _the people who power our communities_ — are deported without due process, it hurts all of us. → We need to ramp up our efforts to equip organizers across all 50 states with the tools they need to inform and mobilize their communities. When immigrants’ rights are at stake, all of our lives are at stake. Now more than ever, we have to have each other’s backs. **It’s time to get organized, but we can only do that with your support.**__[**Please, donate any amount right now to fuel our work to keep the pressure on our elected officials and take a stand for immigrants’ rights:**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAekMDT887VITlFf_D1bXsJIswJ51rUGNkfFLqmAti84mCKKGBo_FEHgwYdW0V-Rt5zP7sQqfVeeKWhmU2BpnQr2SyEYf8E93FH4V9GZ_D7red28OPMyU_9gHppgVDYJkGr0aV28PhZroX8SvCDg0DWqhugIe0wzToy1JJ4UkqK0jxszK0CgYgHMkp7fFsb0u4OP1w1u1sKf1hmIzJeLnExyH8eBSo6LekuCJ9zfcc7du5ofsLDhMm5URRH764wjG4gbyHRm4yVx-dX3He_bQsoYRcw_nPORIKr0EHQPFHTn-RcI8_oi46k7-HcaGXV-08vozz5c2YB0QA5mwUPR927v4_gBkcicq67-_TjSEIpGg5DFJ1BGCdy2INoML1BtYCtogrAv7Y57b63r8pTYiXPrCOsGINfwIC45zKXGmBS41AH0Yk9rabel0iMgicWCfNS_Vw9-qIt8HbK3HVj2JG7xQ/4kg/dAT4qx9nRBe7YO5gW5Fcfg/h0/h001.jfDaZvcz1k0-jOPwTOxau4s3KtYjEmlwviEVxQRfhCg) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAekMDT887VITlFf_D1bXsJIswJ51rUGNkfFLqmAti84mCKKGBo_FEHgwYdW0V-Rt5zyNG0teo6Rmxa52SVI5gZFnA2M7g6XV3x_mgIAOFJOwWvAs7TT5iL72IQ_Y-C3h16n7sijQq1iisOR2W-uwHzpQrme_PDu3GsDg0UQKYT2RBR6Zw7ZdzQQNUCJbXMt_Y3AKGmVc3s91VERFfStoWr8bKoFbzqUEuP2PiVznH9qNtZv36V_Cxx8gZ9VrWL4wqVsGBvM0Aus6NTgLjQg2moloGKgBXmfHZj5SAz4LwkCwblozeDynzfBdw2_JoTv69DKvLOqj_NpXje6YGcgZimtkXoNIw_I_1cpdWUI7Gr2Uw0CG6434l7ds6WWpsWmoH3kOCICtQliZEJxyIvzBvIZvm-HIMgdrm5ANAu7rFSU57PP3-zLyMkks7tjO4JBomXh_W0bcFE3YJbx81p0SDUsFqjtqKixRZdhO4nEn2xwDo/4kg/dAT4qx9nRBe7YO5gW5Fcfg/h1/h001.c_DOV9m_UhvtdL6WfsjfO2FOxbNrE58M3b-lpySV8yo)

clean_body: Recent data confirms that our communities are facing unprecedented challenges steeped in abuse and neglect. | | | Peter, ** TIME reports that our neighbors and loved ones are being kidnapped and disappeared at a higher rate than ever before.1 The data confirms what we already know: our communities are facing unprecedented challenges steeped in abuse and neglect. Here are the key takeaways: → Immigrant families everywhere are being torn apart on a near-daily basis, as families with children are now being detained. → When our families, friends, and neighbors — the people who power our communities — are deported without due process, it hurts all of us. → We need to ramp up our efforts to equip organizers across all 50 states with the tools they need to inform and mobilize their communities. When immigrants’ rights are at stake, all of our lives are at stake. Now more than ever, we have to have each other’s backs. It’s time to get organized, but we can only do that with your support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. Never forget that we power each other — not with greed or by inflicting suffering, but with love, tenacity, and unshakeable courage to show up and work for a better future where everyone can thrive. Thank you for being there, Aria, United We Dream | 1. “What the Data Reveals About Trump’s Push to Arrest and Deport More Migrants.” TIME. June 11, 2025 Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Andrew Hayman
subject: Before MAGA reaches them and poisons the well
body:
We need people to remember the conversation they had with a real person about the truth of the Democrat Justices records.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fJh3qqLqP-7MxhYBjgYm2kic1RZl-EP84jBhTzEe1ZzhgOt5njmXnrREqI6mPlP4Z3BHZfPhKiglDbMNkMKyrmKBCmd04JOlaLC5iemRjsHspV3YEP4GtuIXI9mWCETdald1muH_-I_0qAN7Fo8TXX_oLbRcYmLQMpq5l5Ec0deSzfbB5S3X4wIGiOzincR2rmSb0HZWw-SBNBPiWG1WS1xYcRn4vjabpT-R-QXVO4M=&c=W8jDcIiAl7ruko88T5e3fC98g-wHoi4K9Ipv27aamXItloHMpRXriA==&ch=O2EqH1SxgjQFJgitg8VYH2kYkHu_yF6yOaSzFMvSHF_K-_im-plMSw==)
---
| Friend,
My name is Andrew Hayman. I am the field director for Defend Our Courts.In case you don't know what a field director does, I oversee and manage the campaigns strategic voter persuasion, voter contact, and get out the vote operations.
The November PA Supreme Court retention election is the most important election of 2025 for Democrats.
If MAGA defeats the 3 Democrats on the court up for retention, they will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--allowing them to seize complete control of PA from Dems and maintain a grip on the White House for at least a decade.
In less than four months, Defend Our Courts has solidified itself as one of the most important Democratic organizations working to contain MAGA's surprise breakthrough in this race. Though the situation is dire we've been putting up one hell of a fight:
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fJh3qqLqP-7MxhYBjgYm2kic1RZl-EP84jBhTzEe1ZzhgOt5njmXnrREqI6mPlP4Z3BHZfPhKiglDbMNkMKyrmKBCmd04JOlaLC5iemRjsHspV3YEP4GtuIXI9mWCETdald1muH_-I_0qAN7Fo8TXX_oLbRcYmLQMpq5l5Ec0deSzfbB5S3X4wIGiOzincR2rmSb0HZWw-SBNBPiWG1WS1xYcRn4vjabvJbkScjEx3E=&c=W8jDcIiAl7ruko88T5e3fC98g-wHoi4K9Ipv27aamXItloHMpRXriA==&ch=O2EqH1SxgjQFJgitg8VYH2kYkHu_yF6yOaSzFMvSHF_K-_im-plMSw==)
---
| Here's what we've accomplished in less than four months:

* Raised over 2 million dollars and have hired over 100+ staff members.

* Deployed thousands of volunteers to knock doors across PA.

* Are regularly hosting canvases that reach over 10,000 doors knocked.

* PA Dems are being saturated with millions of our digital ads, mailers, calls, and text messages.

At the end of the day, most Democrats we talk to still don't know that there is even an election in November. So, the more people we speak to, the more votes we get, which is why we're going all out with texts, door knocks, calls, and digital ads.
And now we also have to worry about the MAGA billionaires targeting Democrats with mailers and digital ads meant to deceive them into voting "no" against the Democrat Justices.
They are telling Democrats that these judges are "against women's rights" and that they "protect pedophiles"--insidious lies meant to confuse Democrats into voting against their own interest as the Justices party affiliation won't appear next to their name on the ballot.
We need voters to remember the conversation they had with a real person about the truth of the Democrat Justices records, rather than the monsters that dark money MAGA PACs are trying to make them out to be.
[We have 31 days until Election Day. This final month will be a high stakes race to reach as many PA Democrats before MAGA reaches them and poisons the well. Can we count on you to rush a donation of $50 or whatever you can spare to help us fuel our final push?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fJh3qqLqP-7MxhYBjgYm2kic1RZl-EP84jBhTzEe1ZzhgOt5njmXnrREqI6mPlP45lnyiYF4CaflLmwNwh6mB1E-BesihO9LuoerD-OtLMCAPoTb22U7D2mZeowGsaeYKzedT53Kv76Ccpl4qtzZdhG0cXIrjiAAOjs9vSz5-xzFUEMOkdmUm3soLX3Kxh67XY-WyOyopNWRbXkIdO5W4n9rzds4bgJmkxf2Tcx9C5a1dSUdOXxdO8gpqcTy3BzM&c=W8jDcIiAl7ruko88T5e3fC98g-wHoi4K9Ipv27aamXItloHMpRXriA==&ch=O2EqH1SxgjQFJgitg8VYH2kYkHu_yF6yOaSzFMvSHF_K-_im-plMSw==)

clean_body: We need people to remember the conversation they had with a real person about the truth of the Democrat Justices records. | | | | | == | Friend, My name is Andrew Hayman. I am the field director for Defend Our Courts.In case you don't know what a field director does, I oversee and manage the campaigns strategic voter persuasion, voter contact, and get out the vote operations. The November PA Supreme Court retention election is the most important election of 2025 for Democrats. If MAGA defeats the 3 Democrats on the court up for retention, they will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--allowing them to seize complete control of PA from Dems and maintain a grip on the White House for at least a decade. In less than four months, Defend Our Courts has solidified itself as one of the most important Democratic organizations working to contain MAGA's surprise breakthrough in this race. Though the situation is dire we've been putting up one hell of a fight: | | == | Here's what we've accomplished in less than four months: Raised over 2 million dollars and have hired over 100+ staff members. Deployed thousands of volunteers to knock doors across PA. Are regularly hosting canvases that reach over 10,000 doors knocked. PA Dems are being saturated with millions of our digital ads, mailers, calls, and text messages. At the end of the day, most Democrats we talk to still don't know that there is even an election in November. So, the more people we speak to, the more votes we get, which is why we're going all out with texts, door knocks, calls, and digital ads. And now we also have to worry about the MAGA billionaires targeting Democrats with mailers and digital ads meant to deceive them into voting "no" against the Democrat Justices. They are telling Democrats that these judges are "against women's rights" and that they "protect pedophiles"--insidious lies meant to confuse Democrats into voting against their own interest as the Justices party affiliation won't appear next to their name on the ballot. We need voters to remember the conversation they had with a real person about the truth of the Democrat Justices records, rather than the monsters that dark money MAGA PACs are trying to make them out to be. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Thank you in advance for your support. Andrew Hayman Field Director Defend Our Courts | | == | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Today is Rep. Ilhan Omar’s birthday — send her a message! 🎉
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251004-1557-foote&t=1001&akid=1557%2E342411%2Esz1XOI ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Today, we celebrate Representative Ilhan Omar — a true trailblazer, a
fighter for working families, and a pivotal member of the Squad. From
standing up for affordable healthcare to pushing bold progressive change,
Ilhan inspires all of us every single day.

To mark her birthday, we at the Squad Victory Fund are putting together a
card filled with messages from supporters like you — people who are part
of this movement and who always stand with her.

Every message reminds Ilhan that she’s not just fighting for change in
Congress — she’s inspiring a movement across the country. Let’s make sure
she feels our gratitude and support on her special day.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem-IO-birthday-card-25/?source=em20251004&t=1002&akid=1557%2E342411%2Esz1XOI ]Will you sign this birthday card and add a personal message to Ilhan?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem-IO-birthday-card-25/?source=em20251004&t=1003&akid=1557%2E342411%2Esz1XOI ]Happy Birthday, Ilhan

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem-IO-birthday-card-25/?source=em20251004&t=1004&akid=1557%2E342411%2Esz1XOI ]SIGN THE CARD

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

The Squad is leading the fight against Trump and MAGA Republicans’
attacks on our democracy — but they need all of us in this fight.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251004-movement.MVliSh&refcode=em20251004-1557&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=1557%2E342411%2Esz1XOI ]Pitch in today to stand with the Squad and power this movement
forward.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251004-movement.MVliSh&refcode=em20251004-1557&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=1557%2E342411%2Esz1XOI ]Contribute ››

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1557%2E342411%2Esz1XOI

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Senator Tim Sheehy
subject: Navigating chaos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Democrats are outraising us, and they're voting in elections that, to put it simply, we're not voting in. Recently, voter complacency in Iowa cost Republicans a super-majority in the Iowa Senate. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3fb775904809442d95eaab968dabaabc&_e=DtuPOwywGZ-0apqoh9rPKFdaLmhsaPrNPNqAO1aBFvG7e2KzKq7_5D2aYKeY4r2UIDC3ubV40-HEHxNuJ43DsSrJOCXfSL_eA-ZHFzsSiRD0BTqQKHoKE6X3VAKWKpD-ajYyt_zZKCE7EUPhQ12AR8dHzYjKNpSsI53_1sj_gWL9n_G0CSPZjwmtOpcTGd7uj-AHfPlsj3PDD8OWmx4K5ps9l7KRpO4B0Bu_TFCEdyvcYPNp672xCvrinYHHUNe70Ro0zaAStNJKCqDk1zdVpg4JxonyQiPycblhMvDgVcGJ4DGBbCbgXFw25M9S-C0FVcZp3uJGjpZDdWT0sFkq4sdnz4EQp9SCj15J2-hwel2YccadPrNKFXE-MgwY_BmzFbUtwf8fN9356e_fkmHF82iKG6dCqbdziBr-KSG69VLYU1qHWOSeMkMb5OcN5mVsn4_NC5_4Ed97Blj9SJzdrCuRO6aQhZ1mg0n_liiBnVIzSHxYo56aQrWNvn1xoiFyADA1LEzuO1aaMNTiKeG0qLAtTKKs-fStaLtXqU7jS2zq1SiC0CdsAs0MkHm10qqTuc93GsJnNl_KmrB5vYG9n1OIMyqnLx7-Qv7x2zpmnNKdjp23VzgknYKEhlOYM96ajryM8p_DmPjGtvGp1dx_5Zar6f58qqKIcNcpR_GYUd5tZJ7EBgw3YxqkKfQtwSssI-oUr_T13v2DrKxMmlahnQH-_f6d_bG8NXcLwTXCi1j-zJjqQSb9DLT-fpkslhaQG6R0gZfJK3C2wCiVtlqluw%3D%3D)

Peter,

The partisan divide gripping our nation has turned Washington into a warzone of its own—fierce, unrelenting, and filled with entrenched elites more interested in power than progress.

_**As a Navy SEAL, I've faced harsh environments and impossible odds, from battlefields abroad to the political arena at home. Those experiences taught me how to stay calm under pressure, broker compromise, and accomplish the mission—no matter the stakes.**_

I'm Sen. Tim Sheehy, and I'm in the U.S. Senate to serve you, not the special interests or partisan extremists. The liberal media and their allies attack me for my resolve to challenge the status quo and expose the waste and corruption draining our nation. They fear leaders who put America first and refuse to bow to their agenda.

My SEAL background gives me a unique perspective:**I know how to navigate chaos, build bridges, and lower temperatures in even the most hostile settings.** In Congress, I'm fighting for practical solutions—securing our borders, strengthening our economy, and restoring accountability in government.

**But I can't do it alone.**

Democrats are outraising us, and they're voting in elections that, to put it simply, we're not voting in. Recently, voter complacency in Iowa cost Republicans a super-majority in the Iowa Senate.

What happens when that complacency extends to U.S. House and Senate races?

We lose.

I can't abide by that - and I don't believe you can either - _**so I'm sounding the alarm right now.**_

Peter, I need your support to keep pushing for a stronger, united America. Together, we can reject the elites' divisive tactics and build a future that honors the sacrifices of our forefathers.
