Peter,

Zimmerman, MN, was something else.

Liberals rolled in to protest our GOP event — yelling, waving signs, the usual George Soros-funded chaos. **That’s “tolerant,” right?**

But when two Black men — myself included — stood up to counter-protest? **Suddenly, we’re _angry, crazy, dangerous._**

They call this “White privilege”? Please.

**What they really can’t handle is a Black man in a MAGA hat with a bullhorn telling the truth.**

**It’s like they have an allergic reaction.**

They expect us to stay silent while they push their communist agenda. **[Not anymore.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=422a9b4c79474a50830123390a9dbec8&_e=h3vEZtXwaa9CHI-1ALfdPB8W2z3b5jqi8zfewmufv2y3zKfwh306wMVkLTyx6ccrzG069v-4wy6KTZJPBgKtnKxXtwYFTKsMul-Q3vZ7NCUiqPjMmTYLsJYk-klcCNuPp0RtP42XbadJ4--Cv_nEWEw-L-oCGEtB1hO_Hf_9Q1Pe_GxEsk5IJpyXRh4CrYwCh119_p-tuZIGxWk4epcWBOtbUq2LINCDcSy2FG7O109j2a-EEsfI3auitTq2CQGoBBFOkidSShKahPzFaDUBSIUHavLc16zcciPUQWtA5BDqwxBCneAy-gf3LM5lcYGE4DGPgdDvl3PfOVdcxxH6Uct1UdrvtCoDPDLA8ZxYjGroF0Ut8TTUh7N1yygrju4D3i0ycTBYHeQkYu7_FnNxpp4t5LQ2XVO5HfqR1aLceO6uQjclwb7ppu5_Xz9B5RKVrHF_l5bSFDPxoOTcQcM6OZKi3L9qcIN3LHh1zXAZkHhhNqTeDMgj3qesC5twfUUd5RqCVc9HZjnjZxctiVpzjGh0Tn8oMALzj4NLkOQ5tNA%3D)** **I’m running for Senate to be a voice the establishment can’t control — and the Radical Left can’t ignore.**

But if we’re going to take this fight all the way to Washington, I need your support. **[Make a contribution today — let’s crank up the volume.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=422a9b4c79474a50830123390a9dbec8&_e=h3vEZtXwaa9CHI-1ALfdPB8W2z3b5jqi8zfewmufv2y3zKfwh306wMVkLTyx6ccrzG069v-4wy6KTZJPBgKtnKxXtwYFTKsMul-Q3vZ7NCUiqPjMmTYLsJYk-klcCNuPWgFloBxjmeJtnatcIuuofj8noXfG9Od9lxiDKKu3v8YqJL4igHIeILJs7SI6PDIRu0MiB6IFslwYkftG0MpYlCmU0pJ2xASiMeji-nM6PNKnKn-Fsi_jwL4A6cyfL8lR-GcseVMjCnwhdq1hzS4R6f8RRTT1avIcldkc3iN5HrcXiHSQ2Z1ehownY43aDXeBxgaqjdV_osEZ4WsM2gHVHUBrDOQtGNF6HqfpijGaPd4Z904pKUevoH8lw_GPu6MAQeU4WG3DU72AGeOgi_CSj99WFW2P6K2zq_7mGR3D9a_GDTLOPOihkhCLLrMiiX4HFFnbWWxtqyIXZQi-JyFGdBRV8AQLFMG58vi6bAPtP9k3MJVCqg339a-GzYyQcOpptsxzAvBC-8LtxdV4_q7uVL0Lq0rg02eXygdkykYEeJSGRB05Y7UXF_pw-lsGQYjh)**

| [ **CRANK UP THE VOLUME** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=422a9b4c79474a50830123390a9dbec8&_e=h3vEZtXwaa9CHI-1ALfdPB8W2z3b5jqi8zfewmufv2y3zKfwh306wMVkLTyx6ccrzG069v-4wy6KTZJPBgKtnKxXtwYFTKsMul-Q3vZ7NCUiqPjMmTYLsJYk-klcCNuPWgFloBxjmeJtnatcIuuofj8noXfG9Od9lxiDKKu3v8YqJL4igHIeILJs7SI6PDIRvv0WaHDHH6GdUXX_z1RpDf6j4KOHFtguPVlhpPeRuSZRjHs-OOSy915YSFs5sNSbz9tTDsYcUypdgBqEFB70k2v1-Z7dEE6d43aqbnejhxXvLJNJunSYWCh7A7joznO8fpQJ_nrIiJfD-9vPhw1h8_6pICCOTyHok9RWn404fphOO2a6_a1Hx5gJVu9KsHAcQ8el6qc26LuZtJfyDLJfyEDhU4KRB2sDNqhSlfB-vco86sn8ywHbKZow6swnBYwfdjy30JviGaKKAYqJqVkyx9IZYeFFZoZcCMDEB0bddhXikBBSv6SdMYaA3q5lLwBb77HhQCGsI4kBdq2EgCtf45CnDwlbnd6931iBk0hM1nSJv2XRBD4J1bxDozhq2gyc)

This is **Smash Mouth Populism** — not country club politics.

Let’s go.
**Royce White**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=422a9b4c79474a50830123390a9dbec8&_e=h3vEZtXwaa9CHI-1ALfdPB8W2z3b5jqi8zfewmufv2y3zKfwh306wMVkLTyx6ccrzG069v-4wy6KTZJPBgKtnKxXtwYFTKsMul-Q3vZ7NCUiqPjMmTYLsJYk-klcCNuPWgFloBxjmeJtnatcIuuofj8noXfG9Od9lxiDKKu3v8YqJL4igHIeILJs7SI6PDIRy81mdBXh_ZRlYEPgaKUP1QDE2rqrVzLgF-Q-iDOpEtVt6C-w3uhjRVw20c3w9dt63VpR0ciHb5ywUyZwmZbqjhWTC7sA-vba_t4-mS0NqmatgtldN5mvJcisCiFXw7bK3L_AmeLnrcKSyeFfuiE6AXwW5-S89owV2vn76tBsKYES6Ehvax0ZZXPfJYVy6bYIl_cNaVwNbrnePJyKAhNszYEDE-_BH34KyhVvK-uufYmKid_Lqb8S0WlGPgYtpsoO_Cm3F-OWlu_mWYTQRQXmI7iP6FAgVS_0Kzuspgiz1YAZ22nCX6z9WZ7FmxVrF_kxZkXLHRh2EQTJaoAB33oxs1ZeAv7EtAUStmnFDo32LEtXR3SE-5wm93egPww_LmAd)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

clean_body: I pulled out the bullhorn. They lost it. | Peter, Zimmerman, MN, was something else. Liberals rolled in to protest our GOP event — yelling, waving signs, the usual George Soros-funded chaos. That’s “tolerant,” right? But when two Black men — myself included — stood up to counter-protest? Suddenly, we’re angry, crazy, dangerous. They call this “White privilege”? Please. What they really can’t handle is a Black man in a MAGA hat with a bullhorn telling the truth. It’s like they have an allergic reaction. They expect us to stay silent while they push their communist agenda. I’m running for Senate to be a voice the establishment can’t control — and the Radical Left can’t ignore. But if we’re going to take this fight all the way to Washington, I need your support. | This is Smash Mouth Populism — not country club politics. Let’s go. Royce White Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

name: David Hogg
subject: They want us to live in fear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I refuse to be intimidated. I refuse to let them push us around.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251004-1&t=1&akid=2716%2E587540%2E7La0FK)
Peter,
I mentioned this in an email recently, but I think it's worth a deep dive.
**Imagine a prison with a central guard tower with inmates living in cells along the outer walls of the jail.** From that guard tower, you could see into every single cell of the prison — but the people in the prison cells can't see into the guard tower.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251004_1_panopticon?refcode=em20251004-2716&amount=5&refcode2=2716_587540_7La0FK&akid=2716%2E587540%2E7La0FK)
It would be impossible for a single guard to watch every single prisoner at once. But each inmate knows that — at least theoretically — they could be watched at any time. That changes the way they act all the time.
**This is called a panopticon and — maybe you see where I'm going with this already — we are living in a kind of panopticon right now.** The Trump administration and its allies on the far-right are trying to make us feel watched. They're trying to make examples of people who step out of line with their preferred way of thinking, of speaking, of acting — so that the rest of us will fall in line.
That's why Trump's DOJ is going after people like James Comey and Adam Schiff. That's why Trump's FCC threatened Jimmy Kimmel. That's part of why ICE conducts its raids and its disappearings with such impunity. **They want us all to live in fear. They want us all to feel watched.**
This should be alarming to each of us, and this is why I do the work that I do: to push back, to fight for democracy, to build a politics where we aren’t ruled by fear.
Because we aren’t in a prison. We aren’t being watched by a guard. For as much power as Trump and the far right have right now, _it’s nowhere near as much power as they hope we cede to them._ We still have a choice.
So we can’t cede that power to them. We can’t be intimidated just because they want us to be. When they harm people, we have to keep speaking up. When they do something illegal, we have to keep calling it out. And when they tell lies, we have to keep fighting back.
**[If you’re with me — and you want to join our fight for a different kind of politics — will you rush a $5 donation to Leaders We Deserve right now to help us elect bold, young leaders who will fight back too?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251004_1_panopticon?refcode=em20251004-2716&amount=5&refcode2=2716_587540_7La0FK&akid=2716%2E587540%2E7La0FK)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251004_1_panopticon?amount=5&refcode=em20251004-2716&refcode2=2716_587540_7La0FK&akid=2716%2E587540%2E7La0FK)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251004-1&t=3&refcode2=2716_587540_7La0FK&akid=2716%2E587540%2E7La0FK)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=2716%2E587540%2E7La0FK)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2716%2E587540%2E7La0FK)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: A Biblical Jerry Springer Episode
body:
Tomorrow at Sheridan.Church, we will begin a new verse-by-verse study through a Book of the Bible. This first message, I could title: A BIBLICAL JERR
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13142.1.0c8fbe6048ae6fa2df7fba156f17e060) |
---
Tomorrow at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13143.1.039f5d5016046f8240de66c0359e9902), we will begin a new _verse-by-verse_ study through a Book of the Bible. This first message, I could title: **A BIBLICAL JERRY SPRINGER EPISODE** Because what we will read is **WILD**. Be sure to join me and be in your spot whether in-person or online. **Tulsa** : 10am CT **OKC** : 2pm CT **Online** : [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13144.1.9d647ce27bd653b5ef45fcb51edb3dae) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/the Mission of Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13145.1.ef58b1e4c7cba14517f7a1c304562134)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13146.1.92bcce882a74b9db1b34bcf3300bd8c1)
---
There is _historical trap_ that recycles itself through every generation: **WHEN IN DOUBT, BLAME THE JEWS**. Unfortunately, this historical trap has seeped into some of the Conservative Christian camps here in America. Therefore, I want to invite you to join me, **Erick Stakelbeck** of TBN and **Clay Clark** for what we are calling - [THE CASE FOR ISRAEL](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13147.1.ec00d4352f63e11ec38f599c9e0f42bc). **Topics** : **-Biblical Israel vs Modern Israel** **-What is the Synagogue of Satan?** **-Tucker Carlson + Candace Owens** **-Replacement Theology** **-Israel's war on Hamas** **-America First or Israel First?** **-Much more... + LIVE Q &A** Seating is _LIMITED_. **When** : Tuesday, October 7 | 6:30pm **Where** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13148.1.a181df66c7838d0f9a2cc1644609da11) Tulsa **RSVP** for _FREE_ here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1883517](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13149.1.9d5e7ac4d4c229540a09f15e970d8ef5) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP: The Case For Israel ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13150.1.20578d1a569305250b97f3d755014f6a)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13151.1.d74e8f986e1cb3d44464567d9691c09a)
---
I am excited to share with that my hour long in-depth sit down interview on **American Thought Leaders** is now available and you can watch it for **FREE** with this link: [https://ept.ms/4nyYC5A](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13152.1.b154c9bfdc97ba29bc43a0f96c7983f3)
I want to thank **Epoch Times** and **Jan Jekielek** for the opportunity to have a deep and meaningful conversation about **Charlie Kirk** , **American Culture** , the **impact of Social Media** and much more.
Watch it here for FREE: [https://ept.ms/4nyYC5A](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13153.1.3683f2077016a9f1ed6f9037802e947a)
---
|

Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13154.1.30c11b5243685093789f97e43e1678fb) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13155.1.ae4735e7efd73c0b90d15387091b4128)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13156.1.511d1d06dbce71e0297e02d240ae3e35)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13157.1.add67464f37a1fea296b215faf67679a). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13158.1.f0ebfef5c75752e510d2fb485fd8d1bf) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13159.1.db6f3505d01025849adf7e8998e99d61) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25513927.13160.1.a384aba84735c741ede798e90ba46bb4) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

name: Defend our Courts
subject: This ruling is why PA Dem Justices have targets on their backs
body:
Rulings like this pose an existential threat to their ability to win and it's why MAGA is going all out to remove Pennsylvania’s Democratic justices.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vS1uB4dtjsaifv2PotLbAuoljD2t2HllqmFqrW38XrcGn7Ds1nVwfCjwVgN7AKOBQi8-gB67zZUk_luj0LN74dQpNMzAJlRrMxksl2kBR-KsK0SWEjH3ape0GBrkFADKdjDRmtdRd_H1ka4HyDvddZoZAV1tsZYsMpi7Fl2G-iznYlZgWJ6EIPUHIHbBZ60YFJNNsGcPJ6SbfGYOdyaAmAj8Zrz-l6FkHr8NkIsnrYo=&c=-g7Sh6TgR6fJ6WD-t4puRLyt-hZnVhWNSsit5KcKqAHsQjmd9lnGMQ==&ch=pMS8bLO9CWokAq-IBGmeVrS2w552Q9ATzW46mP1GmADP2nXP5Jhdsw==)
---
| Friend,
The typically sleepy Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election has gone nuclear.
In 31 days Pennsylvanians will vote yes or no on whether to keep or remove the three Democratic justices that make up the Pennsylvania's Supreme Court's 3 vote Democratic majority.
If MAGA successfully removes these justices, a fair election will never be held in Pennsylvania again. Democrats simply won't win elections here anymore.
Demonstrating how critical these justices are to fair election is the court's recent ruling on mail-in ballots. It is exactly why MAGA has put a target on the backs of each of these justices:
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vS1uB4dtjsaifv2PotLbAuoljD2t2HllqmFqrW38XrcGn7Ds1nVwfCjwVgN7AKOBQi8-gB67zZUk_luj0LN74dQpNMzAJlRrMxksl2kBR-KsK0SWEjH3ape0GBrkFADKdjDRmtdRd_H1ka4HyDvddZoZAV1tsZYsMpi7Fl2G-iznYlZgWJ6EIPUHIHbBZ60YFJNNsGcPJ6SbfGYOdyaAmCcsR3Wr3h0M5UxuO2pnLlw=&c=-g7Sh6TgR6fJ6WD-t4puRLyt-hZnVhWNSsit5KcKqAHsQjmd9lnGMQ==&ch=pMS8bLO9CWokAq-IBGmeVrS2w552Q9ATzW46mP1GmADP2nXP5Jhdsw==)
---
| Because of last Friday's ruling, voters must now be notified if election officials are going to reject their mail ballots because of an error like an incorrect date or missing signature.
Because MAGA relies on low voter turnout to win elections they are obsessed with eliminating as many votes as they can to sway elections in key swing states like Pennsylvania. Rulings like this pose an existential threat to their ability to win and it's why they are going all out to remove Pennsylvania's Democratic justices.
Unfortunately, Democrats underestimated MAGA's determination to win this election and we are now being massively outorganized and outspent by them. If the election were held today we would lose.
To ensure that Democrats can continue to win in PA it is imperative that we save this court and with 31 days left until E-Day, time is running out to do it. [Can we count on you to rush $55 (the average cost per vote in this race) or whatever you can spare so we can immediately put it to work on the ground?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vS1uB4dtjsaifv2PotLbAuoljD2t2HllqmFqrW38XrcGn7Ds1nVwfCjwVgN7AKOBhxCpT9HL53nFBafUxu7Jnm7lVkh0bF9hHUJQyIxsTSNhaM8Eo1eHxhb-GDz96QSuMUbfJqSeb7e5Ywo5B6ez1Ngp9FAv9m9I7F8cynQMOh6N4UtebbM3YwZ4Ou0bNofEey5jVzBxNA0tEfKXO721uZZ6NQ7N3CR5Rtncy6Gtlmmb2KHo36uyYQ==&c=-g7Sh6TgR6fJ6WD-t4puRLyt-hZnVhWNSsit5KcKqAHsQjmd9lnGMQ==&ch=pMS8bLO9CWokAq-IBGmeVrS2w552Q9ATzW46mP1GmADP2nXP5Jhdsw==)
---
| If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | | [Donate $5](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vS1uB4dtjsaifv2PotLbAuoljD2t2HllqmFqrW38XrcGn7Ds1nVwfCjwVgN7AKOBfjpuMZD8NiVOS5xNICnRsxThijyx4jrFjMYNMrnhTpVFoC1oHcPaX4BcTFXh2jPP9_JErIFqr7vsh2jRxibyVBVWL4GRRCEPf7BcZ9bePHM-bMPJYRJS2RRMTZ7sACvcOvOR7WdU83EJ-REAZ0_qo5dteu1GJm_f8Nik-iNBAfpQCZh-D4MOI0PNb9mNV60m5XSNDAGXaWIWicFgLdrNHQ==&c=-g7Sh6TgR6fJ6WD-t4puRLyt-hZnVhWNSsit5KcKqAHsQjmd9lnGMQ==&ch=pMS8bLO9CWokAq-IBGmeVrS2w552Q9ATzW46mP1GmADP2nXP5Jhdsw==)

clean_body: Rulings like this pose an existential threat to their ability to win and it's why MAGA is going all out to remove Pennsylvania’s Democratic justices. | | | | | == | Friend, The typically sleepy Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election has gone nuclear. In 31 days Pennsylvanians will vote yes or no on whether to keep or remove the three Democratic justices that make up the Pennsylvania's Supreme Court's 3 vote Democratic majority. If MAGA successfully removes these justices, a fair election will never be held in Pennsylvania again. Democrats simply won't win elections here anymore. Demonstrating how critical these justices are to fair election is the court's recent ruling on mail-in ballots. It is exactly why MAGA has put a target on the backs of each of these justices: | | == | Because of last Friday's ruling, voters must now be notified if election officials are going to reject their mail ballots because of an error like an incorrect date or missing signature. Because MAGA relies on low voter turnout to win elections they are obsessed with eliminating as many votes as they can to sway elections in key swing states like Pennsylvania. Rulings like this pose an existential threat to their ability to win and it's why they are going all out to remove Pennsylvania's Democratic justices. Unfortunately, Democrats underestimated MAGA's determination to win this election and we are now being massively outorganized and outspent by them. If the election were held today we would lose. To ensure that Democrats can continue to win in PA it is imperative that we save this court and with 31 days left until E-Day, time is running out to do it. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Participating in this election as a volunteer, donor, or even as a person posting about it on Facebook, is the most important action we can take right now to stop Trump and his fascist agenda. Thank you so much for standing with us. Team Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. name: Jordan Wood
subject: please please please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Senate Republican up for re-election.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97567f4f-03e1-43c0-9793-07ded838c1ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| I have news. It’s not good. FIRST: The Portland Press Herald reported that I’m “mounting the most aggressive challenge to Collins.” BUT THEN: I learned Susan Collins just outraised me by $600K. NOW: I need to raise 1,000 gifts before my fundraising deadline at midnight TONIGHT to close the fundraising gap. [I won’t mince words, Peter: If I miss tonight’s fundraising goal, Susan Collins and her billionaire donors will crush my shot at flipping this Senate seat and putting a critical check on Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. Unlike Collins, I’m not relying on special interest donors to flood my campaign with millions. I’m relying on grassroots supporters who are ready to take back our country from Donald Trump and Susan Collins. Can I count on you to split a $10 donation between me and Blue Amp Action >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1a99058-122e-45f2-9c66-0040c202649f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, let me be clear: Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Senate Republican up for re-election. Donald Trump lost Maine by 7 (!!!) points in the last election. Susan Collins’ approval rating just dropped by a whopping 12 percentage points – the most of ANY Senator. So Peter, I need you to make a critical choice: — We can either watch as Collins buries us with millions in special interest cash and pushes Trump’s destructive agenda for another six (!!!) years ... — Or we can marshal a monumental wave of grassroots support, close this fundraising gap, and prove the strength of our campaign. [I’ll be honest: If we can’t respond to this startling surge of cash, we’re at risk of losing this election at this moment. So please, please, please, Peter: Will you split a $10 donation between me and Blue Amp Action to hand Susan Collins a shocking defeat and finally flip Maine blue once and for all? >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2e0f4ef-49f1-43d5-9926-5ca58a13be64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T149f8594-c501-47a1-9ec8-40418bc46f1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team DASS
subject: Trump orders the military toward our own neighborhoods
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116589999/573906401/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQyYmU0YS00Y2ExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hdIB3qvRRjOAfKhCuTM_yIDCveiHQlBX5QJx6sOzSM=)
**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump lays groundwork for militarized policing in American cities** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116590001/573906402/1695150256?refcode=em-10.4.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQyYmU0YS00Y2ExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hdIB3qvRRjOAfKhCuTM_yIDCveiHQlBX5QJx6sOzSM=)**
* * *
At a dramatic gathering of nearly 800 U.S. generals and admirals at Quantico, Virginia, President Trump laid bare his new vision: use U.S. cities as training grounds for the military to hunt the so-called “enemy from within.” **He painted America as under siege.** Not by foreign forces, but by internal enemies who, he claimed, “don’t wear uniforms.” This breaks with decades of precedent that keep the military separate from policing, city governance, and civil society. It threatens to turn democracy into martial rule. Trump also criticized what he called “woke” military culture, urged rank-and-file loyalty over principle, and signaled that dissenting officers should resign – or else lose their rank and career. This is an attempt to erase the boundaries between military discipline and absolute loyalty to him. He’s weaponizing fear, and this whole show was about rewriting who the military serves. But even as Trump pushes these dangerous boundaries, state election leaders are defending the rule of law, protecting voter access, and keeping the machinery of democracy running despite federal overreach. **[DASS is working around the clock to defend state election systems, and hold the line while Trump attempts to grab at more power. Rush a $3 donation to help us fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116590002/573906404/-248329304?refcode=em-10.4.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQyYmU0YS00Y2ExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hdIB3qvRRjOAfKhCuTM_yIDCveiHQlBX5QJx6sOzSM=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116590005/573906405/-248329304?refcode=em-10.4.25-all-c&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQyYmU0YS00Y2ExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hdIB3qvRRjOAfKhCuTM_yIDCveiHQlBX5QJx6sOzSM=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ BREAKING: Trump lays groundwork for militarized policing in American cities = At a dramatic gathering of nearly 800 U.S. generals and admirals at Quantico, Virginia, President Trump laid bare his new vision: use U.S. cities as training grounds for the military to hunt the so-called “enemy from within.” He painted America as under siege. Not by foreign forces, but by internal enemies who, he claimed, “don’t wear uniforms.” This breaks with decades of precedent that keep the military separate from policing, city governance, and civil society. It threatens to turn democracy into martial rule. Trump also criticized what he called “woke” military culture, urged rank-and-file loyalty over principle, and signaled that dissenting officers should resign – or else lose their rank and career. This is an attempt to erase the boundaries between military discipline and absolute loyalty to him. He’s weaponizing fear, and this whole show was about rewriting who the military serves. Peter,

Earlier this week, our government was shut down by Republican inaction. Democrats, like Kim, showed up to work, ready to make a deal that would keep our country open and lower our healthcare prices. **Republicans stayed home.**

Nearly 80,000 federal workers reside in Washington State. That's 80,000 workers who will have their paychecks delayed and so much more.

But Kim knows it's not just these workers who suffer when the government shuts down—though they face the brunt of it. Families across the state must now deal with delayed benefit checks from SNAP or WIC. Regional VA offices could close, delaying help for local families. Students applying for federal loans or who need help with current loans will see drastic delays. **And this is only a small portion of what's to come.**

The best way for Kim to fight for you and your families is to know exactly how this shutdown is affecting each and every one of you. That's why we're launching this quick survey—because your voice deserves to be heard during this difficult time.

[**Will you take a few moments to send in your response? Friend,

Have you ever taken a survey and felt like no one would read it?

**Well, this survey won't go unread.**

I’ve been traveling across Colorado — talking with people from all walks of life. I’ve heard a lot about what’s working and what isn’t.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, that’s why I’m reaching out: **_[Will you take 60 seconds to tell me what issues matter most to you right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116590577/573908399/-1354634071?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&ask=5&code=jtk945-su-nd&refcode=jtk945-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzZmYmFkYy01MGExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lMOVzJmwgl4cIyLk3ElJr_NS25IrSR5_Ao-bOaFxDc=&emci=84a2c105-a1a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=bc6fbadc-50a1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)_**

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?xul=1bu7fz54lr1j98ye80ci7qlvuwsqav3erus9qg1ydeyeqaip93v3edwj43ub7329dsfu2wk2i9ff5x8fg956aj65g1q4xvkqwq2off&__stmp=t3mem2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?xtl=41ryrulcx06q5ujc8xlwnlv1foi0q0cx7qousgky7hfnrxcihk9h6eao0c33e6wsy6db2cq1fk6gx5eqpxg6xixpjbwrekuj1ds9fqf1080vyu814qb35rjxrstrdqrfip2xifbr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?xul=1bu7fz54lr1j98ye80ci7qlvuwsqav3erus9qg1ydeyeqaip93v3edwj43ub7329dsfu2wk2i9ff5x8fg956aj65g1q4xvkqwq2off&__stmp=t3mem2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?xtl=2hvnmw8tixapzfkidliujgsyoylc5tninyb0oyhhj3dc5qk5vo3ibee5wqoag8s1ibtd555797ihddjti1tzxoisv9sifa1psw4wyyog5ddousd5g2m7s6zzbj1fvzfpj019f&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?xtl=594pyzxspb7e8vo227m2j9xs1dvpjzfkkcsxwjcxvxnpbce1qdveu49wh4w6v6fh2ear7cpuc7ei3nolmxwu4k5jvj36qt2x2b1vs572n95oto8iuj21mbsfbn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mem2&__onlt=h)

clean_body: Please read the message below from Turning Point USA. | | | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / BUSINESS CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: The sender of this email may have an affiliate or financial tie with the parties referenced and could earn commissions from purchases made on linked websites. name: Sharice Davids
subject: We can’t win this fight without your help
body:
---
Derek, Sharice Davids here. I’m honored to represent Kansas in the House of Representatives. Every day, it seems like we are mounting another fight against the Trump administration and their extreme agenda. Here in Congress, we are doing everything we can to stop him — but it would be impossible to win this fight without your help. We are so lucky to have supporters like you on our side: talking with your friends, signing up to make calls and knock doors, and giving what you can when you can. You’re a key part of this work. That’s why I’m inviting you to enter the DNC’s new contest, where five winners will have the chance to hear directly from Democratic leaders about the work we’re doing — and everything that lies ahead in the fight against Trump. [**By chipping in below, you’ll be automatically entered to win a trip to the DNC’s Women’s Leadership Forum Conference in Washington, DC — and have the chance for you and a guest to hear from me and other Democratic leaders in person.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-forum-sweepstakes-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251004_4744_fr&refcode2=4744_22930333_OxdHMJ&akid=4744%2E22930333%2EOxdHMJ) Plus, your donation will help the DNC support Democrats up and down the ballot and across the country as they fight back against the Trump administration. _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-forum-sweepstakes-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251004_4744_fr&refcode2=4744_22930333_OxdHMJ&akid=4744%2E22930333%2EOxdHMJ)**
---

****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-forum-sweepstakes-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20251004_4744_fr&refcode2=4744_22930333_OxdHMJ&akid=4744%2E22930333%2EOxdHMJ)**

| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-forum-sweepstakes-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20251004_4744_fr&refcode2=4744_22930333_OxdHMJ&akid=4744%2E22930333%2EOxdHMJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-forum-sweepstakes-2025?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20251004_4744_fr&refcode2=4744_22930333_OxdHMJ&akid=4744%2E22930333%2EOxdHMJ)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-forum-sweepstakes-2025?refcode=em_20251004_4744_fr&refcode2=4744_22930333_OxdHMJ&akid=4744%2E22930333%2EOxdHMJ)**

****
I hope to see you there. Thank you for your support,
Sharice
Sharice Davids
U.S. Representative, KS-03

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Thank you
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Hi friend, thank you.

Thanks to your support, we met our end-of-quarter goal. That’s no small feat. It means we begin this next phase stronger, more energized, and ready for the work ahead.

This is what people power looks like. Every contribution, every note of encouragement, every volunteer shift made this possible. Together, we’re proving that a campaign fueled by neighbors and friends can stand up to outside influence and keep our community’s voice at the center of this race.

The fight ahead won’t be easy, but after this deadline, I feel confident and thankful. I’m proud to carry your support with me.

With gratitude,

Nellie
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=390ca7f8-52a1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=390ca7f8-52a1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4]
Follow Nellie
https://x.com/NelliePou [https://x.com/NelliePou] https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/ [https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/] https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/ [https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/QcG518LlG0yfilVoJO5ZLg2?unsubscribedata=n0Ll7k4w5Mjd7OyVoIp8DOGa%2BJTv%2BvwzHTGWWb%2BuEQW0gM9J46aptz0EwyTN%2BnrAjSN7fO4pyAnW1N81deqa81DQpzaZc1M7iKsLsJsTNC3Bego%2BUwyGOkn69hXvItz0iCVxeVHZgIn2%2BZ%2FHC%2FXH0IMFZ9jhbv5B%2Fl7jHBMq%2F7wC%2BN0q5Yk9Md%2BCJ%2BmodKgIul1NAfaL%2B7LkiJu1h8Gby0FvRPtjVZiZBqBnBss71OkJpNwAVGiqMvanMs0EruaxshXFf%2BIelWfklWIo0ix0V7H9CLF1jMA%2Bif6Qc77bDTWR%2FYr6xCqLyfuI17InFyGbbR9Yy58VwQ6TmQvKpwhJq7OHfcMoS41tqxxBd2xNJbTkMuJfKuXrh54PQ2Z0vGuf4aRE1ALvMfv3kTI%2B0XOqlNY79XsL%2FHCPyrHd3J6g7LlLZFgwRIH9r3Z0EHBhly8n] . name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=1apjtn1vd0mi5ne3yshcxhgompk5tp1n94xe0eawiusaznsl9k71wjcm4w87krx48fuxq7jtfqml56w8y42ozl9nknriv1t1l9ksxwcgq40xs0ls86zwhtp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h) [Mark as Spam](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xul=t2p76x2ul3l184ws2kiv1kps2qxzi9r35oga9drwdmgucpr9cqj4hqp3s0gsfdtw52rjzam27wmtfel9gwh1ewfmxo8pq03c3zd06yert3&__stmp=t3mf5y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xul=t2p76x2ul3l184ws2kiv1kps2qxzi9r35oga9drwdmgucpr9cqj4hqp3s0gsfdtw52rjzam27wmtfel9gwh1ewfmxo8pq03c3zd06yert3&__stmp=t3mf5y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | | [](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=u3vjmpooycfk50iwfyoto5fyywqp1p09vdu984hn514gdu3qhq51b7yfrmto7519labriztivwb5dlw42gj5kvz5nie3fy5zg12iz3t34z5jnafw5pzh7r5738p1swxwyoz4f0za3z1x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xul=t2p76x2ul3l184ws2kiv1kps2qxzi9r35oga9drwdmgucpr9cqj4hqp3s0gsfdtw52rjzam27wmtfel9gwh1ewfmxo8pq03c3zd06yert3&__stmp=t3mf5y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=3wb9abchffcekdcra2yidmtqait24bathivxfxgyz7e0klajbpkgyoirsb8w48e7s7j0dl8777ayvml7g7tfy2ycrwr8buign4s3cin8vi4m0w9z0om55etohvhypk55tfnfz50nbs19bn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=6v37a3v8epebcdgoxfripsj5z7eysvh8w94drg41go1m6uwvef4tuk158a47591w415sfdm923e1rhf1qceei72z7esvqukwy38miqm01ddub2nd3fharseo0do0tgj9ntj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf5y&__onlt=h)

name: Jay Jones
subject: One month out

| | Team,Can you believe it? Today, we’re exactly _**one month away**_**from Election Day.** I said from the start, this race won’t be easy. We expected a fight, and right now, Jason Miyares and his allies are pouring big money into Virginia, trying to drown out our message. But, in my heart, I know that we are fighting for working families, affordable health care, and safer communities — and we’ve got grassroots people-power on our side. **From now until Election Day, every door knocked, every email read, and every dollar contributed is critical. Your support in these final weeks could make all the difference in turning out voters and spreading our message.** **[So I’ve got to ask: can you chip in $10 (or whatever you can swing) today to help power our fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116590665/573908833/-1112981798?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.04_OneMonthOut_B1_F1_S1_C1_U2_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg2MTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjg2Zjc2YWItNTNhMS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RsVEanL0-bqVg4wdCGK9CkwgST6jdux6LZF1lqK-BBM=)**

name: Team WFP
subject: The latest from WFP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, It’s been a big month, Peter — filled with both major victories and urgent challenges. We’ve put together this WFP newsletter to update you on what we’ve achieved, the battles still ahead, and how you can stay engaged to defend working people and our shared values.
* * *
**_GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN: REPUBLICANS’ REFUSAL TO LOWER HEALTH CARE COSTS_** Trump and Congressional Republicans have **pushed the federal government into a shutdown** — all because they refuse to address the health care crisis that working families face every day. They don’t care that insurance premiums are spiraling, that prescription drugs are unaffordable, or that life-saving medical research is underfunded — as long as billionaire donors keep giving to their campaigns. If Republicans get their way, millions of people will lose coverage, premiums could skyrocket, and critical funding for hospitals, research, and essential services will vanish. The choice for Congress couldn’t be simpler: **fix health care costs or shut down the government** — yet the shutdown proves where Republicans’ priorities lie. To respond, Working Families Power co-hosted a mass call with allies on Wednesday, to explain what’s at stake, share updates on the shutdown, and organize working families to take action. The call brought people together to discuss strategies and stay informed during this critical moment. Now, more than ever, Democrats must stand firm and negotiate a funding bill that actually lowers health care costs. If Republicans continue to block solutions, it will be clear who is responsible for the shutdown and the harm it causes to millions of families. Will you make your voice heard too? **Text SHUTDOWN to 30403 or dial 833-636-3259 to be connected with your Senator automatically to let them know that we won’t accept a funding bill that takes away people’s health care.** **[Then add your name to the petition urging your Senators to BLOCK this disastrous funding resolution.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfhk4J1UGnmKaBjTbYalOGX1shVeE-X3pK48zcR_awgcd0ju0kuAWdIHOOPnRn3U-YkMjbWbusYNFypW3y_lR6byoRBn-pwLPI8hImcG035sUzhkQkJxTno7-0T-q_z3FKfNv3ix-PGsV9OzTvmK9xZcE5uHvmI3OTXnFjjEb8lq_pj4hxjBUTCZsYFAHHQ2b-vq8EUBaTHATcZPQf12v6l3kX7wyMMJkgiv0HkXp2qvBPxbRm2HDfpDbeB89Nh7m8RQoYZKvM-FUdP--cPjFCeFsjUK7Y4Ck0AqXvsEzKt5q1UufRnp0TIFgR3GgIn3a6rMCFlpR8YphqkD-8S3X50g/4kg/HO07_fRrTX2udu7rPIY4AA/h0/h001.P-gsA4pJq_ck-J6eb-cOIYFZmabD2h5reXtiL7_krDU)** We’ll continue monitoring the situation closely and mobilizing our members where needed. We’ve faced fights like this before — and when working families come together, we win.
* * *
**_BUILDING THE WFP CAUCUS, CHIPPING AWAY AT THE REPUBLICAN MAJORITY_** WFP is turning the tide in Congress — with our candidates and organizers directly shrinking the Republican majority and paving the way for bold progressive action.
* **In Arizona,** incoming WFP-backed Congresswoman **Adelita Grijalva[ _crushed_ her special election in AZ-7 by nearly 40 points,](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfp610-QnapMV3bmF0zLbEyffGAeeIKJLO7pau433BOgIfby2LSWZomkNMH9otD90yFH6ij3Cy7CpFDr8RtirUFMslg95IDsQsGuWBQYLOBqGqV92oYT5O-6nLcGhgE3bLPD92MKlhhQ8GiX_TGab0PMCDiD9WdNxYD-AoEn6JDikIyvVsj01vWDuL366qZOVw9j9LdmBA5OSXB76qK5HFR-DDR7L_qJ6Fh1GnmF17IkYz2hfa4yFGgChh-VNh9EYpCm3Fc4E8qukkwi0Tvqv7ZiS0vgqBOF9JkY7g278DE5hUeo8KTXXYft4DDjs_vgy7869FpsGfNspggg7GS6YtM7KUknzdYsHl226iOakkWaK_VxfaJTIWbcKhtS7b7ZHwaFpGdXWQxhIO44vGZ946ILSVu1PvOLbdSDneZLrdF8/4kg/HO07_fRrTX2udu7rPIY4AA/h1/h001.-wfTonio7MVTT4Ne-Z_SRPJMVHCbj31JaTjSg33sbrc)** outperforming even Kamala Harris’s margin in the district last year. With her win, the Republican margin in the House shrinks to just five seats. She’s already announced she’ll be the 218th vote on a discharge petition to force a vote on the release of Epstein documents — which explains why Republican Speaker Mike Johnson is delaying her swearing-in.
* **In Texas,** Trump-ordered redistricting put WFP champion and Congressional Progressive Caucus Chair **Rep. Greg Casar** into a district with fellow Democrat Rep. Lloyd Doggett. As **_[Politico](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbHQPX4zlW5LTF7Twtz6WVK_w8eGH36cNBki7JK914q91V5GqW_WRF3xp9RY8AmNqP8NGLK7clsAduVqgWnu0qI4Ox_GwSvAkS_6taI8mYsPEbUNy9VfXAT3-cYLFqddnlXNRF-sade7KCahN0OWh66MWDmQ-tti9rlws_pBcThpu6ZQ2jExFfuRyMAW2hWSLfNw9CmlrOKMyJf5bjtNOk-_7L7wkNqayYlhKtKnrIcsKVy9Z4UYugUSqImnCvtb_BNDbk57qCgwM0NrP5-wCG1C7vSVxAFuivfSWxqLfAVjaFQYatvAJqrOLQnywtgK7EU9zVotSKtI80r8DS1TMoFZhcHsrhjjPowa7d6ZgaQfdMIymjk0DeBb4QkMbUPM2w/4kg/HO07_fRrTX2udu7rPIY4AA/h2/h001.lYTX8VUdP8WEhvmxvIiHygz7fsUVgdfK3FSmD__eKqg)_** reported, the **Texas Working Families Party** was already geared up to go all in for Greg in the event of a contested race, but Rep. Doggett made the right call and stepped aside, clearing the way for Greg.

**And in California,** we **[announced](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYd6eLP33O2GRZpvuK-wGuQn_DZqx_738YtisLBze3eXKbFxdsEEqLFojr62l1IKGIrhiHlsvydKH55RmkNZlrOcdHxhSR3qwIRQSJY9P7jKEbSrT-TI5kvKYFII-27FXpIOskAdPWwscm8xH-EFgweF1MAFhCrX3hhb9uD8LFLuh1cIKGXRl42ZynP4rd_rmHwBtY-1OUfZHef0EhaoQX0dgx6EXeCIhxMbbeeesM_PdVZFxdhf_xk2x2xaR2FVK_Pb4t5gSXjmeOSB5ZqggOgn2hOoNksSUVzNQgfToUqX4lF4nXneHnMomsVU7wJaGQ/4kg/HO07_fRrTX2udu7rPIY4AA/h3/h001.-_A4T0MTa9B8KfFfiobCgLwRm6zYu2Tiyv8UYVqP3e0)** our newest Congressional endorsement: Sacramento City Councilmember **Mai Vang,** who is challenging 81-year-old Doris Matsui for her seat in CA-07. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T918_7aX9uyIIKIRIqTt9QhKuz-uU45K77rGvRcJPUUJBFMdzj1IOfESbdybXn14LQqV_xSAyogT5ASZvcXi9X7RJ-PtWgKxCEP1mUclKREJqX0XeJErPAMQNl5rrgDSK_WRnOIfWpocHJwu3bbma26GlUIAcF-pRLL6MNfVa5gYNtPoMk3dFWmvh5WVgmg5XF2WPiF78dWb-31v12Koqhgrqb31etHyJPd3lCp91Ise7jFlgeoiNfv-XV9Be7Noeh1zZU4DHzrl0OfJ33n9OQggRc4Y-Y48mn4mWS6lkayPl2p0B2Pq-HMUYFmApy5eWZqHo6lIRVq8dbbCmuaZ3SVmNQm6s9bNlGGjFa-aWYadU/4kg/HO07_fRrTX2udu7rPIY4AA/h4/h001.hDk_Yr6okwWpX9CxOyvqaAsW4sbCeouebinY2BNo-Mk) Mai was born and raised in Sacramento, and is the proud daughter of Hmong refugees. She has been a powerful champion for working people on the Sacramento City Council. Mai created the **Sacramento Children’s Fund** to dedicate millions of dollars to kids facing poverty and trauma, secured over **$40 million** to strengthen neighborhoods, expand youth programs, and improve the quality of life for seniors, led one of the nation’s most **linguistically diverse vaccination clinics,** and championed **Safe Haven policies** to protect students and families regardless of their immigration status. When she gets to Congress, Mai will fight for guaranteed health care for every American, paid sick leave, affordable child care, and safe and affordable housing. She knows that the status quo isn’t working for working people. Flipping Congress starts with electing working class champions like Mai Vang. **[Split a contribution today to help elect Mai Vang and power a nationwide movement to flip the House, defeat entrenched incumbents, and put working people at the center of our government.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T918_7aX9uyIIKIRIqTt9QhKuz-uU45K77rGvRcJPUUJBFMdzj1IOfESbdybXn14LQOLCUU4-hv_BpoZNDPuMtzVvG1f1ZhQtWDK2pUgFT7McKIkhAea0s62cty1SE7nuL7xtCV3GaXaCeLj_afYs-pjEUH8uEcoBpagojmK8qj5hsBZnLx5p1FEZGq1VPCdjLBTxDMXr8mr7jItgPtSIKYfObj4ocMQ-q1B6P86ehdnF4NSyLTee8UnHQOthDNeBnH3-iIebywB_w6Q_n4ezvfOk7GcBBLdMC5iN_f5LJOzHLLDGqt22J6rSAz-E9o-nAZrRgEG4sgRtQKWIDMzLa62eeR4DPvNdmxlV6eQVPdIU/4kg/HO07_fRrTX2udu7rPIY4AA/h5/h001.R1o3YAmqDzuStaip-zvd5-opFoJQ2Lcn-UsTsugK1fM)**
* * *
**_PRIMARY POWER_** We’re on a roll, Peter! WFP keeps racking up the wins in down ballot primaries all across the country.
* **Connecticut:** WFP candidates **[swept municipal Democratic primaries](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYd6eLP33O2GRZpvuK-wGuRFYdByNVVocZ_EJoj6fAHThUayx_aMIsX85_GpHvOj3tmeXUxShWnyK09kqJ1nYPYy7X4vvUCU4_te37vtOzQqCmiyPkBNn0oXfLb_R7W5S-CxZFI84p3FTreGJC44LmXF7jTB-mSplt4YEUxs9hPmTjfUBBEdhIEI-TPQwnn25rzNG_cQ1Xi-WsdsY6qFveJ_Ypi7Xs4BlRf-uwsZqYCWvjrmXcOzDxSv1p5oe5EtMi8hb_qE_8uSW6chiHdv_Nw/4kg/HO07_fRrTX2udu7rPIY4AA/h6/h001.kgGsJIURzs43qevY-nEHmICdfdqkXXWiQwcDWiOzprA)** in New London, Hamden, and Norwalk. In Hartford, our very own **Shontá Browdy** — elected on the Working Families Party line — _just_ made history as the first-ever WFP member to become the **[Chair of the Hartford Board of Education.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbSZZWgvV5EmvEXrNhcHhgYmKviYascq7Jr_QH79mi6bqwtwYI36Pu-CrmfXbmLnat5es1T0XrhoGXmJ3VHOmfUklQadD4vxLsw3osWGaKtbg--Uw19Mn7-8nPPlxFbT7VmPI062dpkkPWydxyGSv4Gq3ad2BRnrjxdzUrYZEaBhVejoZ7dSy6dLgu5J9iiAQQa2MEkrZvaYLA_Oi1YMNHXBiSyuX3L-jmA2LfpU5BJLVjYoGXjwWS7vmApWM7vpecn-sPxc_NW-eevz6N7WZG96RLtx6kJUs_g6iBvSas0xGmIJ3a46iBuHXbhPnF1OEMaipdRaD-lKREEEHahjkgAxC-E2Y8HNH8Ue9lrH2Hdrj3TIyjV9rJgR4XQxltKHnaK064wIojrTu9EJqz9xSePDOx9jVHil0URJPfk7YM9A/4kg/HO07_fRrTX2udu7rPIY4AA/h7/h001.CxjOul53eAv1NDp8Au6GFiCjyJpsZ8Pcqb1r2DlF8zw)** This is the first time ever that the chair isn’t a Democrat, but one of ours — a huge leap toward real governing power.
* **Cleveland:** Every _single_ one of Ohio WFP’s five candidates advanced in the nonpartisan City Council primaries. They’ll face tough races this November, but they’re carrying real grassroots momentum with them.

We know what’s possible when working families stand together. But to keep building power and send our champions to victory in November — state by state, city by city — we need you in this fight with us. **[Donate today to fuel WFP candidates across the country.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9mHsAFMbyA_9dSET_xwE4ajfrtZC4wDUXQ5KQOK-3qz1MgZ_j6XKjBBq7esGCItcvCSXJ79jEwDVurdHk2_2R9M9a7ySLmtlxxtuPmPc-GYVHSp2BZzW3E63EH4rAUkphFwdeZ2Cgpwur4XIMjRe-dAVaDXCEZ2UCp4ub7GVf84MmsCgP7EmgrVHVGE0QXkHxzkJ6nwSG4hcRMjd9lDaKXWS1jKaGpysynBy2sTr5gLel_C1WXi87ajJNdo8dgA30Lu1beiNo1cjhHaN3VZglA_A9rBw3JpurRVXI_UEpeQS7-uVedcRU4fIRfU63kMLUgUqB-g5szUyFkVKjomeeZ7_fZeebV-EAVCk_aXa-G7e7pSf9D5xDM3inFOvjgP8K/4kg/HO07_fRrTX2udu7rPIY4AA/h8/h001.MXpGclxucIx7Cr0R1J9BhiTP5NHwhRmMvn9XV5Xncic)**
* * *
**_FIGHTING BACK AGAINST TRUMP’S RIGGED MAPS_** Trump and his MAGA allies are trying to rig our democracy by rewriting congressional maps in Texas, in order to lock in their power. So we’re fighting back — throwing down in California to pass Prop 50 — which would allow Democratic Governor Gavin Newsom the ability to redraw California’s congressional districts — nullifying Republican’s gerrymandering, and serving as a blueprint for other blue states to fight back against GOP’s attempts to tip the scales. Last week, we held a virtual rally in California to build momentum for Prop 50 featuring **Congresswoman Lateefah Simon, Lorena Gonzalez (President of the California Labor Federation), Christina Livingston (ACCE Action Executive Director and CA WFP Chair), and Jane Kim (CA WFP State Director) and Irene Kao (Executive Director of Courage California).** And every Tuesday and Thursday through Election Day, we’ll be hosting phonebanks to get out the vote in support of Prop 50. **[Click here to sign up to help us fight back against Trump’s election rigging.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMZSmNHPDmfLBsYkb-vbS-YkhGfUTl067LtYqpplv5koprp4jC7yjME9LViIQvXopjP_TOUBH9ZkFvi2lqEm-JB1s89MZjINXtva0dsznCRU0sheazdqggzsa0TpbhdjrfXWSPW0rgqA4nF3hSAhcNf4ZjQuz7otJw2_pVlAi8Kk-0JDNFdbhzwszRmWlNgzVrRgOaDvBtEQHT7_Mzsf5_69UmasOx9KbvjiE0TSzR3D7n7ymcAwTez8OStFfaanOjw/4kg/HO07_fRrTX2udu7rPIY4AA/h9/h001.gCs6AQP2unRaiSGz9Mm7-HS9ydv4ugfs3bURrWm8XJg)**

**_DISNEY BOYCOTT_** When ABC/Disney pulled Jimmy Kimmel off the air in a blatant attempt at political censorship to appease the Trump administration, millions spoke out. **_FAIR PAY FOR THE WNBA_** The WNBA is absolutely booming right now — with record viewership, media rights, ticket sales, and team valuations. **The only thing still capped is player salaries.** The people driving this growth — the players — deserve their fair share. **Which is why we support the WNBA player union’s call for salary and benefits that reflect players' true value and contributions to the game, the league, and the culture around it.** **[If you agree, add your name to the petition to show the players of the WNBA that we’ve got their backs.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_NK5TTo7FJNYJ8EivR2mIA8Wwa-U-crKa63hacypumMj9QOe9B4XDfo7MZInO_dZW1tuku2_aRCgGHZLluegiLbI9rESX77yv-MqIpcAOUYaOwTkL_MF47QB5rnE86hDBVVW5jsXBFZanghuy0IIFGx-1i853cY4T8uEoy56iULeoLT3CAjhLQzXeOi0TmMjI07KgGf__3WXFJ-0KRd7Q4ALBd37UOwwxDUy02DOb2EDN5qhZuQFY1so7ZHDoPCedKLeUJMnon6exVxzR2QH5Ji09MKTO39NO9CabqbDU0ow/4kg/HO07_fRrTX2udu7rPIY4AA/h13/h001.zAw4tLf06G9TPnpc3sJwOqLi5VXaG4HDA3-3geAwapE)** **[Add Your Name: Fair Pay for the WNBA](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_NK5TTo7FJNYJ8EivR2mIA8Wwa-U-crKa63hacypumMj9QOe9B4XDfo7MZInO_dZU8IJRz3DpWFq2lPDHtGA5GqwuOBGbUH3uhClOVuWWIEJf7o0anaPpQUEAszk0p7dt5OW0quQHSoYyVjCVTxjQzV1wSyotOI6yxZ4jAKtPuNnRHjBBV9T2FQ8VqHyXbOtWn1p7Z6QvYF-obZX5NeYKIkHEIUna4vPnip0FOqMqCsSEJgyqxWdTcYUhD5BUF98y4g7P3TC1Mvh6eYVL52rQ4JsPrrNyWpzhTMc3pUfVveA/4kg/HO07_fRrTX2udu7rPIY4AA/h14/h001.8WZfiynPzdyoEzpZUe9t5VMshaYN9KBDQmaiHjN2300)**
