clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s been a big month, Peter — filled with both major victories and urgent challenges. We’ve put together this WFP newsletter to update you on what we’ve achieved, the battles still ahead, and how you can stay engaged to defend working people and our shared values. GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN: REPUBLICANS’ REFUSAL TO LOWER HEALTH CARE COSTS Trump and Congressional Republicans have pushed the federal government into a shutdown — all because they refuse to address the health care crisis that working families face every day. They don’t care that insurance premiums are spiraling, that prescription drugs are unaffordable, or that life-saving medical research is underfunded — as long as billionaire donors keep giving to their campaigns. If Republicans get their way, millions of people will lose coverage, premiums could skyrocket, and critical funding for hospitals, research, and essential services will vanish. The choice for Congress couldn’t be simpler: fix health care costs or shut down the government — yet the shutdown proves where Republicans’ priorities lie. To respond, Working Families Power co-hosted a mass call with allies on Wednesday, to explain what’s at stake, share updates on the shutdown, and organize working families to take action. The call brought people together to discuss strategies and stay informed during this critical moment. Now, more than ever, Democrats must stand firm and negotiate a funding bill that actually lowers health care costs. If Republicans continue to block solutions, it will be clear who is responsible for the shutdown and the harm it causes to millions of families. Will you make your voice heard too? Text SHUTDOWN to 30403 or dial 833-636-3259 to be connected with your Senator automatically to let them know that we won’t accept a funding bill that takes away people’s health care. We’ll continue monitoring the situation closely and mobilizing our members where needed. We’ve faced fights like this before — and when working families come together, we win. BUILDING THE WFP CAUCUS, CHIPPING AWAY AT THE REPUBLICAN MAJORITY WFP is turning the tide in Congress — with our candidates and organizers directly shrinking the Republican majority and paving the way for bold progressive action. In Arizona, incoming WFP-backed Congresswoman Adelita Grijalva outperforming even Kamala Harris’s margin in the district last year. With her win, the Republican margin in the House shrinks to just five seats. She’s already announced she’ll be the 218th vote on a discharge petition to force a vote on the release of Epstein documents — which explains why Republican Speaker Mike Johnson is delaying her swearing-in. In Texas, Trump-ordered redistricting put WFP champion and Congressional Progressive Caucus Chair Rep. Greg Casar into a district with fellow Democrat Rep. Lloyd Doggett. As reported, the Texas Working Families Party was already geared up to go all in for Greg in the event of a contested race, but Rep. Doggett made the right call and stepped aside, clearing the way for Greg. And in California, we our newest Congressional endorsement: Sacramento City Councilmember Mai Vang, who is challenging 81-year-old Doris Matsui for her seat in CA-07. Mai was born and raised in Sacramento, and is the proud daughter of Hmong refugees. She has been a powerful champion for working people on the Sacramento City Council. Mai created the Sacramento Children’s Fund to dedicate millions of dollars to kids facing poverty and trauma, secured over $40 million to strengthen neighborhoods, expand youth programs, and improve the quality of life for seniors, led one of the nation’s most linguistically diverse vaccination clinics, and championed Safe Haven policies to protect students and families regardless of their immigration status. When she gets to Congress, Mai will fight for guaranteed health care for every American, paid sick leave, affordable child care, and safe and affordable housing. She knows that the status quo isn’t working for working people. Flipping Congress starts with electing working class champions like Mai Vang. PRIMARY POWER We’re on a roll, Peter! WFP keeps racking up the wins in down ballot primaries all across the country. Connecticut: WFP candidates in New London, Hamden, and Norwalk. In Hartford, our very own Shontá Browdy — elected on the Working Families Party line — just made history as the first-ever WFP member to become the This is the first time ever that the chair isn’t a Democrat, but one of ours — a huge leap toward real governing power. Cleveland: Every single one of Ohio WFP’s five candidates advanced in the nonpartisan City Council primaries. They’ll face tough races this November, but they’re carrying real grassroots momentum with them. We know what’s possible when working families stand together. But to keep building power and send our champions to victory in November — state by state, city by city — we need you in this fight with us. FIGHTING BACK AGAINST TRUMP’S RIGGED MAPS Trump and his MAGA allies are trying to rig our democracy by rewriting congressional maps in Texas, in order to lock in their power. So we’re fighting back — throwing down in California to pass Prop 50 — which would allow Democratic Governor Gavin Newsom the ability to redraw California’s congressional districts — nullifying Republican’s gerrymandering, and serving as a blueprint for other blue states to fight back against GOP’s attempts to tip the scales. Last week, we held a virtual rally in California to build momentum for Prop 50 featuring Congresswoman Lateefah Simon, Lorena Gonzalez (President of the California Labor Federation), Christina Livingston (ACCE Action Executive Director and CA WFP Chair), and Jane Kim (CA WFP State Director) and Irene Kao (Executive Director of Courage California). And every Tuesday and Thursday through Election Day, we’ll be hosting phonebanks to get out the vote in support of Prop 50. DISNEY BOYCOTT When ABC/Disney pulled Jimmy Kimmel off the air in a blatant attempt at political censorship to appease the Trump administration, millions spoke out. The pressure worked: ABC/Disney quickly reversed course, returning Kimmel to the air, and soon after, This victory shows that people still have real power — and that our collective action can stop would-be authoritarians in their tracks. But the fight isn’t over. Today, just five corporations control 90% of U.S. media, leaving them vulnerable to political influence, and concentrated power. FAIR PAY FOR THE WNBA The WNBA is absolutely booming right now — with record viewership, media rights, ticket sales, and team valuations. The only thing still capped is player salaries. The people driving this growth — the players — deserve their fair share. Which is why we support the WNBA player union’s call for salary and benefits that reflect players' true value and contributions to the game, the league, and the culture around it. UPCOMING EVENTS Make a real impact in elections and policy fights across the country by joining the WFP Call Team. You’ll get updates on virtual phone banking opportunities, directly connecting with voters to share what we’re fighting for and how they can get involved. Our next WFP National Welcome Gathering is Thursday, October 16 at 7:00 PM ET/ 4:00 PM PT. Hear from organizers about our work nationwide and learn ways to plug in. If you’re feeling anxious about the political moment, the Welcome Gathering is a chance to ground yourself in our shared values and community. We hope to see you there! Get involved with WFP in Georgia, Pennsylvania, Arizona, Connecticut, California, New York, New Jersey, Minnesota, Louisiana, Virginia, Maryland, and more. Thanks for reading, Peter. We’re at a pivotal moment. The federal government is in shutdown, censorship is on the rise, and federal troops are patrolling cities like Memphis and Portland. Republicans are clinging to power — but WFP is breaking their grip, one race at a time. And people power is working. We’re winning local elections, forcing corporations to roll back their efforts to appease the Trump agenda, fighting to lower health care costs, and more. WFP members and organizers are on the ground, building the power of our communities and demanding a government that serves working people, not billionaires and extremists. This is no time to sit on the sidelines. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[Mark as Spam](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1o5g6krpulj23x3rg24rbjnscwmtu8p2ynt28yqjc94rwi5tduz5cqa54t3xi7v9u9njbjxl547o4xd6jgt4z3anvtv&__stmp=t3mf9i&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1o5g6krpulj23x3rg24rbjnscwmtu8p2ynt28yqjc94rwi5tduz5cqa54t3xi7v9u9njbjxl547o4xd6jgt4z3anvtv&__stmp=t3mf9i&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf9i&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf9i&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf9i&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf9i&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf9i&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf9i&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf9i&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf9i&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf9i&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf9i&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xtl=71kqox8yyg1mdoodmtsz5sm3882k1u4ww4hmo8398c378k8ct0umb65s4kik9g33e1gz6co2v113m713xjicgttrwthgszfh6s3atj22alhh606ocsret33vt4ipaeo1n02pwp8vid62hp5j1y58&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf9i&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mf9i&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / MATERIAL TIE DISCLOSURE: You should presume the sender of this email has an affiliate or other financial relationship with the entities or persons noted in this message and may be compensated for purchases made on associated websites. **Over 85 percent of Iowa's land is used for farming. That's the equivalent of around 30 million football fields.** These fields are tended to by hardworking men and women who wake up before the sun rises to feed our families, fuel our economy, and supply the world's agriculture industry.

---
Iowa is the top producer of soybeans and corn in the country. Soybeans alone bring in around $11.5 billion for our economy every year. Corn adds another $16.2 billion. Add sorghum, cattle, hay, and other crops to the mix, and the scale of what Iowa contributes to this country is staggering.

But instead of supporting our farmers, these tariffs are putting their livelihoods in jeopardy. Hikes from **10 to 40 percent** on critical supplies like spices, seed, and equipment are squeezing farms that already operate on thin margins. And now, China — one of our biggest trade partners — just announced it will halt soybean purchases in retaliation. **Experts are calling this decision “catastrophic” for our economy, and many Iowa farmers now face selling this year's crop at a devastating loss.**

We know this is a lot of numbers to throw at you, but what you really need to know is this: **Mariannette Miller-Meeks knows the harm these tariffs are causing to our farms and farmers, yet she continues to back them time and time again. She even went so far as to vote to cede Congress's power to challenge them.**

Christina knows our farmers are the backbone of this state, and she will always fight for them in Washington. But right now, we need to make sure Miller-Meeks hears us loud and clear.

body:
When CBS host Tony Dokoupil pressed Elizabeth Warren on Democrats’ shutdown demands, viewers got a front-row seat to the senator’s fury — and to the very fight at the heart of Washington’s gridlock. # **[Senator Warren Discusses Shutdown](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/Hf1G-t-O5kRkyZebG3l6Ag)**
---
When CBS host Tony Dokoupil pressed Elizabeth Warren on Democrats’ shutdown demands, viewers got a front-row seat to the senator’s fury — and to the very fight at the heart of Washington’s gridlock. Dokoupil pointed out the obvious: the Democrats’ counter-proposal included restoring Medicaid benefits for certain non-citizens that had been barred under what Republicans [...]

# **[Trump Comments On Dems Request To Reopen The Government.](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The fight over the government shutdown has laid bare what’s really at stake — and it isn’t just partisan gridlock. According to a White House memo released Wednesday, Democrats are demanding nearly $200 billion in taxpayer-funded healthcare benefits for illegal immigrants as their price to reopen the government. The document frames the impasse bluntly: Democrats [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD01Mjg4ODQifQ/7FOazpLBUjDUX7dOtA7DbA)

# **[Israel Reportedly Intercepts Flotilla](http://trk.libertyledger._-7g)**
---
The so-called “Selfie Flotilla,” officially named the Global Sumud Flotilla, set out with more than 40 vessels and some 500 activists, aiming to smash Israel’s blockade of Gaza under the guise of “delivering humanitarian aid.” Israel, unimpressed, responded as it always does: with decisive force and military precision. Surveillance footage shows Israeli commandos in night-vision [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._-7g)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/cPKIrY3P0ooVupW8GwXY1A)
# **[Reports State That Paramount To Name New Editor in Chief At CBS News](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/cPKIrY3P0ooVupW8GwXY1A)**
---
The rumors swirling for weeks have finally solidified: Bari Weiss is about to take the reins at CBS News. What was once speculation is now poised to become official, with Paramount Skydance set to announce her as the next editor in chief in the coming days. And if that news has CBS staffers bracing for [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/cPKIrY3P0ooVupW8GwXY1A)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/XtJ4ooo1JKPThNDAPV_j0A)
# **[DHS Officials Makes Arrests Outside Facility](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/XtJ4ooo1JKPThNDAPV_j0A)**
---
Portland’s long-running saga of so-called “peaceful protests” at the local ICE facility continues to prove exactly the opposite — a nightly cocktail of chaos, destruction, and open defiance of law enforcement.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/XtJ4ooo1JKPThNDAPV_j0A)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._BOiSkd6mzXKg)

A controversy at a New Jersey hospital has ended with the resignation of a physician accused of celebrating conservative activist Charlie Kirk’s assassination, while the nurse who reported him has been cleared to return to work. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mhhh&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mhhh&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mhhh&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3mhhh&__onlt=h)
---

---

---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**

clean_body: Please read the message below from Turning Point USA. | | | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt **[pushed back at a reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/a38a4df2-334b-4022-842b-1d7c2bf2e511?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for challenging the premise that illegal immigrants are currently receiving government healthcare illegally.
**[Watch the explosive moment below:](https://substack.com/redirect/a38a4df2-334b-4022-842b-1d7c2bf2e511?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a38a4df2-334b-4022-842b-1d7c2bf2e511?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a38a4df2-334b-4022-842b-1d7c2bf2e511?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Medicaid costs tripled under Biden** : Leavitt cited data showing Medicaid spending on emergency services for illegal immigrants nearly tripled between Trump's last full fiscal year (2020) and Biden's (2024), with costs skyrocketing 142% in fiscal year 2024 alone to reach $9.1 billion in taxpayer-funded emergency services.
* **State-level financial strains** : California, Illinois, and Minnesota expanded state healthcare coverage to include illegal immigrants, causing massive financial burdens with California spending $8.5 billion on immigrant healthcare in 2024 and Illinois spending approximately $800 million annually, while Southern California healthcare systems reported being "bombarded" with longer patient wait times.
* **Shutdown dispute centers on healthcare** : Republicans argue Democrats forced the government shutdown not just over Affordable Care Act tax credits, but to restore Medicaid spending on illegal immigrants, with Speaker Mike Johnson claiming the Democrats' proposal would cost taxpayers $200 billion on illegal immigrants and other non-citizens, including repealing reforms that closed California's Medicaid loophole.

* * *

# **ICE exposes illegal immigrant Des Moines superintendent fake degree and criminal record**
Ian Andre Roberts, former Des Moines Public Schools superintendent arrested by ICE, **[has a criminal record dating back to 1996](https://substack.com/redirect/6acf3418-f5ed-4d3c-87c0-fe9cdc55ac43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** including drug trafficking charges, illegal weapons possession, forged documents, reckless driving, and multiple weapon charges, with an immigration judge ordering his removal in May 2024.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e3ade711-414c-4738-8a1c-20ed60cff827?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ian Andre Roberts/ ICE
* **Illegal status and false credentials** : Roberts entered the U.S. from Guyana in 1994, his last work authorization expired in 2020, and he was illegally registered to vote as a Democrat in Maryland, while also falsely claiming degrees including an MBA candidacy at MIT that the school has no record of.
* **High-level education positions despite background** : Despite his criminal history and illegal status, Roberts held superintendent positions across multiple states including Baltimore, Washington D.C., St. Louis, California, Pennsylvania, and Iowa, with his Pennsylvania district facing over $400,000 in sex discrimination lawsuit settlements during his tenure.
* **Armed during ICE arrest** : When arrested September 26 with Iowa State Patrol assistance, Roberts attempted to flee and was found hiding in brush, with his vehicle containing $3,000 cash, a knife, and a loaded Glock 9mm pistol, leading to additional charges of being an illegal alien in possession of firearms.

name: NDRC
subject: Add your name: End mid-decade gerrymandering once and for all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Let’s put power back in the hands of the people — not power-hungry politicians.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116592369/573915175/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZjIwM2JiLTVjYTEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vCptPh04eLJxasancmHGbSfAAHabCG0pI5CVbkZVGDo=&emci=150d21dc-95a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d5f203bb-5ca1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, The tidal wave of last-minute, mid-decade map manipulation is evidence of one thing: Our current system is in jeopardy. Right now, a concerted effort is underway to lock in Republicans’ hold on Congress by redrawing district lines, in order to avoid accountability by the voters. And it’s happening without the consent of the American people. The NDRC is fighting these mid-decade power grabs in states from Texas to Missouri to Ohio. But playing Whac-A-Mole with these attacks on democracy isn’t sustainable. We need a long-term solution to stop this from becoming a strategy Republicans trot out every election, changing the rules wherever they can to make sure they have the upper hand. **That’s why the Redistricting Reform Act just introduced in Congress is so crucial. This bill ends the practice of partisan gerrymandering at the federal level — banning mid-decade redistricting schemes and requiring states to use truly independent commissions that will result in more competitive elections. ** [**Join the NDRC in supporting this long-term solution to an urgent problem. Add your name to be a grassroots advocate for this essential bill and help us end partisan gerrymandering once and for all.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116592370/573915178/957931055?refcode=eng_ndrc_tier1_email_RedistrictingReform_email_20251004-NDRC-Tier1-RedistrictingReform_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20251004-NDRC-Tier1-RedistrictingReform_&utm_campaign=RedistrictingReform&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZjIwM2JiLTVjYTEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vCptPh04eLJxasancmHGbSfAAHabCG0pI5CVbkZVGDo=&emci=150d21dc-95a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d5f203bb-5ca1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045) | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116592371/573915179/957931055?refcode=eng_ndrc_tier1_email_RedistrictingReform_email_20251004-NDRC-Tier1-RedistrictingReform_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20251004-NDRC-Tier1-RedistrictingReform_&utm_campaign=RedistrictingReform&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZjIwM2JiLTVjYTEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vCptPh04eLJxasancmHGbSfAAHabCG0pI5CVbkZVGDo=&emci=150d21dc-95a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d5f203bb-5ca1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)

Plain and simple, Americans deserve to hold their representatives accountable in fair and competitive elections. An overwhelming majority of voters oppose partisan gerrymandering, and it’s obvious why: It leaves all citizens worse off by disenfranchising them, sowing extreme division, undermining equal representation, and boosting the influence of powerful special interests.
The Redistricting Reform Act is a critical step towards a new vision where the will of the people carries the day. It’s the long-term solution we need to put our country back on the path towards a fairer, stronger democracy, rather than leaving it in the hands of power-hungry politicians.
[**Are you ready to join us? Become a grassroots co-sponsor today of this bill that will end partisan gerrymandering once and for all.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116592372/573915180/957931055?refcode=eng_ndrc_tier1_email_RedistrictingReform_email_20251004-NDRC-Tier1-RedistrictingReform_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20251004-NDRC-Tier1-RedistrictingReform_&utm_campaign=RedistrictingReform&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZjIwM2JiLTVjYTEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vCptPh04eLJxasancmHGbSfAAHabCG0pI5CVbkZVGDo=&emci=150d21dc-95a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d5f203bb-5ca1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)

name: Hell let loose
subject: 100k+ Dems in PA may vote for MAGA because of dirty trick
body:
Our undoing could come from our own voters.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWoEEZtr6W46dVUcGvoBURv7VOFEI4C2nTcPV0T5ZJ96MZPk6DmcNFGDUMcuwZveSntBMbUOWhvyDpRGQiQWIs9hGhasNRv6G3Wr7Ls0GmlvRFg29S2CqGHcAuf4YEXFlbA-d4D2__-4kB6USijFLyPxsL0xjbi2oOVj_dKqmi2kzvePVorL9E2ONXI3nSMG4ODiSM0OQpnA0RCwhgVYp2KF37toXFxOsX9mV5qi-T2WkJ5X60B-bf7ru2TWEk3e&c=jIVVCdYWINHaDSPyhhkKX1rABVBh0VNr64yUb9VsHSaEkdLBFn1NMg==&ch=1iEHa6cww17v8lB9O3xDbmBYydhJZiT1eT5qo866YXS4oeLh4qXmjw==)

| Friend,
We are not being facetious when we say all hell has been let loose in Pennsylvania.
The upcoming November 2025 PA Supreme Court Race will soon be the most expensive judicial race in American History and could even become the most expensive race in electoral history outside of a Presidential election. Sadly it's not the Democrats who are breaking the spending records in this race...
We are getting clobbered by Republicans and are being outspent 10-1. The reason the GOP is spending so much here is because whoever controls the Pennsylvania Supreme Court controls Pennsylvania. If Democrats lose here we never win in swing state Pennsylvania again - 19 electoral college votes gone for good.
Now our prospects here are about to get far worse:

| Examples of the deceptive tactics the GOP are using to trick progressive voters into voting no and supporting the far-right cause of removing PA's Democratic Supreme Court majority.
Over the past week Democrats have begun receiving mailers, digital ads, and pamphlets that utilize progressive messaging telling voters to vote no in this election (the far-right cause).
We've now received word from a confidential source in the Pennsylvania printing industry that a Republican dark money operation is days away from sending vote no mailers like the ones pictured above to over 100,000 high propensity Democratic voters.
These high propensity Dem voters are the people who are most likely to vote in an off year special election like this one. If they are duped into voting for the Republican cause it will be game over. Our undoing could come from our own voters.
Defend our Courts was never planning on doing serious spending on mail. Our strategy was always to focus the majority of our funds on TV and canvassers but this changes everything.
If we want to prevent tens of thousands of Dems from inadvertently voting against us, we need to rapidly pivot to mail to counter the GOP's deceptive mailing push. [We've got 31 days until election day and less than 4 days until vote by mail begins in some counties. Can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help us spoil the GOP's game changing deception in this beyond critical race?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWoEEZtr6W46dVUcGvoBURv7VOFEI4C2nTcPV0T5ZJ96MZPk6DmcNFGDUMcuwZveSntBMbUOWhvyDpRGQiQWIs9hGhasNRv6G3Wr7Ls0GmlvRFg29S2CqGHcAuf4YEXFlbA-d4D2__-4kB6USijFLyPxsL0xjbi2oOVj_dKqmi2kzvePVorL9E2ONXI3nSMG4ODiSM0OQpnA0RCwhgVYp2KF37toXFxOsX9mV5qi-T2npUA2sbresQxxeij-rgTH&c=jIVVCdYWINHaDSPyhhkKX1rABVBh0VNr64yUb9VsHSaEkdLBFn1NMg==&ch=1iEHa6cww17v8lB9O3xDbmBYydhJZiT1eT5qo866YXS4oeLh4qXmjw==)

clean_body: Our undoing could come from our own voters. | | | | | == | Friend, We are not being facetious when we say all hell has been let loose in Pennsylvania. The upcoming November 2025 PA Supreme Court Race will soon be the most expensive judicial race in American History and could even become the most expensive race in electoral history outside of a Presidential election. Sadly it's not the Democrats who are breaking the spending records in this race... We are getting clobbered by Republicans and are being outspent 10-1. The reason the GOP is spending so much here is because whoever controls the Pennsylvania Supreme Court controls Pennsylvania. If Democrats lose here we never win in swing state Pennsylvania again - 19 electoral college votes gone for good. Now our prospects here are about to get far worse: | | | == | | | == | Examples of the deceptive tactics the GOP are using to trick progressive voters into voting no and supporting the far-right cause of removing PA's Democratic Supreme Court majority. Over the past week Democrats have begun receiving mailers, digital ads, and pamphlets that utilize progressive messaging telling voters to vote no in this election (the far-right cause). We've now received word from a confidential source in the Pennsylvania printing industry that a Republican dark money operation is days away from sending vote no mailers like the ones pictured above to over 100,000 high propensity Democratic voters. These high propensity Dem voters are the people who are most likely to vote in an off year special election like this one. If they are duped into voting for the Republican cause it will be game over. Our undoing could come from our own voters. Defend our Courts was never planning on doing serious spending on mail. Our strategy was always to focus the majority of our funds on TV and canvassers but this changes everything. If we want to prevent tens of thousands of Dems from inadvertently voting against us, we need to rapidly pivot to mail to counter the GOP's deceptive mailing push. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == This race will be won or lost over the next few weeks. By November 4th the outcome will be all but decided. It's now or never. Team Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | | |

**🚨 BREAKING NEWS 🚨**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116592411/573915279/-309737922?refcode=251004_RG_shutdown-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjhjYWY0ZC01ZGExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tYfNIQInAevB0AUyB4lj-lY1pnnvB0NcgecP90e8pRk=)**
Hi, it’s Congressman Robert Garcia here with an urgent request.
The government has officially shut down, and the damage to our country is real — to federal workers, community services, and programs that so many families depend on.
But that’s not all. We’re now seeing Donald Trump use the federal government to weaponize that pain — blaming Democrats publicly through partisan messages and websites.
**That’s not just wrong — it’s likely illegal under the Hatch Act. And I’m calling for a full investigation into these violations.**
**[But I need to know where you stand, so let me know: Do you support Democrats investigating Trump’s lawless administration and working to hold him accountable for his abuses of power?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116592412/573915280/-1512507916?refcode=251004_RG_shutdown-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjhjYWY0ZC01ZGExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tYfNIQInAevB0AUyB4lj-lY1pnnvB0NcgecP90e8pRk=&emci=34bb6850-54a1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2b8caf4d-5da1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
[ANSWER NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116592413/573915281/-1512507916?refcode=251004_RG_shutdown-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjhjYWY0ZC01ZGExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tYfNIQInAevB0AUyB4lj-lY1pnnvB0NcgecP90e8pRk=&emci=34bb6850-54a1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2b8caf4d-5da1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)
It’s simple: We must hold Trump accountable for his reckless attacks on the rule of law, democratic norms, and the constraints on his power.
If we cave now, we’d only be setting the stage for Trump to abuse his power without consequence even more in the future. We can’t let that happen.
**By standing together, we let Washington know that we won’t back down. That we won’t let fear and coercion win. And that we will defend our communities, our neighbors, and our future with all our strength.**
**[If you’re in, add your name to my petition and let me know you’re ready to stand up to Donald Trump at this critical moment for our democracy.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116592414/573915282/-1512507916?refcode=251004_RG_shutdown-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjhjYWY0ZC01ZGExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tYfNIQInAevB0AUyB4lj-lY1pnnvB0NcgecP90e8pRk=&emci=34bb6850-54a1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2b8caf4d-5da1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116592415/573915283/-1512507916?refcode=251004_RG_shutdown-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjhjYWY0ZC01ZGExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tYfNIQInAevB0AUyB4lj-lY1pnnvB0NcgecP90e8pRk=&emci=34bb6850-54a1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2b8caf4d-5da1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)

Robert Garcia

Our undoing could come from our own voters.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cGK6xjjljuu6wjCiDO9_qZpkJQ4h_El-IJy6Ypw0z3ldbKmNvTWwXT2NdeFe4CQCiN788UwHNHtllSIovTK0iiv68MRk1KunaoPDiupJV5MpFi5y46o_Jy8nLqA5ZioP6z39fDHKAFcrSpnPBlxPv_9dYakfGcA3ZqN1GZZ7ut32cidZmtGFfyeTGjjTTbdypN2mPD0M5j6--GWkLX7Os9ukiCGJuKlzqz4k2fOTPdTByYo5d87S0w==&c=LfBT9ud1W1cvtMMBnHms2y7hG0GTa4pi4AeM6usZQfdnD43a-NjGRQ==&ch=93GF35fj58WqUgRXgnLvjFpFN0FX1HbINx1Z0yuJxLrEOuAvVZuLXQ==)

| Peter,
We are not being facetious when we say all hell has been let loose in Pennsylvania.
The upcoming November 2025 PA Supreme Court Race will soon be the most expensive judicial race in American History and could even become the most expensive race in electoral history outside of a Presidential election. Sadly it's not the Democrats who are breaking the spending records in this race...
We are getting clobbered by Republicans and are being outspent 10-1. The reason the GOP is spending so much here is because whoever controls the Pennsylvania Supreme Court controls Pennsylvania. If Democrats lose here we never win in swing state Pennsylvania again - 19 electoral college votes gone for good.
Now our prospects here are about to get far worse:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cGK6xjjljuu6wjCiDO9_qZpkJQ4h_El-IJy6Ypw0z3ldbKmNvTWwXT2NdeFe4CQCiN788UwHNHtllSIovTK0iiv68MRk1KunaoPDiupJV5MpFi5y46o_Jy8nLqA5ZioP6z39fDHKAFcrSpnPBlxPv_9dYakfGcA3ZqN1GZZ7ut32cidZmtGFfyeTGjjTTbdypN2mPD0M5j6--GWkLX7Os9ukiCGJuKlzzTMghXAXW4vn5UYQwIb8qA==&c=LfBT9ud1W1cvtMMBnHms2y7hG0GTa4pi4AeM6usZQfdnD43a-NjGRQ==&ch=93GF35fj58WqUgRXgnLvjFpFN0FX1HbINx1Z0yuJxLrEOuAvVZuLXQ==)

| Examples of the deceptive tactics the GOP are using to trick progressive voters into voting no and supporting the far-right cause of removing PA's Democratic Supreme Court majority.
---
| | | | Over the past week Democrats have begun receiving mailers, digital ads, and pamphlets that utilize progressive messaging telling voters to vote no in this election (the far-right cause).
We've now received word from a confidential source in the Pennsylvania printing industry that a Republican dark money operation is days away from sending vote no mailers like the ones pictured above to over 100,000 high propensity Democratic voters.
These high propensity Dem voters are the people who are most likely to vote in an off year special election like this one. If they are duped into voting for the Republican cause it will be game over. Our undoing could come from our own voters.
Defend Our Courts was never planning on doing serious spending on mail. Our strategy was always to focus the majority of our funds on TV and canvassers but this changes everything.
If we want to prevent tens of thousands of Dems from inadvertently voting against us, we need to rapidly pivot to mail to counter the GOP's deceptive mailing push. [We've got 31 days until election day and ballots are already arriving in the mail in some counties. Can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help us spoil the GOP's game changing deception in this beyond critical race?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cGK6xjjljuu6wjCiDO9_qZpkJQ4h_El-IJy6Ypw0z3ldbKmNvTWwXT2NdeFe4CQCO6Hi8ifIbgwPLQNOkyQukpOyMW0qHUsC2zd8PUbz6RoJXyDlOA93Gp_nnRuV2DYLTEzHkBq4D9YM1sL3kHXPKmbSUg-WXq7n9P-v_ApvKY-RYlvuorNYLkkAYcpkEpjgYim_0v2J8scnX4sde4ycoKl-BJYWGeK3UFyUh-CuF6DAWB89yFXA_jh_6srVBX6X&c=LfBT9ud1W1cvtMMBnHms2y7hG0GTa4pi4AeM6usZQfdnD43a-NjGRQ==&ch=93GF35fj58WqUgRXgnLvjFpFN0FX1HbINx1Z0yuJxLrEOuAvVZuLXQ==)

The reason the GOP is spending so much here is because whoever controls the Pennsylvania Supreme Court controls Pennsylvania. If Democrats lose here we never win in swing state Pennsylvania again - 19 electoral college votes gone for good. Now our prospects here are about to get far worse: | == | Examples of the deceptive tactics the GOP are using to trick progressive voters into voting no and supporting the far-right cause of removing PA's Democratic Supreme Court majority. | | | | Over the past week Democrats have begun receiving mailers, digital ads, and pamphlets that utilize progressive messaging telling voters to vote no in this election (the far-right cause). We've now received word from a confidential source in the Pennsylvania printing industry that a Republican dark money operation is days away from sending vote no mailers like the ones pictured above to over 100,000 high propensity Democratic voters. These high propensity Dem voters are the people who are most likely to vote in an off year special election like this one. If they are duped into voting for the Republican cause it will be game over. Our undoing could come from our own voters. Defend Our Courts was never planning on doing serious spending on mail. Our strategy was always to focus the majority of our funds on TV and canvassers but this changes everything. If we want to prevent tens of thousands of Dems from inadvertently voting against us, we need to rapidly pivot to mail to counter the GOP's deceptive mailing push. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == This race will be won or lost over the next few weeks. By November 4th the outcome will be all but decided. It's now or never. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE.

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: A MAGA extremist is running for governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40239%2E3422442%2EcSWpOu)
Peter, meet Chad Bianco.
He’s a Republican running for governor of California—and if he wins, it’ll be a disaster for our state.
Bianco is a Trump Republican through and through. He proudly endorsed Trump in 2024, and would bring that same MAGA agenda to California if he wins. With so much progress at risk in 2026, we can’t afford to elect a governor who would drag us backward.
What’s worse, he is a former member of the Oath Keepers, a far-right extremist group that has ties to the January 6th insurrection. This is not someone we can allow anywhere near the governor’s office.
Peter, we need to take Chad's campaign seriously—he’s come close to Katie in multiple polls. If Republicans consolidate support, he could pull into the lead.
**[Katie needs your help to win. We’re working hard to spread her progressive message across the state, but that takes serious resources. name: Attorney General Jason Miyares
subject: My Response to Jay Jones’ Disqualifying Conduct
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Law enforcement should be guided by integrity. Jay Jones has failed that standard.| | | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/XVW-cw3losmS9NgOuObfoxPfFYN7PCWWeqFCIZTtRA1ljxMv5mOZZs66B4PgRmB4ju-SR8PSusq-6ZgACT0U0jVKtc3dYKzkWs7mZwwHPzCog7rbERmOoP127P4EDzq6alY2QQv8rlMC3tMp1hBKXjz_GwukPcF-XLz-UhClEInxknL9AVVHs3M87jSYfofwpCcTlNP19weQAbqVjJGy_cb5FCNVcAfQBoZkm0Pp36PEI_EaRtdLoOc4lsnplVxJFXMdSL1Qa6g29D8Z1O7OefmlwLJZbPPDZYSzxIkJt3geJn79HU28s3NZgF2l8_vhM6zhHiNaEpsM-a5L9p8cBjRKsZ8FKBjtTg/CCvux46L2Luv95ivU73zEvyh5MXchdGb/13)
---
Fellow Virginians, **The Attorney General is the Chief Law Enforcement Officer of Virginia, and law enforcement must be neutral and nonpartisan.** It must be done with character and integrity. That is the only way every Virginian can trust they are safe.

With recent revelations, **it is clear that Jay Jones has proven he is reckless, he is biased, and he is willing to trade his integrity away, disqualifying himself from ever serving as Attorney General for Virginia.**

Before this last week, we knew Jay Jones had dangerously soft policies on criminal justice that put the lives of ordinary Virginians at risk, but now he’s made no secret about his radical understanding of power.

**Jay Jones wished for the violent death of a political opponent, and then he fantasized about his political opponent’s children dying in their mother’s arms.** When he was confronted with how despicable that is, he doubled down, saying that kind of grief and pain would be a good thing if it advanced his political views.

**This conduct is disqualifying.** Putting politics aside, one has to be coming from a dark place to advocate the murder of a colleague and their family.

As a prosecutor, I’ve sat with crying victims. **There is no sound more haunting than the cries of a parent who has lost a child. I’ve seen their pain, held their hands, and witnessed the devastation that violent crime leaves behind.** No one should ever have to endure that kind of loss — least of all to advance a political agenda. Prior to this week, the election for Attorney General was about the candidates and their policies. Public safety versus soft-on-crime policies. Now, it is about what kind of society Virginians want.

If you believe it ok to wish death upon a political opponent — vote for my opponent. If you believe it is worth the death of children to advance your political goals, vote for my opponent. If you want to give a green light to violent lunatics, vote for my opponent.

**As Attorney General, I took an oath to protect every Virginian — regardless of whether they are a Democrat or Republican, whether they like me or hate me, voted for me or not.** My job is to stop violence, to protect innocent lives, and keep people safe. I cannot imagine someone running for this job who advocates for violence.

**The Attorney General’s sworn duty is to serve as the Commonwealth’s top law enforcement officer and keep everyone safe and that is the job I will continue to do for the people of Virginia.**
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/5KEuaX2IGk-jswHzl_C6pJyxF4MKilY3DUq7kLTQwWJ7Hc-J8FnlIJ9NNz6RJQz-rRO5jAoOCZSzdWn8wFAnL4ieSxjQPx6MdzKsFmZiO9zS45Jo_xPAUxDLyP4QAHO6bAHBVSmKgxikVsPA3dYHl8c-JjzpO4jqkxEytOmrV5MS5rJk9pXbeNQbV7dHSqpnDDaKw2QtDNWqVajf9WRifscJeDWOnUpGZklkcJmldC-PspffzcwfZB5zxWDBFT-rjwv8UqC9OhL6sB6zUlZg3aWQQgKZbHdYltQCwwyQtRNjlOvR6BpMrk5j3dLdyl7P2-A4hC-f4wtSl_G63tAm87OgH3Vc_yfMug/VZARusXEqWOr-G3oXKE4lQi5-fmTwdH7/13)
---
Jason S. MiyaresAttorney General of Virginia

clean_body: Law enforcement should be guided by integrity. Jay Jones has failed that standard.| | | Fellow Virginians, The Attorney General is the Chief Law Enforcement Officer of Virginia, and law enforcement must be neutral and nonpartisan. It must be done with character and integrity. That is the only way every Virginian can trust they are safe. With recent revelations, it is clear that Jay Jones has proven he is reckless, he is biased, and he is willing to trade his integrity away, disqualifying himself from ever serving as Attorney General for Virginia. Before this last week, we knew Jay Jones had dangerously soft policies on criminal justice that put the lives of ordinary Virginians at risk, but now he’s made no secret about his radical understanding of power. Jay Jones wished for the violent death of a political opponent, and then he fantasized about his political opponent’s children dying in their mother’s arms. When he was confronted with how despicable that is, he doubled down, saying that kind of grief and pain would be a good thing if it advanced his political views. This conduct is disqualifying. Putting politics aside, one has to be coming from a dark place to advocate the murder of a colleague and their family. As a prosecutor, I’ve sat with crying victims. There is no sound more haunting than the cries of a parent who has lost a child. I’ve seen their pain, held their hands, and witnessed the devastation that violent crime leaves behind. No one should ever have to endure that kind of loss — least of all to advance a political agenda. Prior to this week, the election for Attorney General was about the candidates and their policies. Public safety versus soft-on-crime policies. Now, it is about what kind of society Virginians want. If you believe it ok to wish death upon a political opponent — vote for my opponent. If you believe it is worth the death of children to advance your political goals, vote for my opponent. If you want to give a green light to violent lunatics, vote for my opponent. As Attorney General, I took an oath to protect every Virginian — regardless of whether they are a Democrat or Republican, whether they like me or hate me, voted for me or not. My job is to stop violence, to protect innocent lives, and keep people safe. I cannot imagine someone running for this job who advocates for violence. The Attorney General’s sworn duty is to serve as the Commonwealth’s top law enforcement officer and keep everyone safe and that is the job I will continue to do for the people of Virginia. Jason S. MiyaresAttorney General of Virginia | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to give, here are three reasons why today is the day:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251004-655&t=1&akid=661%2E294397%2EpFNdXy)
Team,
If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to give, here are three reasons why today is the day:
1. **We just gained a new far-right opponent.** Maria Lazar has entered the race, and if elected, she would be one of the most extreme members of the Wisconsin Supreme Court.

2. **Dark money is on the way.** Now that right-wing special interests have their handpicked candidate, we’re expecting them to pour millions into Wisconsin to boost Lazar’s campaign and try to buy a seat on our court.

3. **Grassroots power is how we win.** In the last judicial election, Elon Musk and other far-right megadonors spent over $50 million trying to tip the scales in their favor. The only way we can compete is with thousands of grassroots supporters like you chipping in whatever you can to power our campaign.

This is a crucial moment for our campaign. Every contribution today helps us stay ahead of any attacks and build the people-powered campaign it’ll take to win.
[**Can you chip in $10 right now to help elect Judge Chris Taylor and protect Wisconsin’s future?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20251004_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20251004-655&refcode2=661_294397_pFNdXy&akid=661%2E294397%2EpFNdXy)

Team Taylor

This is big: Scott Perry is one of the most vulnerable MAGA Republicans in the country — and flipping his seat is key to taking back the House majority. **But if we want to win, we have to act now.** **_[Your contribution now can make a significant difference in our mission to defeat Scott Perry and reclaim the House →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116592705/573916352/1737528682?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251004_FR_TakeBackHouse_0_1MO_PADems_NA_NA_ScottPerry&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjY5ZjBkZi02M2ExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PhbH5D83XQZL3WJqWAMvHopP0_gI17iEisjdiGjWLdU=)_** The truth is: Scott Perry has built his career as a far-right extremist who puts party over Pennsylvania.
* He was a central figure in Trump’s scheme to overturn the 2020 election.
* He voted against certifying Pennsylvania’s own election results.
* He’s supported budgets that would slash Medicaid and Social Security, hurting seniors and working families across PA.
* He consistently opposes abortion rights, siding with extremists who want to ban access entirely.

Scott Perry is a MAGA extremist, and flipping his seat could be the difference between a Republican House that enables Trump’s chaos, or a Democratic House that delivers for Pennsylvanians.

The GOP knows this too. They’re already pouring dark money into PA-10 to prop up Perry. The only way we win is if we build our grassroots power now.

clean_body: | | Hi Peter, This is big: Scott Perry is one of the most vulnerable MAGA Republicans in the country — and flipping his seat is key to taking back the House majority. But if we want to win, we have to act now. = The truth is: Scott Perry has built his career as a far-right extremist who puts party over Pennsylvania. He was a central figure in Trump’s scheme to overturn the 2020 election. He voted against certifying Pennsylvania’s own election results. He’s supported budgets that would slash Medicaid and Social Security, hurting seniors and working families across PA. He consistently opposes abortion rights, siding with extremists who want to ban access entirely. Scott Perry is a MAGA extremist, and flipping his seat could be the difference between a Republican House that enables Trump’s chaos, or a Democratic House that delivers for Pennsylvanians. The GOP knows this too. They’re already pouring dark money into PA-10 to prop up Perry. The only way we win is if we build our grassroots power now. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = This is one of the most critical races in the country. Let’s take back the House starting right here in Pennsylvania. — Pennsylvania Democratic Party = | Follow us on , , , and **! Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party. body:
Hi, it’s Deb.
Hi Peter, Deb Haaland here.
Our campaign is gearing up to publicly report our fundraising totals for the last time this year in just a few days, and everyone — _including National Republicans eying this race_ — will be watching to see if we have the grassroots power it’ll take to win.
So I want to personally reach out to you, the individuals who power this race, to share some notes I jotted down about what your grassroots support means to me. **[But before you read it, Peter, will you chip in $10 — or more — to be split between my campaign and Heartland Patriots?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96268?refcode=em20251004-9521&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9521%2E614464%2EmWT2yL)**

body:
Election Day is on Tuesday, October 7. That’s just 3 days away.

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/9nZDZBe4xKg5hpV2Y2-l7g~~/AAUS1hA~/ARwAsC6G6ooU2W5X37VPN4YSTPtdHTLuuEDIJLu3troYebb3Tu6NZPSqLJ2-A9cs1omVTiRjClY-zjnc05jwresh2MbjDwgcxTvllyqWVsuoH-myBj3uKz86FBTmStcT36mxZIp1PCNUhNZxwkcrVwa5Z73eQGah1TYi8lgE2r8~)
| | | | Peter, Election Day is on Tuesday, October 7. **That’s just 3 days away.** The next three days are make-or-break. We need every supporter on our side. Here are **three things you can do today** to push Vincent across the finish line:
1. **Make your plan to vote.** Know your polling location and what time you’ll cast your ballot.
2. **Remind three friends.** A quick text or call goes a long way. Personal outreach is the #1 way we increase turnout.
3. **[Chip in $3 (or $30!) to fund the final canvass, calls, and texts that will decide this race.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/SCsVuPe3mhuHO5oC6sdzKg~~/AAUS1hA~/ikof9G2ucpwrLDLLCT_wUVrS6e8SIig5pET-RLLxQZCSV2u2S20tAwVeE3Z7wzLeoyz4IlGqYIZoUd1KSS_ItJwPxv4Y3XEYDYL1hLuzUO-YzeHmvZQ2dIYwJyLy-y6XH639ysXwXNBRwq-wCL7ecTwLN0dW0D-_8t9RyC_mgS4~)**

Vincent is fighting for working families in TN-7, but he can’t do it without you._Let’s give it our all in these last three days._ With gratitude,
Team Dixie **[**EARLY VOTE LOCATIONS**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/0MLO2WAI3sDpNJYiKyS0EA~~/AAUS1hA~/cpNQzXyMDwVIy3H-YBXv-vQvj9LLJOCvHngwC1V_R9xPKwHIaWnLz3wAsjhZ5eLaOE4u3vrgLja5sm9mhSHd9KU6cbrW1aafql_8XbNssCIt58aZY4Wn9WirtYktLRAxIw3ga-0JVzunPv-DgJF7eA~~)**

* * *
_Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. Now he’s running for Congress to lower costs, protect Medicare and Social Security, and finally put working people first._ **[**DONATE »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/favnkrH5caExD0mzedTIkQ~~/AAUS1hA~/ikof9G2ucpwrLDLLCT_wUVrS6e8SIig5pET-RLLxQZCSV2u2S20tAwVeE3Z7wzLeoyz4IlGqYIZoUd1KSS_ItG-2FZ6gJk4ReWaG1WpBiOM71qVa_hO_a67e9m6Uu3xxnU9hLZeWABwSTJEUQiyTWi3eu3ppmDMW3xNhbX7BxtY~) ** **

clean_body: We cannot sit by while he tears down our grassroots power | | | | | Peter, Donald Trump just signed a Presidential Memorandum aimed squarely at ActBlue—the backbone of small‐dollar Democratic giving and a lifeline for campaigns, movement groups, and organizations like ours. This is nothing more than a power play to erase political opposition and pave the way for one‐party rule. It's an excuse for lunatic Republican Members of Congress to launch phony investigation after phony investigation to slow Democrats down. Our answer: an emergency push to raise $50,000 for our Flip The House Fund —fuel for the ads, organizing, and accountability work that can rip Trump’s MAGA majority out from under him in 2026. ~ This administration is working every day to minimize our freedoms and dismantle our democracy. The very worst thing we can do is capitulate. You've seen examples of universities and law firms backing down. But you've also seen strong resistance from: ActBlue Harvard NPR Costco Everyday Americans ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ Thank you for standing with us. — No Surrender Fund ~ ** | Paid for by No Surrender Fund No Surrender Fund1263 1st Street SEWashington, DC 20003United States "Website"

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

| | Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read. Did you know? Here in Oregon, the Secretary of State is next in the line of succession. That makes the Secretary of State assume some of the roles that other states assign to their Lieutenant Governors. I know firsthand how critical Lieutenant Governors are across the country. Lieutenant Governors aren’t just ceremonial positions. Many help set policy, oversee elections, and serve as a backstop against extremism. **That’s why I’m reaching out to ask you to join me in supporting Ghazala Hashmi in her race for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia. She’s in a tough race to flip Virginia blue, and she needs our help.** **_Extremists are spending big to try and take her down._** But if we stand with Ghazala now, we can make sure Virginia has a strong, principled leader fighting for public schools, reproductive rights, and affordable healthcare. **[I’m asking you to split a donation today between my team here in Oregon and Ghazala Hashmi’s team in Virginia. Together, we can strengthen Democratic leadership across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116593844/573920159/1178541731?refcode=251004em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2E5MDVkYi02ZGExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CbIbRegDhFAAHLiMQUxn-OpdlAXSukUuKvxg5IuZ6Jc=)**

clean_body: In case you missed this, Donald Trump will be here in Virginia tomorrow. He's created utter chaos in Washington. Now, he's visiting our Commonwealth with a month until the election, trying to tip the scales in our race — the only flippable Governor's office in 2025. = = = = = = = Thanks, Abigail Spanberger \-------- Forwarded message -------- From: Spanberger for Governor HQ <info@abigailspanberger.com> Date: Fri, Sep 5, 2025 at 12:39 PM Subject: Breaking news: Donald Trump is coming to Virginia To: Peter Willis <dpwillis67@gmail.com> = Breaking news: Donald Trump is coming to Virginia, according to a Washington Post report. A surprise visit weeks before the biggest Governor's race of his presidency... Peter, we have to prepare for the possibility that Trump endorses Winsome Earle-Sears. Because, once that happens, the President could start unloading his billion-dollar war chest against Abigail Spanberger. He's already attacked us from inside the White House and directed his press secretary to spread lies about us in the press. But that would pale in comparison to what's in store. We know we've asked a lot of you lately, but this couldn't be more important. = If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Whatever amount you're able to give is meaningful to us. name: Leah Johnson
subject: Bad news and good news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’ve been crunching the numbers non-stop.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4851%2E400544%2Eib8XD9)
This is Leah, Deb’s finance director. I have both bad and good news to share with you:
**First, the bad news:** With less than 48 hours until our public state fundraising deadline, we’re at serious risk of falling short on our **most important fundraising goal of the year.**
**Now, the good news:** We’re 77% of the way there, and there’s still time left to close the gap.
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251004_2_48?amount=5&refcode=em20251004-4851&refcode2=4851_400544_ib8XD9&akid=4851%2E400544%2Eib8XD9)
**These next 48 hours are crucial.[Will you chip in $5 to help us reach our $250,000 goal and prove we have the strength to win this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251004_2_48?amount=5&refcode=em20251004-4851&refcode2=4851_400544_ib8XD9&akid=4851%2E400544%2Eib8XD9)**
Deb has been traveling and meeting New Mexicans in every county — and she knows what’s on the line: access to affordable healthcare, relief for working families, defending our rights, and protecting our public lands.
But after Monday, our fundraising numbers go public for the last time this year — and Trump, the media, and our opponents will be watching. **If there’s any sign our support is slowing, Republican super PACs will flood the race with dark money, attack ads, and misinformation to defeat Deb.**
Unlike some of our opponents, Deb doesn’t have the means to self-fund this campaign. She’s relying on grassroots supporters from New Mexico and across the country to win.
**I’ve been crunching the numbers non-stop. If enough people who read this email step up, we’ll hit our goal. I know we can do it — but time is running out.**
**[Will you help us finish strong? With only 48 hours left to hit our biggest goal, Deb needs you more than ever.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251004_2_48?amount=5&refcode=em20251004-4851&refcode2=4851_400544_ib8XD9&akid=4851%2E400544%2Eib8XD9)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251004_2_48?amount=5&refcode=em20251004-4851&refcode2=4851_400544_ib8XD9&akid=4851%2E400544%2Eib8XD9)**
Thanks for your help.
— Leah
P.S. We know the Republican shutdown is impacting tens of thousands of New Mexicans and folks across the country. If you’re not able to donate today, we completely understand. We appreciate your support!
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251004-2&t=2&refcode2=4851_400544_ib8XD9&akid=4851%2E400544%2Eib8XD9)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=4851%2E400544%2Eib8XD9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=4851%2E400544%2Eib8XD9)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. _CNN_ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69333?t=4&akid=23460%2E4449941%2EQWnJzJ) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69333?t=5&akid=23460%2E4449941%2EQWnJzJ)
---|---

[SIGN NOW TO END _CITIZENS UNITED_ BEFORE THEY RUIN ALL OUR PROGRESS →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69333?t=6&akid=23460%2E4449941%2EQWnJzJ)
---
Friend – this could change everything in a TERRIBLE WAY.

This case (backed by Vice President J.D. Vance) would allow BILLIONAIRE DONORS to drop TENS of thousands of dollars into party committees without any caps.

The Supreme Court has already ruled in FAVOR of _Citizens United_ and money in politics. So it’s never been so CRUCIAL that we show WIDESPREAD SUPPORT for getting money OUT of politics once and for all.

That’s why Amy Klobuchar is sounding the alarm:
[]()
[**So please Friend, before it’s too late: Sign to END _Citizens United_ and stop billionaire donors from rigging our elections →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69333?t=7&akid=23460%2E4449941%2EQWnJzJ)
[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69333?t=8&akid=23460%2E4449941%2EQWnJzJ)

Thanks,

_Fight for Reform_

subject: We need to get our ducks in a row

body:
|
Patriot,

subject: Weird request!

body:
We need all the help we can get...
| Hi friend, it’s Heather from the Voter Protection Project. I have a weird favor to ask of you:

[Will you chip in 4 quarters — _just $1_ — to our grassroots powered movement to take back the House, flip the Senate, and stop Trump in 2026? $1 will allow you to claim your Democratic Supporter Membership card & fight back against MAGA. Chip in $1 today »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94469?t=6&akid=21388%2E878179%2EdqY5d9) | [CLAIM YOUR MEMBERSHIP: CHIP IN $1 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94469?t=7&akid=21388%2E878179%2EdqY5d9)
---
We wouldn’t normally ask for just $1, but donations are __plunging,__ and we want to make sure that loyal Democrats like you haven’t thrown in the towel in the race to flip the House and end Trump’s MAGA trifecta.

**Democratic Supporter Memberships give us the fuel we need to ensure we can limit the damage Donald Trump gets away with** — _it’s that simple!_

[With Trump ramping up his billionaire-funded war chest, we need all the help we can get. Will you chip in just $1 to claim your 2025 Democratic Supporter Membership card so we can flip critical swing seats, take back the House, and end Trump’s trifecta? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94469?t=8&akid=21388%2E878179%2EdqY5d9)
[CLAIM YOUR MEMBERSHIP: CHIP IN $1 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94469?t=9&akid=21388%2E878179%2EdqY5d9)
---
Thank you SO much,

Heather G.
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21388%2E878179%2EdqY5d9). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21388%2E878179%2EdqY5d9).**

The government shutdown drags on with no end in sight.
But make no mistake – this isn’t just dysfunction. It’s strategy.
Republicans, who control both chambers of Congress and the White House, are betting that voters will blame Democrats for the chaos they created. They think if they can sow enough frustration and confusion, it’ll weaken support for Democrats heading into next year.
But next month, voters in Pennsylvania, Virginia, and New Jersey have the power to prove them wrong.
These are three of the most critical battlegrounds of 2025, and if Democrats turn out in big numbers, it’ll send a message Republicans can’t ignore: voters know who’s responsible for this mess, and they’re ready to give Democrats back control.
GOTV PAC is working to turn out every last Democratic voter in these states, but we need your help to expand our reach before it’s too late. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10042025]
If we win big in all three, we won’t just end the GOP’s narrative – we’ll rewrite it.
